name: Josh Harder
subject: Fun update
body:
I'm excited

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97467100/513516961/-171021866?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjJhODUwN2QtNjVhOC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=AdBWJqD4PzIpvnOiHMbn8jmDqvONZmt4pH1Vz5koZ90=) | Peter, Like a lot of you, I’ve been searching for ways I can make a difference now that Trump is going back to the White House. Democrats simply can’t afford to keep losing. So, this week I decided to run for a leadership role with the New Democrat Coalition in Congress. This caucus is 108 members strong and will be one of the most important places for Democrats to fight back over the next 4 years. **I’m happy to share that last night my peers elected me Vice Chair of the New Democrat Coalition! I am super excited. In this role, I will have the opportunity to take a leading role in shaping Democratic policy and messaging for the next two years.** **** I know it’s going to be a lot to juggle being a leader of the caucus, running our own intense reelection campaign, and being a dad to our little ones, but ultimately I knew it was my duty to step up. _Who needs sleep anyway?_ I'm excited to take this next step. Thanks for always being there with me, Josh
---
* * *
You are receiving this email because Congressman Josh Harder is one of our last lines of defense to protect our democracy against MAGA extremists like Donald Trump and Marjorie Taylor Greene. clean_body: I'm excited | = | Peter, Like a lot of you, I’ve been searching for ways I can make a difference now that Trump is going back to the White House. Democrats simply can’t afford to keep losing. So, this week I decided to run for a leadership role with the New Democrat Coalition in Congress. This caucus is 108 members strong and will be one of the most important places for Democrats to fight back over the next 4 years. I’m happy to share that last night my peers elected me Vice Chair of the New Democrat Coalition! I am super excited. In this role, I will have the opportunity to take a leading role in shaping Democratic policy and messaging for the next two years. ** I know it’s going to be a lot to juggle being a leader of the caucus, running our own intense reelection campaign, and being a dad to our little ones, but ultimately I knew it was my duty to step up. Who needs sleep anyway? I'm excited to take this next step. Thanks for always being there with me, Josh

After so much bad news, it is exciting to have another good update: Recent returns in the red tossup seat have Democrat Adam Gray gaining ground in the pivotal CA-13 U.S House seat! Republican Rep. John Duarte led in the early count, but now as more votes have been counted across the district, Adam Gray is only 348 votes behind. This was one of our target seats to flip red-to-blue, and there is a path for Democrats winning! But we need to make sure we have the resources to count every single eligible vote. = = = = = = = Republicans have won control of the U.S. House, but because we are on track to flip seats here in California, there is a good chance that their margin will be even smaller than in 2022. That gives Democrats leverage to hold Donald Trump accountable and stop his most egregious policies. And with Trump appointing Republican Members of Congress to Administration posts — could even open the door to Democrats retaking the U.S. House simply by winning special elections over the next year. That’s why our focus is on counting every eligible vote in the uncalled U.S. House races across California. But we have gone way over budget helping voters correct ballot errors (aka ballot “curing”) and need your help to keep our operations running. = = Thank you, \- CADEM | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action. If this email was forwarded to you, We rely on email to communicate with supporters like you and conduct the business of the California Democratic Party, but if you wish to receive only our most important emails, And if you no longer wish to receive emails from the California Democratic Party, click here to . | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www.cadem.org California Democratic Party 1830 9th St Sacramento, CA 95811 United States

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: re: Matt Gaetz
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
One down.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2419%2E4032634%2ELCSyNy)
---
One down. Earlier today, Matt Gaetz withdrew himself from consideration to be Donald Trump’s next Attorney General. There’s no shortage of reasons why he should never have been an option for chief law enforcement officer of the United States. So many people raised so many alarm bells about his nomination. And now it’s over. I want you to remember this: Donald Trump’s word is not final. His plans are not inevitable. He can’t get every single thing he wants, and he can’t get every single Cabinet member of his dreams. We still have power when we raise our voices. I will keep calling out the rest of Donald Trump’s awful Cabinet choices. Like Robert F. Kennedy Jr. — who poses a danger to public health, scientific research, medicine, and health care coverage for millions as the nominee to be Secretary of Health and Human Services. He wants to stop parents from protecting their babies from measles and his ideas would welcome the return of polio. And Dr. Oz — a former daytime talk show host and a rich guy who doesn’t care if your health care costs go up, doesn’t care if an insurance company denies you coverage, and has no business running Medicare and Medicaid. And Linda McMahon — an unqualified, billionaire wrestling mogul whose selection to be Secretary of Education is an insult to our teachers and every kid who relies on a good public school education. And Howard Lutnick — a Wall Street CEO whose nomination to be Secretary of Commerce is a win for the billionaire class at the expense of working people. And Pete Hegseth — a Fox & Friends weekend co-host who is not qualified to be Secretary of Defense and would make us less safe and less respected. We might not be able to win every fight, but we can’t win if we don’t fight. During Trump’s first term, Senate Democrats gave no quarter to radical Trump nominees. We asked tough questions and held the Senate floor for hours to slow down confirmation and expose Republican extremism. These tactics doomed some nominations entirely, laid the groundwork for other cabinet officials to later resign in disgrace, and brought scrutiny that somewhat constrained Trump’s efforts. We’ve been down this road before — and I’m ready to go down it again. [**I will keep doing everything I can to fight back against Donald Trump and his allies’ devastating vision for our government and our nation. I know you’ve got lots of ways of staying involved too — and I never expect you to donate every time I ask — but if and only if it makes sense for you right now, please consider pitching in a donation to help keep up the fight.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2849?t=8&akid=2419%2E4032634%2ELCSyNy) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth

---

clean_body: Plus: Armstrong Redwoods expansion | November 21, 2024 | Good Education Students get a chance to explore, engage in hands-on science, or just sit quietly beneath an ancient tree, thanks to the League’s North Coast Education Program, which brings 1,200 students a year to local redwood parks. CEO Statement No matter the political environment, the League remains grounded in the critical work of protecting and restoring California’s redwood forests and ensuring that all people have access to these national treasures. Armstrong Ridge Protecting a 360-acre property that adjoins Armstrong Redwoods State Natural Reserve will buffer the old-growth grove from the threat of wildfire—and set the stage for a future expansion. Prop 4 Great news: Nearly 60% of California voters gave the thumbs up on Proposition 4! This means we just passed the largest natural resources bond in U.S. history, replenishing the state conservancy coffers in the nick of time. Gratitude practice From sheltering amazing animals to packing away carbon to improving our mental health, the big trees do so much that’s worthy of a shout-out this Thanksgiving. | | Instagram Post of the Month ---|--- IG: | IG: | IG: ---|--- Northern lights over Alder Creek! 🌌 These elusive lights danced in shifting arcs, shimmering ripples, and vibrant curtains behind the silhouettes of giant sequoias. Clear skies + a bit of luck = pure magic. Have you ever experienced this breathtaking phenomenon in the redwoods? 🌲✨ 📷 Adrianna Andreucci THE LEAGUE IN THE NEWS SFGate The Bakersfield Californian East Bay Times Support our work Connect with us | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | | Save the Redwoods League 111 Sutter Street, 11th Floor San Francisco, CA 94104 United States |

name: Team AOC
subject: Your support today can help a family in NYC this Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
This campaign is centered around building deep community 365 days a year.
#
Last Thanksgiving our campaign was able to distribute over 300 turkeys to families in NYC. This year, we’re hoping to double that number... and thanks to the generosity of this community, **we’re almost to our goal!**
This campaign is centered around building deep community — 365 days a year — and being there for our neighbors, which is why we’re partnering with NYC public housing developments, food pantries, and other local organizations on this turkey drive.
We’ve run the numbers and a contribution of **$15-20** provides a family with a turkey this holiday season who may not otherwise get to celebrate.
[Thanksgiving is in exactly one week–will you make a $5 contribution today to help us raise the funds we need to reach our goal of giving out 600 turkeys to families who need one this Thanksgiving?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20241121-turkeys.ACjd0M&refcode=em20241121-7626-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=7626%2E2526796%2ESqLA2l)
**[Contribute🥧 🍂](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20241121-turkeys.ACjd0M&refcode=em20241121-7626-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=7626%2E2526796%2ESqLA2l)**
On behalf of Alexandria and our entire team, we’re so grateful for your support and collaboration in our grassroots efforts.
With gratitude,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20241121-turkeys?refcode=em20241121-7626-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=3&refcode2=7626_2526796_SqLA2l&akid=7626%2E2526796%2ESqLA2l)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20241121-7626-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=4&akid=7626%2E2526796%2ESqLA2l)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=5&akid=7626%2E2526796%2ESqLA2l) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=6&akid=7626%2E2526796%2ESqLA2l) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=7&akid=7626%2E2526796%2ESqLA2l)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: Patti Reilly
subject: Help me save my son
body:
My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do.
Dear Peter,

If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.

She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars.

But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target.

She's also trying to lock my husband away for the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe.

**[Before I ask for your help, let me start at the beginning...](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ec784ed01030418bbf16fd4455cb3362&_e=T1nARa8ZYsAB1fn8ji_5WWA0fDmEkDcjLaoFOmo3Dc6WC9HLPa_NY91pcg_7Ed4avdEwf8HNlTtT5y0Edbo9-eXNcGmxoUIgtjU-QlmLWRoetIB_Tv7Uhfeo81U41YFBGxOQsluVUcHas5CjDQ3YkJfoyNdKCugF-BGc1IbokmxQXGluuOAwdNG0mP-EdFS6_Ob9c7rkEuVb6Yk10V4hydQRmEGkq0_Mv5gx7cfD79je3ITlK8vWFUDOEIjFi9Xduf-NMrR3OR2rv4iu-zoOnyOgb8gCRPlBpQFd-KdZfo_239S2QyTUeS72ZLgM5nFlxM4lga4mNZ0uAfHV-aZipbLUxgCuAR2xOsH2CRV9uBJDAitI_6wFt0i08BRBY-OHoRiAsvyZAPT5KzzImyXFhA%3D%3D)**

My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent.
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ec784ed01030418bbf16fd4455cb3362&_e=T1nARa8ZYsAB1fn8ji_5WWA0fDmEkDcjLaoFOmo3Dc6WC9HLPa_NY91pcg_7Ed4avdEwf8HNlTtT5y0Edbo9-eXNcGmxoUIgtjU-QlmLWRoetIB_Tv7Uhfeo81U41YFBGxOQsluVUcHas5CjDQ3YkJfoyNdKCugF-BGc1IbokmxQXGluuOAwdNG0mP-EdFS6_Ob9c7rkEuVb6Yk10V4hydQRmEGkq0_Mv5gx7cfD79je3ITlK8vWFUDOEIjFi9Xdn6pGIihgdLC6isGI3i33tw2n8sm1hDOkBTlDvdWSpRJreU0pJa0GYGxWQSURjqR_txfJoEqA-Txd1t6l4oFEha_2fqEwl96mAbCsxcNPI2yqtvovyASxZ1ZXeXvtA4csPIQwyVsglAWv2YH7bChFZg%3D%3D)
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... **_life in prison_** could be his reward.

Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex.

Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over.

My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate.

That's when it happened.

The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.

James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over.

With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly.

James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. **So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder!**

James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket!

We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer.

We couldn't have been more wrong.

You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband.

For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.

The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars!

Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with “MURDERER” scribbled across his face in red spray paint.

Now you understand why I'm so upset and why **[I'm turning to you for help.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ec784ed01030418bbf16fd4455cb3362&_e=T1nARa8ZYsAB1fn8ji_5WWA0fDmEkDcjLaoFOmo3Dc6WC9HLPa_NY91pcg_7Ed4avdEwf8HNlTtT5y0Edbo9-eXNcGmxoUIgtjU-QlmLWRoetIB_Tv7Uhfeo81U41YFBGxOQsluVUcHas5CjDQ3YkJfoyNdKCugF-BGc1IbokmxQXGluuOAwdNG0mP-EdFS6_Ob9c7rkEuVb6Yk10V4hydQRmEGkq0_Mv5gx7cfD79je3ITlK8vWFUDOEIjFi9Xdp9yMZjlVXc1nOyowuKB_xzr8xgvgwwVGohOOLRdifObskKsC5K7raXSFtSkrhV3-9pb-YtRp6fwjUXYd48B42jpRCuJzSr9NcvhwOZuEJM2CuZ679VgE6e9-oXd_gGuNPnxoHLmL_Qgcn2giLM8VHA%3D%3D)**

James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people.

He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down.

When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class.

My husband is _exactly_ the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.

But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She _knows_ what happened that night. She _knows_ James was in a life-or-death situation. She _knows_ that the charge should have been dropped years ago.

But Fani Willis doesn't care.

She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo.

James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished.

We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.

It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him.

By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.

My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case.

And it still hasn't been enough.

I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family.

Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... **And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF.**

If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James.

LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment.

And we _were_ at our lowest moment!

Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name.

That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone...

**[Could you send a contribution today to help defend James?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ec784ed01030418bbf16fd4455cb3362&_e=T1nARa8ZYsAB1fn8ji_5WWA0fDmEkDcjLaoFOmo3Dc6WC9HLPa_NY91pcg_7Ed4avdEwf8HNlTtT5y0Edbo9-eXNcGmxoUIgtjU-QlmLWRoetIB_Tv7Uhfeo81U41YFBGxOQsluVUcHas5CjDQ3YkJfoyNdKCugF-BGc1IbokmxQXGluuOAwdNG0mP-EdFS6_Ob9c7rkEuVb6Yk10V4hydQRmEGkq0_Mv5gx7cfD79je3ITlK8vWFUDOEIjFi9Xdr-_o37spq2582Mo_H3EyMcNI_GnNh4Sy5rPA1oDv-vHRnaQJQuyaSpVWWfmsluX2X9y909D0ZRqGp32lCCqO8m8RcVy0LvCE_6LKE2COlb-0mstOSnSWiAk5HS4D4_9zsHC7mkxexPl4L4sHZGiSvg%3D%3D)**

James' trial is scheduled for November. His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all.

clean_body: My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do. Dear Peter, If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason. She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars. But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target. She's also trying to lock my husband away for the rest of his life for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe. My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent. Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... life in prison could be his reward. Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex. Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over. My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate. That's when it happened. The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him. James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over. With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly. James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder! James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket! We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer. We couldn't have been more wrong. You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband. For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud. The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars! Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with “MURDERER” scribbled across his face in red spray paint. Now you understand why I'm so upset and why James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people. He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down. When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class. My husband is exactly the kind of man you want keeping your city safe. But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She knows what happened that night. She knows James was in a life-or-death situation. She knows that the charge should have been dropped years ago. But Fani Willis doesn't care. She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo. James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished. We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband. It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him. By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense. My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case. And it still hasn't been enough. I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family. Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF. If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment. And we were at our lowest moment! Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name. That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone... James' trial is scheduled for November. His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all. I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger. But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband. You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence. LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible. And it's your that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the rest of his life in prison. I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James. Sincerely, Jenna Burns P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family. More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visitwww.PoliceDefense.org. And remember -Blue Lives Matter! clean_body: | | | Peter, Donald Trump is turning his dangerous plans into action, and it's no surprise it comes directly from Project 2025. FIRST: Democrats and concerned citizens across the country raised alarm about Project 2025 , a 950-paged conservative playbook on how to take our country backwards written by several of Trump's closest allies. THEN: Trump lied to the American public and tried to deny his connection to the extremist agenda. NOW: Trump is nominating Project 2025 co-author Brendan Carr to lead the Federal Communications Commission. He is empowering the author of Project 2025's chapter on the FCC to run that very agency and make his words a reality in front of our very eyes. Nothing to do with Project 2025? He literally wrote the book on it. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you for doing your part, Kamala HQ | | | |

name: Oregon GOP
subject: Urgent: Join DEQ Meeting to Oppose Harmful Truck Regulation.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE OREGON REPUBLICAN PARTY (COMMITTEE ID 379) 187 HIGH ST
body:
Help Fight Against New Diesel Truck Ban in Oregon.

| | | | [ ](https://oregon.gop/)
---
| | Friend,
---
| | The Salem Area Chamber of Commerce is urging members to take**IMMEDIATE ACTION** against a potentially harmful regulation. The Oregon Department of Environmental Quality (DEQ) will review the Advanced Clean Truck (ACT) Rule **_TODAY, November 21st and tomorrow the 22nd._** **If not delayed or repealed, this rule will ban the sale of new diesel trucks and RVs in Oregon starting January 1, 2025. This includes popular models such as the Ford F-250, Ram 2500, and Chevy Silverado 2500.** _This regulation could severely impact local businesses, workers, and families by requiring electric versions of vehicles that are not yet widely available or affordable, disrupting industries that rely on diesel trucks._ **_Urgent: Attend the DEQ Meeting to Oppose This Rule!_** The DEQ will be reviewing this regulation at their meeting. **Your voice is crucial in opposing this rule.** We strongly encourage you to join the meeting and share your concerns during the public comment period. Now is the time to stand up and protect Oregon’s businesses and economy. For more details and to join the meeting, [**_click here. >>>_**](https://links.infooregongop.com/els/v2/20p9hdajq3ME/Rm1rSUQ3bSs2aUFMRjJLUUwvRDIvbWkzQjhLWDJkV1k4L0VwaXF6a3VuWWlTdVBkcE02cG9WT0VSQVkraXZEdWRuc0NGUTd3QS9pQWtvUXIvM2VCY3R5MFUwMEJucVlHVzF6UDEzQnQxOHM9S0/) Thank you for your immediate attention to this critical issue, Oregon Republican Party

name: Kristin Lyerly
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KRISTIN LYERLY FOR CONGRESS
body:
This may not have been the result we wanted, but I am so deeply grateful.
| | [To unsubscribe click here.

](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/z34FQfwYfUy93tutIJ7IUw2?unsubscribedata=ZOOuzWJDHWueeOo5wYlhkvxFE5JGT7RAfxTckwie0IcpyInOAXurCze0m2jOV2WqUMx62YAfZqXTF1WjFddGj%2BBLwfF5LEUs%2B1NJCueoqxxXsIaENAObNk2O8MWPN7D2PouOR4AM0qKg1MmbMZrN3tHhlBBxxgf63V6QT%2FCGv7YegYQZdICezx5mncgViibOl%2BuOadm4L79tkKUdp52z27qm3hl3V9v4jREPThHotcP5dDBgH9T9tsAfv7fSt3xw0q2NhjofXStthtBa9jv1AbEeyHJBLePfxYwqkJnwAZZosNDVvSVz%2Bc03ewec8FXVm4kjahFbVnAdEt9PMtHpqSELWp7FUGnxlD8KEA0v5xNueKjp%2FS7yc1j%2FZdG3%2FNq0ydcrCmM0NV3U%2FLsVlT2%2FFu3brMXZzXPTaiJhOi%2Fjd7lF7OFz1a%2BqmQ62GZ5n6y%2FN)
---
**From the bottom of my heart, thank you.**

This isn’t the result we wanted – but first and foremost, I want to tell you how grateful I am that you were part of the movement we built together.

We knew from the beginning that this would be a tough fight – but I’ve never shied away from tough fights. It’s why I became a doctor, why I fought to restore abortion access in Wisconsin, and it’s why I jumped into this race.

**And we have come so far.** Thousands of people in this district, throughout Wisconsin, and across the country sent donations, gave their time, and stood up to send a message that Wisconsin is done with right-wing extremism and with restrictions on our health care.

Despite forecasts saying this district would go Republican, we raised millions of dollars – not from wealthy special interests, but from grassroots donors like you who want to see a better future for all, who want to protect our most personal rights and freedoms. We reached thousands of voters who stood up to say that they’re with us.

**This is not the end of our fight.** I have been so proud to work with you to advocate for progress, and I don’t intend to stop doing that now.

We know that attacks on reproductive health care are going to keep coming – but we also know that we will be ready, and we will continue this work. Because I certainly don’t intend to stand by as politicians attempt to dictate the care I provide to patients.

I’m going to keep fighting for Wisconsin, and I hope you’ll join me.

Thank you.

Always –

Kristin
| PAID FOR BY KRISTIN LYERLY FOR CONGRESS
---
If you'd like to unsubscribe you can [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/z34FQfwYfUy93tutIJ7IUw2?unsubscribedata=ZOOuzWJDHWueeOo5wYlhkvxFE5JGT7RAfxTckwie0IcpyInOAXurCze0m2jOV2WqUMx62YAfZqXTF1WjFddGj%2BBLwfF5LEUs%2B1NJCueoqxxXsIaENAObNk2O8MWPN7D2PouOR4AM0qKg1MmbMZrN3tHhlBBxxgf63V6QT%2FCGv7YegYQZdICezx5mncgViibOl%2BuOadm4L79tkKUdp52z27qm3hl3V9v4jREPThHotcP5dDBgH9T9tsAfv7fSt3xw0q2NhjofXStthtBa9jv1AbEeyHJBLePfxYwqkJnwAZZosNDVvSVz%2Bc03ewec8FXVm4kjahFbVnAdEt9PMtHpqSELWp7FUGnxlD8KEA0v5xNueKjp%2FS7yc1j%2FZdG3%2FNq0ydcrCmM0NV3U%2FLsVlT2%2FFu3brMXZzXPTaiJhOi%2Fjd7lF7OFz1a%2BqmQ62GZ5n6y%2FN)

name: Conservative Direct
subject: Discover Blueprint for America: Free Online Course
body:
How much do you know about the policies safeguarding our nation’s freedom and prosperity?

| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=f5ed58079e794ff3a4eb2e1555df11d7&_e=59vt7WmyU11rMA0ieaXYvoFiUkJnKk24pplkldAt0ZdrVjCjF43Y849YRhoTFLExskI1WsTpsdBAdkNXAXyIzTx0ZfIkHXz_fj98Wc28aoMTnEgQnit7gVzG397v3cD8YWGZCJe4hOqyz-unnwtrkwGxWY51YRJuKqb7KHPOo9RsuPB4e1PQtWWxQ9EdIBTUqhQI8Vo1EHDvaK8CNDekoovjk1uohm0Ai3LeOzD94mh-xU0anJIgzH5x20wmIiDnrKIHcz9kT7_DRF_gbD3UajC1EzF-jcuyyhsy6bZh57O7DhGC0qPzBa9Fz1XPtwi0nKJNxe3YDFfTEHo5Kd5_tFQ68ovk4uUlqHdy2WMnSARuVy9aIwziHJfgbq8uDe92DqjHDPSVr8idmtG1GxgeCQ%3D%3D)

---
Dear Friend, How much do you know about the policies safeguarding our nation's freedom and prosperity?

To help bridge the gap between experts and everyday citizens, we created a new course called **Blueprint for America**. This free course is based on a volume of essays edited by George P. Shultz, Ronald Reagan's Secretary of State. It features Hoover Institution research that breaks down critical policies--from tax reform and healthcare to national security--into easy-to-understand modules.

**Blueprint for America** will help deepen your understanding of the policies that make our country strong and prosperous. The course aims to help people understand the fundamental principles of a free society and how they can be applied to ensure America's continued success.

By taking this course, you'll gain valuable insights and be better equipped to engage in informed discussions about our nation's future.

**You can register for the Blueprint for America course for free right here:** [https://resources.hoover.org/blueprint-for-america-activate/](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=f5ed58079e794ff3a4eb2e1555df11d7&_e=59vt7WmyU11rMA0ieaXYvoFiUkJnKk24pplkldAt0ZdrVjCjF43Y849YRhoTFLExskI1WsTpsdBAdkNXAXyIzTx0ZfIkHXz_fj98Wc28aoMTnEgQnit7gVzG397v3cD8YWGZCJe4hOqyz-unnwtrkwGxWY51YRJuKqb7KHPOo9RsuPB4e1PQtWWxQ9EdIBTUqhQI8Vo1EHDvaK8CNDekoovjk1uohm0Ai3LeOzD94mh-xU0anJIgzH5x20wmIiDnSUFWoynTau-X-_THwAUSSbKvD95_EDbEfTog5f3QerX6YOAaNt_j8s5t_hkyLR_RQBiEKEYM1eMOmtMnlSk76Xh1HKuGnVefB5wkTbhdYRkqF5Ux2yh20j17Zhoiz7ocviMD6vduiSZe9vfuQ4iWpQ%3D%3D)
| |
Thank you,

Greg Greg Stamps | Online Development Hoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover 's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._
---

[Unsubscribe from all communications](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=f5ed58079e794ff3a4eb2e1555df11d7&_t=RTl149YZNMwlwXUu8G2H5oHCjPZgBiYRbuzn6YTrMRBv10Mybd5N7Pgh-Gs90LDtESb9j3fkKRCWMUkaWc1yJqj3AmTimQ3VxxRknF0rFGJ5pbBCL5z7-4XCB9x3my4H). _ _ _ _

name: Israel on Campus Coalition
subject: A quick moment of prayer
body:
| | | | [](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=69456712f80048f6b0d99480f95c2d0a&_e=aWqdsOrQqdroAA-8Rtk_Qxfktv95-0dokHNgbTUB3MmHd5koqDDpsj1pfVr2Y5smCElldDb2Sm3ATkhUJfEdrLcfMBDBYhUS8Cp3PeI5vsWZyqzy6xYD__CSRK0N8PMFP38Nl-qibV2nr3ip-l0bhW2m_5qSk519ZqozLxoiau_w1oAv2Jt3WQ1YMnyBfURE3x7YwmoqMOQ_GrRStg3901L16FZEStAJha5VwmoXNV-SWJvWop-NSNBkEPRdRTm5TY9wIWGsTj_LT1zXXJpgrrRwsIcOayq_NCcDtdsjkCD48OVVN49iKujiNZmj0zVvbhSvIVS3mRLWLCCNvW6O19S-lQ9KfSrchkKSQqf-VvAyh3AODMCOq85IaHvjMJOLaXrgbMxjwfhxm75VH1rY_A%3D%3D)
---
| | Peter,
You know what can really make a difference in the lives of so many members of the Jewish community who are attacked and excluded at their college campuses? Prayer and support.
We're reaching out to you at a time when our prayers, and genuine support for our students, can truly make a difference. Israel is facing a crisis with a war raging in their backyard. Innocent civilians are at risk, and the safety of the nation is threatened. In these challenging times, no one needs our prayers more than Jewish and pro-Israel students on campus.
---
[PRAY FOR ISRAEL](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=69456712f80048f6b0d99480f95c2d0a&_e=aWqdsOrQqdroAA-8Rtk_Qxfktv95-0dokHNgbTUB3MmHd5koqDDpsj1pfVr2Y5smCElldDb2Sm3ATkhUJfEdrLcfMBDBYhUS8Cp3PeI5vsWZyqzy6xYD__CSRK0N8PMFP38Nl-qibV2nr3ip-l0bhW2m_5qSk519ZqozLxoiau_w1oAv2Jt3WQ1YMnyBfURE3x7YwmoqMOQ_GrRStg3901L16FZEStAJha5VwmoXNV-SWJvWop-NSNBkEPRdRTm5900VbVj_jvjMU10AVNCeCEzgnK4olehfj5W4xw5c43kunImn-_NmaKPyBDOSxysIe9uCjJVQ5MonHlpamjDLEosvJx1qFHcpGEELLVsrCX-9ccxn0x6HMeLRG3otLTEOGfk6GOiVSBFrKxjUd0f1Gg%3D%3D)

It's a small act of kindness, but we urge you to take a moment to pray for our students. **[They need all of the support they can get from us-- will you take a moment to pray for our Jewish and pro-Israel students?](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=69456712f80048f6b0d99480f95c2d0a&_e=aWqdsOrQqdroAA-8Rtk_Qxfktv95-0dokHNgbTUB3MmHd5koqDDpsj1pfVr2Y5smCElldDb2Sm3ATkhUJfEdrLcfMBDBYhUS8Cp3PeI5vsWZyqzy6xYD__CSRK0N8PMFP38Nl-qibV2nr3ip-l0bhW2m_5qSk519ZqozLxoiau_w1oAv2Jt3WQ1YMnyBfURE3x7YwmoqMOQ_GrRStg3901L16FZEStAJha5VwmoXNV-SWJvWop-NSNBkEPRdRTm5rhua6Hmxbiuv4rvlg3nCLh4ZsJBhJk6ydrCC2vCFlil2PhVxyAxjI_KWS3FxFSvAGfG1jB5zK68Fvw5J4RniWU2a1ZSTw4vvdX9F4zOXmcYSkrme8aGORIGdVjKRHyC7hywCHwRJWmB11jVVcRA76A%3D%3D)**
Thank you, Israel on Campus Coalition

body:
We deserve to know what’s in this report.
| Folks, we’re FURIOUS! [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/gaetzreport/?source=VPP_20241121_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=6&akid=18085%2E878179%2E9zEvte) The American people _DESERVE_ to know _to what extent_ Matt Gaetz broke the law!

**[If we can get 15,000 Democrats to sign our petition DEMANDING Congress release the Gaetz report, we can END his career! QUICK: ADD YOUR NAME »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/gaetzreport/?source=VPP_20241121_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=7&akid=18085%2E878179%2E9zEvte)** | [**ADD YOUR NAME: DEMAND THE RELEASE OF THE GAETZ REPORT »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/gaetzreport/?source=VPP_20241121_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=8&akid=18085%2E878179%2E9zEvte)
---
**Here’s the run-down on Matt Gaetz:**

He was a member of the far-right Freedom Caucus ❌
He’s a friend of alt-right Holocaust deniers and White Nationalists ❌
He was investigated for sex trafficking and having relationships with minors ❌
And Trump still wants him to serve in his administration! ❌

Due to his resignation from Congress, the House Ethics committee is no longer required to release their report on the latest investigation about him... _but the American people deserve better!_

**[Republicans are doing everything they can to keep this report classified. That’s why we need your help: Demand the release of the Matt Gaetz report! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/gaetzreport/?source=VPP_20241121_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=9&akid=18085%2E878179%2E9zEvte)**

name: NDRC HQ
subject: Big (and terrific) news on the NC Supreme Court race:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
Justice Allison Riggs has now declared victory!
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97467931/513544137/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgyM2NmZjJjLTZkYTgtZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZifQmsxVSobL59YN_-8l13-vGT4oBlAGOhmNDgt4uEE=&emci=0f202df8-59a8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=823cff2c-6da8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=8431045)
---

Big update from North Carolina, Peter: Now that counties have certified their results, and with recount numbers so far lining up with the original count, **Justice Allison Riggs declared victory in her race for the state supreme court! ** This is a huge win for North Carolinians. We threw our full support behind Justice Riggs in this election because she’s a fair-minded champion of every American’s fundamental rights, including voting rights. And over the past few weeks, we’ve supported efforts to make sure every voter’s voice was heard. Let’s continue working to elect Democracy Defenders across the country (there’s a state supreme court race in Wisconsin in just 131 days!) — [**chip in to help power that work.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97467932/513544138/1464966451?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_AllisonRiggsRRTopper_email_20241121-NDRC-Tier1-AllisonRiggsRRTopper_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20241121-NDRC-Tier1-AllisonRiggsRRTopper_&utm_campaign=AllisonRiggsRRTopper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgyM2NmZjJjLTZkYTgtZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZifQmsxVSobL59YN_-8l13-vGT4oBlAGOhmNDgt4uEE=) Thank you for being the kind of Democrat who invests in critical state-level races like these. It makes a real difference. \- Team NDRC \-------------------------Forwarded Message-------------------------
From: Team NDRC <info@democraticredistricting.com>
Date: Wed, Nov 20, 2024
Subject: Update: The NC Supreme Court race is headed to a recount
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Hi Peter, North Carolina was one of our key electoral priorities this cycle, and one of the most critical races there — for the state supreme court — is now going into a recount. We endorsed Justice Allison Riggs for the North Carolina Supreme Court because she has proven to be a fair-minded and independent voice on the court. She is a tenacious civil rights attorney who has been a champion of every American’s fundamental rights, including voting rights. **She leads her opponent by just over 700 votes — out of more than 5.5 million total ballots cast.** We knew that major state-level races this year could come down to just a few hundred votes, so everything this team does can make a real difference. And this is an important reminder that our work fighting for a fair democracy is far from over. In fact, given the extreme MAGA Republicans who will be leading the federal government, our work at the state level is more important than ever before. The NDRC is supporting count and cure campaigns on the ground in North Carolina while also gearing up for the next phase of our 10 Year Plan. [**Will you chip in right now to support the ongoing work the NDRC will do to fight for fair maps champions like Justice Allison Riggs?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97467933/513544139/1464966451?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_AllisonRiggsRRTopper_email_20241121-NDRC-Tier1-AllisonRiggsRRTopper_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20241121-NDRC-Tier1-AllisonRiggsRRTopper_&utm_campaign=AllisonRiggsRRTopper&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgyM2NmZjJjLTZkYTgtZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZifQmsxVSobL59YN_-8l13-vGT4oBlAGOhmNDgt4uEE=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

The Republican majority on the North Carolina Supreme Court has already had a massive impact on the state: The court removed constitutional guardrails on extreme partisan gerrymandering, brought back a voter ID law, and disenfranchised people with felony convictions.
Justice Allison Riggs’s reelection will ensure that critical pro-democracy leadership remains a force on this massively influential court — and we’ll avoid adding yet another extreme partisan voice to the court.
We need to do everything we can to get pro-democracy candidates in seats at the state level, to hold the line against extreme Republicans and their Project 2025 policies. **[We may be down, but we’re certainly not out. Are you with us?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97467940/513544146/1464966451?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_AllisonRiggsRRTopper_email_20241121-NDRC-Tier1-AllisonRiggsRRTopper_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20241121-NDRC-Tier1-AllisonRiggsRRTopper_&utm_campaign=AllisonRiggsRRTopper&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgyM2NmZjJjLTZkYTgtZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZifQmsxVSobL59YN_-8l13-vGT4oBlAGOhmNDgt4uEE=)**

clean_body: Justice Allison Riggs has now declared victory! | Big update from North Carolina, Peter: Now that counties have certified their results, and with recount numbers so far lining up with the original count, Justice Allison Riggs declared victory in her race for the state supreme court! This is a huge win for North Carolinians. We threw our full support behind Justice Riggs in this election because she’s a fair-minded champion of every American’s fundamental rights, including voting rights. And over the past few weeks, we’ve supported efforts to make sure every voter’s voice was heard. Let’s continue working to elect Democracy Defenders across the country (there’s a state supreme court race in Wisconsin in just 131 days!) — = Thank you for being the kind of Democrat who invests in critical state-level races like these. It makes a real difference. \- Team NDRC \-------------------------Forwarded Message------------------------- From: Team NDRC <info@democraticredistricting.com> Date: Wed, Nov 20, 2024 Subject: Update: The NC Supreme Court race is headed to a recount To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Hi Peter, North Carolina was one of our key electoral priorities this cycle, and one of the most critical races there — for the state supreme court — is now going into a recount. We endorsed Justice Allison Riggs for the North Carolina Supreme Court because she has proven to be a fair-minded and independent voice on the court. She is a tenacious civil rights attorney who has been a champion of every American’s fundamental rights, including voting rights. She leads her opponent by just over 700 votes — out of more than 5.5 million total ballots cast. We knew that major state-level races this year could come down to just a few hundred votes, so everything this team does can make a real difference. And this is an important reminder that our work fighting for a fair democracy is far from over. In fact, given the extreme MAGA Republicans who will be leading the federal government, our work at the state level is more important than ever before. The NDRC is supporting count and cure campaigns on the ground in North Carolina while also gearing up for the next phase of our 10 Year Plan. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = The Republican majority on the North Carolina Supreme Court has already had a massive impact on the state: The court removed constitutional guardrails on extreme partisan gerrymandering, brought back a voter ID law, and disenfranchised people with felony convictions. body:
There are still a few House races that still remain uncalled and in recount battles. These races are incredibly close, some by just a few hundred votes. We have teams on the ground ensuring every ballot is counted and cured.

| Peter, there are still a few House races that still remain uncalled and in recount battles.

These races are incredibly close, some by just a few hundred votes. We have teams on the ground ensuring every ballot is counted and cured.

**But, this work is expensive, and we can’t do it without your help.[_Will you split a donation now with Fight for Progress and these three recount funds so we can continue this important work?_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97468724/513549516/-1435857143?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-11-21_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM5ZmU4NTRmLTZlYTgtZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=NjhraCNxObEBjGwMNMW9qwPcyH9wEqhtL80vy5L7bqk=)**

name: Larry P. Arnn
subject: Something is seriously wrong in our nation’s schools
body:
Marxist Hijacking?

_**A message from our sponsor...**_ | | | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=5d1a6e993a9a425ab919ea5e17d5c07d&_e=0Ti-Yu18mNWdoYo5I-pVO6qnn0UnQ-Gm70YyKlo5aiSW6GAKLKdnbj1VwxBmWk1LAZgPJdoUp5_2poelgsbFP343QGEBLJMJb8PZGOSGVk1KomLZ3BWklbpeYsvRcHPZXLqSP748sJDP2fgg-0Yk9mSV19x2GExUFITrT-CdzB12OENHKi8yBNHajEm_n5b1eJj-ve_6mflVr8e-svpaPsVObsFWCzj0XdwkqAR-U-58J3FF2x5ZInwJAbJlMGW1GNRJ-C5QQXGwANUBR8xtgbm3gsrnzWmZa7xrKAYJ1Y_4FQ7URUwqXFcd2cLF_pymDUcaM9M9Q7KT5yNJHtggUqmI-cNENRncwQTcSOFutxekVDlZj2n3br3SmXKwfXysJow1yi7OayXBW161gKFjqsrAVKX3Kqvd2_DVMk3UZ_D7RmQB9FnSuYmp4uSK8Flr)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

My name is Larry P. Arnn, and I serve as president of Hillsdale College. I'm writing to you today because you're a concerned American who keeps up with current events.

That means you know something is seriously wrong in too many of our nation's schools.

You understand that a fierce ideological battle is raging in classrooms nationwide, and our children are at risk.

**This is no accident.**

The far-Left, guided by a Marxist vision of a radically transformed society, has strategically targeted education, including K-12 classrooms across America.

That's why I'm asking you to complete the [**NATIONAL OPINION SURVEY ON THE MARXIST HIJACKING OF AMERICAN EDUCATION**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=5d1a6e993a9a425ab919ea5e17d5c07d&_e=0Ti-Yu18mNWdoYo5I-pVO6qnn0UnQ-Gm70YyKlo5aiSW6GAKLKdnbj1VwxBmWk1LAZgPJdoUp5_2poelgsbFP343QGEBLJMJb8PZGOSGVk1KomLZ3BWklbpeYsvRcHPZXLqSP748sJDP2fgg-0Yk9mSV19x2GExUFITrT-CdzB12OENHKi8yBNHajEm_n5b1eJj-ve_6mflVr8e-svpaPsVObsFWCzj0XdwkqAR-U-58J3FF2x5ZInwJAbJlMGW1GNRJ-C5QQXGwANUBR8xtgbm3gsrnzWmZa7xrKAYJ1Y8goXxJMbKv37zECGNh1eZyeTV_xDhFpTZyTuyN9DwEC9zOq7zvJljHmVgV92_SLB9RAqA5b00dwjn-vh_j-slfFFgOQRS0SyX8KkapKV0AlnBIFbmFlyjQGXImxEa59ifFqe1Ubm2ZOgTPkOKcFeTM).

You can complete your survey at this secure link:

[https://info.hillsdale.edu/marxist-hijacking-of-american-education-survey](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=5d1a6e993a9a425ab919ea5e17d5c07d&_e=0Ti-Yu18mNWdoYo5I-pVO6qnn0UnQ-Gm70YyKlo5aiSW6GAKLKdnbj1VwxBmWk1LAZgPJdoUp5_2poelgsbFP343QGEBLJMJb8PZGOSGVk1KomLZ3BWklbpeYsvRcHPZXLqSP748sJDP2fgg-0Yk9mSV19x2GExUFITrT-CdzB12OENHKi8yBNHajEm_n5b1eJj-ve_6mflVr8e-svpaPsVObsFWCzj0XdwkqAR-U-58J3FF2x5ZInwJAbJlMGW1GNRJ-C5QQXGwANUBR8xtgbm3gsrnzWmZa7xrKAYJ1Y8a0ZjeV5yCideFi9YrfRSkUJPokNT9NJwf8wqtgNwzO63l3q1GLX8q_ebpxdCZKE7Gjbwc55QXBO4XwVpxA9qrPQGyM_OUswuyPAT3E_8NU7YH4FGiAmem3ElAGl_vPmneL2YWdVw73XvcuF7XCfUt)

**Your participation right now could not be more urgent.**

Hearing directly from informed Americans like you will be a great help to us, as well as to policymakers and opinion leaders at all levels.

**You may be shocked by the extreme and false ideas being taught in far too many schools today, such as ...**
* _America was founded on slavery, not freedom, and is systematically racist to this day._

* _White supremacy was woven into America at its founding._

* _Capitalism and free enterprise are sources of poverty and injustice._

* _Americans are not equal citizens but instead belong to one of two groups: “oppressors” or “oppressed.”_

* _There is a variety of genders, and gender is changeable._

* _Free speech is dangerous, and speech labeled as “misinformation” should be censored._

These are radical and anti-American ideas. So, it comes as no surprise that recent surveys show that younger citizens are increasingly drawn to socialism, anarchy, transgenderism, and other destructive ideologies.

**You may think the situation is hopeless. But there is something we can do together to turn the tide.**

Hillsdale College is leading a bold teaching effort to confront these false ideas on the battlefield of education. Since our founding in 1844, we have offered "sound learning" of the kind needed to preserve "the inestimable blessings ... of civil and religious liberty."

We're committed to providing young Americans with a proper grounding in American civics through our **SAVE AMERICAN EDUCATION CAMPAIGN**.

Our **SAVE AMERICAN EDUCATION CAMPAIGN** features free online courses, opening and guiding K-12 classical schools, _Imprimis_ --our free digest of liberty--and other educational outreach programs. The goal is to counter the spread of radical and anti-American ideas in our education system.

To help us do this, we would like to know what you and other informed Americans think about the radical agenda of the far-Left, which is pushed in K-12 schools, colleges and universities, businesses, government, and even the U.S. military.

So please help us today by [taking your personalized survey--](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=5d1a6e993a9a425ab919ea5e17d5c07d&_e=0Ti-Yu18mNWdoYo5I-pVO6qnn0UnQ-Gm70YyKlo5aiSW6GAKLKdnbj1VwxBmWk1LAZgPJdoUp5_2poelgsbFP343QGEBLJMJb8PZGOSGVk1KomLZ3BWklbpeYsvRcHPZXLqSP748sJDP2fgg-0Yk9mSV19x2GExUFITrT-CdzB12OENHKi8yBNHajEm_n5b1eJj-ve_6mflVr8e-svpaPsVObsFWCzj0XdwkqAR-U-58J3FF2x5ZInwJAbJlMGW1GNRJ-C5QQXGwANUBR8xtgbm3gsrnzWmZa7xrKAYJ1Y-PETuuqcLoyvG8HXEpxzfkgj6qGjCX31GFyQXb7T5x0_UsjeOdz5dh1-sjgCBkmwb_fqpIA9ih0Sr0T3FJdSrmb_Aojd6EOwoe4ajCHf7TuStk4fuX7WXclKatB1KljlaPBFWJB62wy8dGZfCt1c9s)your answers will help to guide our **SAVE AMERICAN EDUCATION CAMPAIGN** , which promotes informed patriotism by educating young Americans.

I firmly believe, and I hope you agree, that a proper education--the kind of education that Hillsdale provides--is the key to preserving American liberty for our children and grandchildren.

At a time when the far-Left explicitly rejects the principles of America's founding--and seeks to expel those principles from our civic life and our major institutions--there is only one way to save America: EDUCATION.

Together, we can fight back with the truth.

Thank you for your time, and thank you in advance for your survey responses.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

P.S. We need to hear from informed patriots like you about the state of American education. Hillsdale College is leading a bold teaching effort to confront the false ideas of critical race theory, transgenderism, and socialism on the battlefield of education with our **SAVE AMERICAN EDUCATION CAMPAIGN**. But today, we need your help!

Will you let us know what you think by taking our **National Opinion Survey on the Marxist Hijacking of American Education**? The survey will take only a few minutes of your time and will help us to defend liberty against radical ideologies.

**You can take your survey at the secure link below:**

[https://info.hillsdale.edu/marxist-hijacking-of-american-education-survey](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=5d1a6e993a9a425ab919ea5e17d5c07d&_e=0Ti-Yu18mNWdoYo5I-pVO6qnn0UnQ-Gm70YyKlo5aiSW6GAKLKdnbj1VwxBmWk1LAZgPJdoUp5_2poelgsbFP343QGEBLJMJb8PZGOSGVk1KomLZ3BWklbpeYsvRcHPZXLqSP748sJDP2fgg-0Yk9mSV19x2GExUFITrT-CdzB12OENHKi8yBNHajEm_n5b1eJj-ve_6mflVr8e-svpaPsVObsFWCzj0XdwkqAR-U-58J3FF2x5ZInwJAbJlMGW1GNRJ-C5QQXGwANUBR8xtgbm3gsrnzWmZa7xrKAYJ1Y8P9Gutb3Qbu05VSULHlOjFbx6w_bFse30swQfmmZPErDQul7FwHuarFHsh7FUfCdil_UOfki1DmhLDwSjxpZJhhfnFQSRSIjMuz_UtCoi_3b7xg7CBK8LuPxrKSXU26f2YKXCkiizKw0ju4HWS34hm)
---
| [Unsubscribe](http://links.g4yamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_s=5d1a6e993a9a425ab919ea5e17d5c07d&_t=Vndk67tf6FgfvY-Zyfjn5-fu2vHRaibfJzzgWWbFnWfXuf7AtODxet6NCd84Ti8E-ExUqSJ4SoWm_IWDtaOXpIXr9kNUM83Ws9ooUzQfy6FvrsLmA1Yn93wWuojEwmaX)

name: Mike Lee
subject: I want to send you a book
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Libertas Institute
body:
This is unlike anything I’ve written you.

*|MC_PREVIEW_TEXT|* |
---
| | [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z5juvnk9tjibbk5hv1b9ma79gotlen37i005cnio_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9hm6o36cph2bs "Tuttle Twins")
Friend,

This is unlike anything I’ve written you. It may seem long but I have to explain to you why I’m optimistic for the future of our nation, and If you stay with me here, then I will even deliver you a book.

Let’s start by showing where our education system currently stands:
[](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zb5r2u96p9haoll4b2ajf18mgopt38muehisccr0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9hm6o36cph2bs)
See the bright red line?

That’s the growth of administrative staff... aka woke administrators who enforce D.E.I., CRT, and other nonsense onto our kids. Ever hear the phrase “Go woke. Go broke.” That’s our educational system.

Fortunately, there is a solution that is turning the tide to educate our country’s youth against the dangers of socialism and teach young people about the ideas of liberty.

And this is why I’m optimistic. Because there are students standing up.

The solution? _The Tuttle Twins_.

_The Tuttle Twins_ teaches kids about free markets, individual liberty, limited government, and personal responsibility.

And it’s working...

Before I give you real stories of students fighting back, I must first ask how you can help. My personal friend Connor Boyack is the author of _The Tuttle Twins_. He is on a mission to distribute an additional 1,000,000 copies of the books.

[I am humbly asking you to help me raise $50,000 to distribute copies of The Tuttle Twins to schools, libraries, and families. It costs roughly $10 to distribute one copy. Can you chip in $10, $20, $40, or even $200 today?](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zfuulpus48r7j228oaib6rbo5fqq6o4mvveaaqo0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9hm6o36cph2bs)

**As a special offer, if you donate $40 or more, my friend Connor will send you _The Tuttle Twins Learn About The Law_.**
[Donate 1 _Tuttle Twins_ book for $20 >>>](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zfpj5smdqed3bp3v0mbso5q2e273l59de0m6gng0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9hm6o36cph2bs)

[Donate 2 _Tuttle Twins_ books for $40 >>>](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zudp34mi3oelqq67i9tkgrfj1b2fe8r5ua6nmelo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9hm6o36cph2bs)

[Donate 3 _Tuttle Twins_ books for $60 >>>](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z9lh25ieb79aps2peochmrdphdbhg57sid1n9sq0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9hm6o36cph2bs)

[Donate 5 _Tuttle Twins_ books for $100 >>>](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zplcpk1m66caa792f5nns8nqqi33mq5sjr55mpgg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9hm6o36cph2bs)

[Donate 10 _Tuttle Twins_ books for $200 >>>](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zme56ori91pb2ve78nguppp5k45h4gbk763ic01o_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9hm6o36cph2bs)

[Donate 25 _Tuttle Twins_ books for $500 >>>](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z02lqrime633uvrc9jpkrbgirvt40ol09ljmofu0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9hm6o36cph2bs)

[Donate 100 _Tuttle Twins_ books for $1,000 >>>](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z613g2cae82j3cgcdihtccpgdg5sqr12eu9pnmr8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9hm6o36cph2bs)

[Donate Any Amount >>>](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zeg5bs5h08g41gnh5d979afusnpb0laev3fhj9vg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9hm6o36cph2bs)
Here’s my favorite example of _The Tuttle Twins_ inspiring the next generation:

A public school in Colorado kicked Jaiden out of class. His crime? He wore a Gadsden flag patch on his backpack.
[](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z8i0j94csvjibts36bj4ovmfugmf5b35fg4h0e0g_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9hm6o36cph2bs)
The director at Vanguard School, where Jaiden attends, believed that this historical flag has “origins with slavery” and was “disruptive to the classroom environment.” He told Jaiden’s mother that the boy could not return to class unless the patch was removed.

Jaiden refused to remove the patch. Good for him!

In an emergency meeting, the school board voted to allow Jaiden to wear the patch. That was a quick victory!

Jaiden is a special kid. He stands up for his beliefs. More importantly, he stands up for the truth. As his mom explained to me, he’s been reading the Tuttle Twins books for years and learning about freedom. Then, it came time for him to do something about it.

**What if we could teach an entire generation to be like Jaiden?**

_We can._

[Your support today can distribute copies of The Tuttle Twins to schools, libraries, and families. If you donate $40 or more, you’ll receive a copy of The Tuttle Twins for your own family.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zgg4odfp82atgbfrn7o3q928svig1ch0krdsga7g_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9hm6o36cph2bs)
[Donate 1 _Tuttle Twins_ book for $20 >>>](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zinq7url4t5anjb5s0u6c3mnatoi87ihncifk18o_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9hm6o36cph2bs)

[Donate 2 _Tuttle Twins_ books for $40 >>>](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zlnkn7i2hd29080cttbpatci81l894irecjtnon8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9hm6o36cph2bs)

[Donate 3 _Tuttle Twins_ books for $60 >>>](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2za236cftis2nvgp74iok48vr1784vf3h4veb8ujo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9hm6o36cph2bs)

[Donate 5 _Tuttle Twins_ books for $100 >>>](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z5um9rvd80hqep95o2lsb5n8us7e3h9iblqob0ko_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9hm6o36cph2bs)

[Donate 10 _Tuttle Twins_ books for $200 >>>](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zksa360k3288ckkm3fbs0act6a76ttia7mj1tap8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9hm6o36cph2bs)

[Donate 25 _Tuttle Twins_ books for $500 >>>](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zr73ruh9b6ges78gifilaafe8eno0mftgb06cifg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9hm6o36cph2bs)

[Donate 100 _Tuttle Twins_ books for $1,000 >>>](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2ztquanr1dfi95o0grpqf4dbtu5d986l3oelo7usg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9hm6o36cph2bs)

[Donate Any Amount >>>](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z2sgdkcdkkg7nfaej8nrsi9mdvbp332o66lh6sio_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9hm6o36cph2bs)
If Congress had read _The Tuttle Twins_ as kids, I bet we wouldn’t be bankrupting our country and giving the Deep State warrantless spying!

The time to start building the future is now, and your support is critical to our mission.

Thank you.

Mike Lee

P.S. I’ve included a heartwarming letter below from a kid who was also inspired by The Tuttle Twins. This is how we can change the future.

[If you donate $30 or more, then you’ll receive a copy of _The Tuttle Twins_. Click here to give >>](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zdfcs4uiibf9tln71v3j5f2g0oqujnfjf8bfre8o_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9hm6o36cph2bs)
[](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z36aj5d8e7d9r33lnq9lj3bqe0rt6gi4bu0q41o8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9hm6o36cph2bs) Paid for by Libertas Institute
---

Update For America

name: Anthony D'Esposito
subject: Hochul’s Congestion Con
body:
Peter, Here we go again—Governor Hochul is stabbing New Yorkers in the back. Right after the election, she’s reviving her disastrous Congestion Pricing plan—a total scam to punish hardworking families and commuters who vote Republican. HELP ME FIGHT → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=first+button&utm_campaign=Hochuls+Congestion+Con+Email]

It’s a disgrace. Hochul promised to protect us, but like all radical Democrats, she’s breaking her word the second she thinks no one’s watching.

This isn’t just another tax—it’s an attack on YOU, the people who keep Long Island running, and they think they can get away with it.

I’m fighting back because this plan is WRONG, it’s UNFAIR, and it’s going to destroy our way of life. But I need your help to stop it. Albany isn’t going to change unless we hit back hard.

Chip in $15, $25, or even $50 today so we can take this fight straight to them. Together, we’ll send a loud, clear message: WE’RE NOT TAKING IT. [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=link&utm_campaign=Hochuls+Congestion+Con+Email]

CHIP IN $10 → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?amount=10&utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=amount+button&utm_campaign=Hochuls+Congestion+Con+Email] CHIP IN $25 → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?amount=25&utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=amount+button&utm_campaign=Hochuls+Congestion+Con+Email] CHIP IN $50 → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?amount=50&utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=amount+button&utm_campaign=Hochuls+Congestion+Con+Email] CHIP IN $100 → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?amount=100&utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=amount+button&utm_campaign=Hochuls+Congestion+Con+Email] CHIP IN $250 → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?amount=250&utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=amount+button&utm_campaign=Hochuls+Congestion+Con+Email] ANY AMOUNT → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=other+button&utm_campaign=Hochuls+Congestion+Con+Email]

We won’t let Hochul and her radical allies steamroll Long Island. They want to play political games? Fine.

But we’re going to hit back harder, fight smarter, and WIN.

Let’s do this,

Anthony

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Brand-new prophecy resources
body:
Take a moment to look around.

| | | [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zepmd3uv95ag03sosntnbs0npidit00u2c94ouk0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9hm9or2cdh2bs)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z04f949jfuudlreal6pnuijpcpc3jee34245cp80_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9hm9or2cdh2bs)I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.

Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z5pdrh5vd9eppcgf03m05ahkl4d3m0ut56hee43g_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9hm9or2cdh2bs)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____
---
| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

Real American Reporting
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zkskg5f75fhtfpuvb1vu4h96rkmpepm013n9hm90_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjk9qj8cdk6mqj4t5m6gpr4t9geup72t5jmspqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4cphm8pj1cdh238h1e8he4937cph64or4sdh66oh5u)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z9kthg2kmuq6l5ttsan4goihm71pkvl045t1f900_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9hm9or2cdh2bs)_

[](http://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zi093cuc572ovj1uc5vs92fpe61qfatlc20ekfso_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9hm9or2cdh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

subject: Claim your Hillsdale College Calendar
body:
This calendar is a small thank-you gift for everyone who helps our efforts

This sponsored message from First Look News is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zrs76pu7888j3i082pd0lc8o408vvv6jcqelb3v0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9hm9or2cdh2bs)

I'm reaching out to you today because I'd like to send you your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar**.

I know, I know. It's a little early to be thinking about 2025. But since you're someone who cares about liberty, I wanted to make sure you had this chance to receive your 2025 calendar.

This calendar is a small thank-you gift for everyone who helps our efforts to reach and teach Americans about our nation's great heritage of liberty.

You can make a tremendous difference for our country.

**That 's why I hope you'll claim your 2025 Hillsdale College calendar by October 31.** You can reserve your calendar by clicking on this secure link:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/2025calendar](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z73nvg5s85lqpqp7l49rd1ggnkj5brq1f3u39qgg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9hm9or2cdh2bs)**

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Brand-new prophecy resources
body:
Take a moment to look around.

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znrjdlultqvu8vpdb2preecct2i6nmpiloajq4b0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9hm9or2cdh2bs)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zoss0mujhtv6vv2sqaigasgi0fjbc6sbro1cbt5g_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9hm9or2cdh2bs)I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.

Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zat40jna60o6bhr56tbf7r9dq3sfegliefvtr0bg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9hm9or2cdh2bs)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____
---
| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

1600 Daily
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9vf7oq2dvfpf0jh82iij7amsuksjim1in3alpno_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9hm9or2cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8or0c1gj8d5hmjpqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4cphm8pj1clh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5dma558aecb47bcq2hij13d069rms796h0dv0h8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9hm9or2cdh2bs)_

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrkfgq6reqe4ph9hubebjgkm8ll6hpvtlifkj3cg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9hm9or2cdh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)
