name: Hillsdale College via American Defense News
subject: A History of the CIA
body:
Is it possible to repair the CIA?

This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0f7p2hj5e8vvv6h73go4s0cnhstonbbhijabi00_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9jmcoj1c5h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

Is it possible to repair the CIA?

**[To answer this question, Hillsdale College has created a FREE online video series on the history and current crisis in U.S. intelligence](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zj2jj3jk8f76d0k68dim3aisvkvqc1hoq1t2ed8g_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9jmcoj1c5h2bs).**

In this online video series, filmed during a conference held at Hillsdale College, you'll learn why we need intelligence and how it is used against American citizens and duly elected leaders.

The CIA--originally founded as the OSS--was created in the aftermath of Pearl Harbor to help protect America from foreign threats. But in the last few decades, this notorious agency...
* FAILED to foresee the 9/11 attack and then took over a decade to find Osama Bin Ladin

* COVERED for the Obama administration after the assault on our embassy in Benghazi that led to four American deaths

* THREATENED the sovereignty of the American people with the Russia collusion hoax

* FAILED to warn Americans about COVID-19

* HID the origins of the Hunter Biden laptop and declared it Russian disinformation

America's Founders would not recognize this notorious intelligence agency.

We still need intelligence to help protect us from foreign threats. We needed it in the aftermath of Pearl Harbor, and we need it even more today.

But now, the CIA serves its own interests...not those of the American people.

And so, it's no surprise that anyone in power who goes after the CIA is soon _not_ in power.

You might remember when New York Senator Chuck Schumer told MSNBC, **" Let me tell you, you take on the intelligence community, they have six ways from Sunday at getting back at you."**

Whether or not Schumer meant to make such a revealing statement, it is further evidence that you and I live in a country in which powerful government agencies do not operate according to the consent of the governed.

How did we get to this point? And how can we reform the CIA and our other intelligence agencies?

**I invite you to learn more about this critical topic through our free video series, U.S. Intelligence: History and Controversies.**

**You can receive instant access to this series right now using this secure link:**

[https://info.hillsdale.edu/us-intelligence-cca](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zubgv4ngikr8lmigh09rv9ipv6p00a2jo03ou2c0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9jmcoj1c5h2bs)

Learning about the history of U.S. intelligence is essential to understanding our current crisis. I urge you to watch your free online video series on U.S. intelligence today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| |
---

American Defense News
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zspjnnitgftcsc9lcegnjhvf56s4krmv2u4oevpo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9jmcoj1c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4cphm8pj3c1h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zmkqghg3kd4t9rl3cgf8qksqjd62qh4sojqiu8kg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9jmcoj1c5h2bs)_

Joe Biden’s brutal Department of Justice helped kill Stephanie Baez’s babies ... and now they want to throw her in prison.

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp5erbon647o2ri1igtk2fldfmh53gm1bko93e9o_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9jmcoj6clh2bs)

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zah6hf9n5csvu6veegcivoa8g17ggh02n5rv6ob0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9jmcoj6clh2bs) Dear Patriot,

**[Your crucial gift of a critically important $25, $50, $100 or more immediately will help us fight for Stephanie and keep beating Joe Biden's DOJ in court!](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo7np3siqcf4g7pqkjc9vkldin3q19pgqabrjupo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9jmcoj6clh2bs)**

Joe Biden's brutal Department of Justice helped kill Stephanie Baez's babies ... and now they want to throw her in prison.

Let me tell you, Stephanie is a happy, beautiful young woman you'd want as your friend or next door neighbor.

All she wanted was to start a family, and help heal sick people. She applied to medical school to make that dream come true.

Like many other patriots, Stephanie peacefully protested outside the US Capitol on January 6, 2021.

And like many other patriots, she peacefully entered the Capitol for just a few minutes.

She wasn't violent. She didn't destroy any property.

**Stephanie peacefully took a stand for fair, honest elections. But Joe Biden 's DOJ went after her like she was Public Enemy #1!**

First, they charged her with four misdemeanors. And they turned up the pressure to force her into pleading guilty and taking a plea deal.

But she refused to knuckle under.

**The DOJ was outraged. So they charged Stephanie with a felony that could put her in prison for 20 years!**

As you can imagine, this terrified her.

What's more, the brutal stress of facing 20 years in prison for a crime she didn't commit destroyed her health.

**Since 2022, Stephanie has endured 10 surgeries. She lost two of her babies in miscarriages. And now she faces a vicious show trial on December 3 rd.**

But there's something you can do about it.

I'm John Pierce, founder of National Constitutional Law Union.

Right now, NCLU represents 50 clients who peacefully protested at the United States Capitol on January 6, 2021.

**I 'm proud to say President Trump has endorsed our legal fight for January 6 prisoners. Because he knows we're beating Joe Biden's Department of Justice and FBI in case after case:**

We fought like devil dogs for our client, Kenneth Joseph Thomas, and WE WON!

Another January 6 client of ours, Dominic Pezzola, was found NOT GUILTY of committing seditious conspiracy.

**In fact, we 've defeated 23 charges against our 50 January 6 clients so far!**

And while we're excited about our hard won victories, we know Joe Biden and his lawless DOJ are pulling out all the stops to railroad Stephanie and other innocent Americans we're defending in court.

**NCLU is fighting for them because they deserve a strong defense, and because Joe Biden will turn his DOJ and FBI loose on you and me, our families, and other patriots if we don 't defeat them in court.**

The stakes couldn't be higher.

**[Patriot, please help NCLU defend Stephanie and our other innocent clients with your crucial gift of $25, $50, $100 or more right now.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zss3u30b1tat4pb9cbvdfuuj44k08ij0jbvlsk1g_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9jmcoj6clh2bs)**

Frankly, we're stretched to the absolute breaking point.

There's too much critical work to do, and not enough lawyers, paralegal, secretaries, and more to do it.

**[Patriot, PLEASE help NCLU fight back in court for our clients with your vital gift of at least a critical $25, $50, $100 or more RIGHT NOW.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcjdm0r1kkc91i4e3gbc48ee4bmk0hhmfjtq60j0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9jmcoj6clh2bs)**

Don't miss out on helping these patriots get freed from prison!

Thank you!

In Vigilance,

John M. Pierce
Chairman and Founder
National Constitutional Law Union

**P.S. Patriot, Joe Biden 's DOJ helped kill Stephanie's babies. And now she faces 20 years in prison for a crime she didn't commit. **Her trial is on December 3rd.But President Trump endorses NCLU because we're beating the DOJ in court.

**[Please help NCLU defend Stephanie with your critically important gift of at least a vital $25, $50, $100 or more IMMEDIATELY.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvtdph7bkdufppvi75t8l2j8o79jferti0ac59lo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9jmcoj6clh2bs)**

body:

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College

I'm reaching out to you today because I'd like to send you your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar**.

I know, I know. It's a little early to be thinking about 2025. But since you're someone who cares about liberty, I wanted to make sure you had this chance to receive your 2025 calendar.

This calendar is a small thank-you gift for everyone who helps our efforts to reach and teach Americans about our nation's great heritage of liberty.

You can make a tremendous difference for our country.

**That 's why I hope you'll claim your 2025 Hillsdale College calendar by October 31.** You can reserve your calendar by clicking on this secure link:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/2025calendar](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcm8npvamqjkiibhtb775cc0kvtjedlqo662fmn0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9jmao34clh2bs)**

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01

Hillsdale College

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Hollywood has done enough
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsqB33tWNK
As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I
want to say:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osqB33tWNK

You are
absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into
your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms
children.

Fellow
Conservative,
As
someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want
to say: You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is
reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment"
that grooms children.
Today
when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the
Pride Parade on Blue's Clues...

And the
result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where
children lecture you on what you can and cannot say…
...and
they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean"
ideas.
But you
and I know your ideas aren't old-fashioned or mean at all. They
are the same biblical values that made America the greatest
country on earth.
That's
why I'm reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance
to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and
grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love.
Today,
I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first
children's television show that actively fights back against the
groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical
values that made America great.
And it's
only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to
see a Christian resurgence in America like you.

Introducing: Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk.
This
ground-breaking live-action television show captivates
children...
...but
more importantly, it builds their character at the same time.
Imagine a
children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a
greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.
Courage,
honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a
biblical and traditional lens.
Imagine a
children's show that brings families together instead of driving
them apart.
Now
imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible.
Because I
can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding
Supporter.
Season
One of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk has ten lesson-filled
episodes planned.
And each
episode costs around $70,000 to produce.
I know
that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it
would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio.
And
obviously we won't work through Hollywood.
Hollywood
has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and
hijack our children.
We
parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to
rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture.
That's
why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to
help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.
Whether
you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything
higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are
needed and greatly appreciated.
As your
special "Thank You" for joining me as a Founding Supporter at the
$35 and above level, we'll send you all ten episodes of
Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk for your family to enjoy FREE
on DVD.
Hollywood
groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we
rebuild from the ashes.
And it
starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with
faith and family -- not filth.
Thank you
for joining us as a Founding Supporter.

Kirk
Cameron
Actor,
Author, and Father

Kirk
Cameron
Actor,
Author, and Father

DONATE

Brave
Books
13618
Poplar Cir, Suite 302
Conroe,
TX 77304

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. An overwhelming and immediate response is needed right here, right now, or we’ll lose Pete Hegseth FOREVER. 500,000 names are needed before the end of the day for us to stop us from the WOKE MOB’S RABID FRENZY against the greatest patriot alive. PLEASE help us now. We can’t let the Radical Left destroy our country like this. | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY GOD, FAMILY, COUNTRY PAC Conservative Broadcast PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 ~~ | ~~_

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Brand-new prophecy resources
body:
It's like we're living out Romans 1:25

| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d5d2fbb3a1f54eb49782aaa8469f8881&_e=iHeUu353pcEw2FGGk0JxBzfT8UVQuZP-6KHFC5J8UgYQFc051q1zHuTk0kK5L2AA01Eh4ZCnFQrjdBqCxbHfNNF_tLGYYkP5BgVkbEFcEJSCTD0BrmJa35gQckcjUasfAEE9Kjydi7JedxaucnzdIAKbnzV9Ri3puBbXMBrjGaLl0zVf_yjgYM9tIpJpePNRstAcqbA6af1YU8f_9Dz0uxWBg4SzSsO83aYDcL8YSlImxQid_SERG8B_I4qjMWWp1x-K0LRcUl27SO0Qh2wSvIAaavIZM7A6BHsBg9hVDzuyACKcihkdI9E8O05as9Iavre4n8huI5n061zDIXwexQJiVOD9VZnEPMxIWoz4k3Hq-pnEQwrKzYqdkfF3-i0iauoFFWI_oOyCvkDfSrYVOethvFxCOKAXg1Chst8TlNcnXwLnleAbHcRd1gNArUXi)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d5d2fbb3a1f54eb49782aaa8469f8881&_e=iHeUu353pcEw2FGGk0JxBzfT8UVQuZP-6KHFC5J8UgYQFc051q1zHuTk0kK5L2AA01Eh4ZCnFQrjdBqCxbHfNNF_tLGYYkP5BgVkbEFcEJSCTD0BrmJa35gQckcjUasfAEE9Kjydi7JedxaucnzdIAKbnzV9Ri3puBbXMBrjGaLl0zVf_yjgYM9tIpJpePNRstAcqbA6af1YU8f_9Dz0uxWBg4SzSsO83aYDcL8YSlImxQid_SERG8B_I4qjMWWp1x-K0LRcUl27SO0Qh2wSvMWYbdDouL7bTTUipv5fH9pRwYFPh4Fsaw9a6qStwBRCLD4Br0EKwBfNV7DZsdPvbbkfy3us0ETesUyI64iGH0ljRTT9IhNKEe9QuVMst2z7ZsOoTuVkbllp3WTpW-RCri3oFlfBwrk8c_btgItiXoXuP_ZpCcNehciuxmx76G2V)I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.

Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d5d2fbb3a1f54eb49782aaa8469f8881&_e=iHeUu353pcEw2FGGk0JxBzfT8UVQuZP-6KHFC5J8UgYQFc051q1zHuTk0kK5L2AA01Eh4ZCnFQrjdBqCxbHfNNF_tLGYYkP5BgVkbEFcEJSCTD0BrmJa35gQckcjUasfAEE9Kjydi7JedxaucnzdIAKbnzV9Ri3puBbXMBrjGaLl0zVf_yjgYM9tIpJpePNRstAcqbA6af1YU8f_9Dz0uxWBg4SzSsO83aYDcL8YSlImxQid_SERG8B_I4qjMWWp1x-K0LRcUl27SO0Qh2wSvK2VNGz25cpbridINTDVgLQY5c6RIIOLoAmve08_UJnC3w-tSnvFKhtR1tGoWUa2m-u23YcG0iaV0TZGooFaIFp2fZAi7Gt8hBkIfcBLmv7JkDlRLpHQw3jnky1bv8md0DFam3BwpmWEc429OPm3OS4hIgZ8UiI4dx0TllCeZLOz)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____

clean_body: It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 | | | Hello Friend, Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator. Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan? I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return. That's the heart of Revelation. Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness. Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead. It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near. This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey. Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ. When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence. As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King. In my brand-new book, Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into: 1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist? 2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event? 3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture? 4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance? 5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem? Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure. In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative. would like to send you my brand-new book Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of Pathway to Victory. Make your generous gift here: Pathway to Victory is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support. May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus. Sharing the Truth of God's Word, __ | | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas Defend the Constitution PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

This is unlike anything I’ve written you.

*|MC_PREVIEW_TEXT|* |

| | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0d373220bb3446c6b19e855f59336b32&_e=uUpZfJpDZxyoT4bjXlGIa6J1bH9cwXm8OCbn7dBRjH6La-4BoStN5-JOMQkjREA9EeOnhRJpsg48tQtZJKHseU1BD3byAdgK694m-KMZDEHmuO7mcQWWP5veTun2JP7BBne_I1Of_iDvvEnvZImzvcpMcHr_zIZH7vNwNtcO0UBXwwEq9ORQ-7CYlnnyeodTO6c0walXh7FwOhoWOsFz9-SpGB_bz2CfIMVYeQa4Eav-c8xr4UkE2XVll_-lSoeohsU3jrYx7MB3sowRKdxmSXlWeuCX8W7JlDki-Ns6M4o%3D "Tuttle Twins")
Friend,

This is unlike anything I’ve written you. It may seem long but I have to explain to you why I’m optimistic for the future of our nation, and If you stay with me here, then I will even deliver you a book.

Let’s start by showing where our education system currently stands:
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0d373220bb3446c6b19e855f59336b32&_e=uUpZfJpDZxyoT4bjXlGIa6J1bH9cwXm8OCbn7dBRjH6La-4BoStN5-JOMQkjREA9EeOnhRJpsg48tQtZJKHseU1BD3byAdgK694m-KMZDEHmuO7mcQWWP5veTun2JP7B6uxjGPvXZzl291XWCA757ed6eiOt_dz8X7FZU5Al6H2mEj-ufCkrSxZqUb-KlRwhecqDIxhWNrjlIOLgAR6Pdw7t-eQ1YBgXWXa7nknEYYLwXs-Glp6vL-aq8RdDAeyU6A6gcCeRXAhd5BO2ukxbtoEjVfBUQE0Gf9LvtJS8SUo%3D)
See the bright red line?

That’s the growth of administrative staff... aka woke administrators who enforce D.E.I., CRT, and other nonsense onto our kids. Ever hear the phrase “Go woke. Go broke.” That’s our educational system.

Fortunately, there is a solution that is turning the tide to educate our country’s youth against the dangers of socialism and teach young people about the ideas of liberty.

And this is why I’m optimistic. Because there are students standing up.

The solution? _The Tuttle Twins_.

_The Tuttle Twins_ teaches kids about free markets, individual liberty, limited government, and personal responsibility.

And it’s working...

Before I give you real stories of students fighting back, I must first ask how you can help. My personal friend Connor Boyack is the author of _The Tuttle Twins_. He is on a mission to distribute an additional 1,000,000 copies of the books.

[I am humbly asking you to help me raise $50,000 to distribute copies of The Tuttle Twins to schools, libraries, and families. It costs roughly $10 to distribute one copy. Here’s my favorite example of _The Tuttle Twins_ inspiring the next generation:

A public school in Colorado kicked Jaiden out of class. His crime? He wore a Gadsden flag patch on his backpack.
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0d373220bb3446c6b19e855f59336b32&_e=uUpZfJpDZxyoT4bjXlGIa6J1bH9cwXm8OCbn7dBRjH6La-4BoStN5-JOMQkjREA9EeOnhRJpsg48tQtZJKHseU1BD3byAdgK694m-KMZDEHmuO7mcQWWP5veTun2JP7BZHQDs6L5HiO8asv4d9AG-a-tTsQtz7Lnts6R72yzsbXRb0yq5ZAvAkXjAxAD0-6NUCJW3d7VC3bt7k366HTGAVSwfK-4wumS0aM6qGdd4_xqgPYDugriozc61ZQlmkn5IJeXo9VfewGSI1IzU63ZnqJFrtLrC6F223fBG6I-vVY%3D)
The director at Vanguard School, where Jaiden attends, believed that this historical flag has “origins with slavery” and was “disruptive to the classroom environment.” He told Jaiden’s mother that the boy could not return to class unless the patch was removed.

Jaiden refused to remove the patch. Good for him!

In an emergency meeting, the school board voted to allow Jaiden to wear the patch. That was a quick victory!

Jaiden is a special kid. He stands up for his beliefs. More importantly, he stands up for the truth. As his mom explained to me, he’s been reading the Tuttle Twins books for years and learning about freedom. Then, it came time for him to do something about it.

**What if we could teach an entire generation to be like Jaiden?**

_We can._

clean_body: This is unlike anything I’ve written you. |MCPREVIEWTEXT| | | | "Tuttle Twins" Friend, This is unlike anything I’ve written you. It may seem long but I have to explain to you why I’m optimistic for the future of our nation, and If you stay with me here, then I will even deliver you a book. Let’s start by showing where our education system currently stands: See the bright red line? That’s the growth of administrative staff... aka woke administrators who enforce D.E.I., CRT, and other nonsense onto our kids. Ever hear the phrase “Go woke. Go broke.” That’s our educational system. Fortunately, there is a solution that is turning the tide to educate our country’s youth against the dangers of socialism and teach young people about the ideas of liberty. And this is why I’m optimistic. Because there are students standing up. The solution? The Tuttle Twins. The Tuttle Twins teaches kids about free markets, individual liberty, limited government, and personal responsibility. And it’s working... Before I give you real stories of students fighting back, I must first ask how you can help. My personal friend Connor Boyack is the author of The Tuttle Twins. He is on a mission to distribute an additional 1,000,000 copies of the books. As a special offer, if you donate $40 or more, my friend Connor will send you The Tuttle Twins Learn About The Law. Here’s my favorite example of The Tuttle Twins inspiring the next generation: A public school in Colorado kicked Jaiden out of class. His crime? He wore a Gadsden flag patch on his backpack. The director at Vanguard School, where Jaiden attends, believed that this historical flag has “origins with slavery” and was “disruptive to the classroom environment.” He told Jaiden’s mother that the boy could not return to class unless the patch was removed. Jaiden refused to remove the patch. Good for him! In an emergency meeting, the school board voted to allow Jaiden to wear the patch. That was a quick victory! Jaiden is a special kid. He stands up for his beliefs. More importantly, he stands up for the truth. As his mom explained to me, he’s been reading the Tuttle Twins books for years and learning about freedom. Then, it came time for him to do something about it. What if we could teach an entire generation to be like Jaiden? We can. If Congress had read The Tuttle Twins as kids, I bet we wouldn’t be bankrupting our country and giving the Deep State warrantless spying! The time to start building the future is now, and your support is critical to our mission. Thank you. Mike Lee P.S. I’ve included a heartwarming letter below from a kid who was also inspired by The Tuttle Twins. This is how we can change the future. name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Brand-new prophecy resources
body:
It's like we're living out Romans 1:25

| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bac24879115045ee94cad7d2d295dd06&_e=nR5eYZXtVl5Aa9Mz-CdPi55uP78erJP8FOh-5u7UVJy4zVVtW70_GItMLixFkvLsMt8oKxgcI15giwDSmcVrXBZjlPfsguNdXXS5P77Ci5xwa0WiRExRo5nvH_21uW-BOQOIrqpHVZhD2Lay2dS8_F-bdvuXqTt4nfQAOs8PjBfo2MYlHvgLYMHfsK0s_1HBOVJe75_zgLox9CPHBw18yknRjh9cE_v1TBycJ7mQf8VGJ2KQXzCaMyaVaae0XZ9lyxPbaw3nupuIBTL3bUg2ib2OF08KydTu4Z0TiwfhEzNehT5EXJcasFXzcylggUQd7YploOhjR2UXnOaTk4OTRvPOsARIwPIMFwhwl1Fy71DuMwCumiii21OGCpEX-MGVG0yav_GIkVI0hixLVQQO_3F5JS8jUaXr3RY35aK3u8UjQIX5o4VPQ23WcJ6Ic5vZ)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bac24879115045ee94cad7d2d295dd06&_e=nR5eYZXtVl5Aa9Mz-CdPi55uP78erJP8FOh-5u7UVJy4zVVtW70_GItMLixFkvLsMt8oKxgcI15giwDSmcVrXBZjlPfsguNdXXS5P77Ci5xwa0WiRExRo5nvH_21uW-BOQOIrqpHVZhD2Lay2dS8_F-bdvuXqTt4nfQAOs8PjBfo2MYlHvgLYMHfsK0s_1HBOVJe75_zgLox9CPHBw18yknRjh9cE_v1TBycJ7mQf8VGJ2KQXzCaMyaVaae0XZ9lyxPbaw3nupuIBTL3bUg2iWMwxhtoRV10xPJm2lJGhP_W950AyTrR9-iaWX4LoS8ll_Iq617Hya3H-qIike-A-k6PzJ_nEAQsKEnMHL8BhlmIVwcBlTd67_zWOlkHpclVUiDg8W7uQ-XLfxDhsQ_b_5eEjbFUkOIXR9iPgkHvqjfUpktZPsCO4Dx87uGwM6-a)I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.

Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bac24879115045ee94cad7d2d295dd06&_e=nR5eYZXtVl5Aa9Mz-CdPi55uP78erJP8FOh-5u7UVJy4zVVtW70_GItMLixFkvLsMt8oKxgcI15giwDSmcVrXBZjlPfsguNdXXS5P77Ci5xwa0WiRExRo5nvH_21uW-BOQOIrqpHVZhD2Lay2dS8_F-bdvuXqTt4nfQAOs8PjBfo2MYlHvgLYMHfsK0s_1HBOVJe75_zgLox9CPHBw18yknRjh9cE_v1TBycJ7mQf8VGJ2KQXzCaMyaVaae0XZ9lyxPbaw3nupuIBTL3bUg2iUjjonIZr-k6b_1giEKSuGfisdItceRAzBmFGJsCXGxKpsaoBUP37m30tDGazV-o2SFnDl3nlaoHSYVnQ-Z7L-IrzfT14z3XYH_Ky5GNBvDO3K4cCtTIvPhnvYub2jcpgVhJM5IonseHIlwiXla1x6Als8Akm8q0vooEMfPPpypQ)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____
---
| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas

clean_body: It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 | | | Hello Friend, Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator. Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan? I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return. That's the heart of Revelation. Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness. Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead. It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near. This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey. Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ. When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence. As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King. In my brand-new book, Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into: 1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist? 2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event? 3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture? 4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance? 5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem? Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure. In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative. would like to send you my brand-new book Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of Pathway to Victory. Make your generous gift here: Pathway to Victory is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support. May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus. Sharing the Truth of God's Word, | | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas Full Mag News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

| Peter, This presidential election showed us an alarming trend that could impact our race in 2025. Donald Trump gained ground nationwide, including in key counties across Virginia. This election was a crucial test for Democrats as we approach 2025. National Republicans are feeling the momentum after Tuesday’s win, and they think that 2025 will be a key opportunity to keep this Governor’s seat red. We can’t afford to let Donald Trump and his allies gain any more ground next year. We must demonstrate that Virginia is not turning its back on progress or on our neighbors. We must have the resources to continue our campaign for stronger schools, safer communities, and lower costs for Virginia families. And we must show that we can build a future that brings people together and listens to the challenges facing all Virginians. Next year, National Republican groups and GOP leadership will work relentlessly to defeat us. We need to build a strong foundation now. [Will you split a contribution today between my campaign and Blue Amp Action to help us prepare for the tough race ahead in November 2025?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5d17d44a-bc80-4dd9-9b37-4414681384fb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T72c5519c-0306-4c51-977f-adbe44438da1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Mike Lee
subject: I want to send you a book
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Libertas Institute
body:
This is unlike anything I’ve written you.

*|MC_PREVIEW_TEXT|* |
---
| | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/hLOlfJRIUfU0dkLt549sqA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpIvn8P0RUaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUubGliZXJ0YXMub3JnL3R1dHRsZXR3aW5zLWxhdy1wYT91dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNDExMjImdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9cm9uVwNzcGNCCmc_VmJAZ5aBMnxSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA "Tuttle Twins")
Friend,

This is unlike anything I’ve written you. It may seem long but I have to explain to you why I’m optimistic for the future of our nation, and If you stay with me here, then I will even deliver you a book.

Let’s start by showing where our education system currently stands:
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/hLOlfJRIUfU0dkLt549sqA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpIvn8P0RUaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUubGliZXJ0YXMub3JnL3R1dHRsZXR3aW5zLWxhdy1wYT91dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNDExMjImdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9cm9uVwNzcGNCCmc_VmJAZ5aBMnxSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)
See the bright red line?

That’s the growth of administrative staff... aka woke administrators who enforce D.E.I., CRT, and other nonsense onto our kids. Ever hear the phrase “Go woke. Go broke.” That’s our educational system.

Fortunately, there is a solution that is turning the tide to educate our country’s youth against the dangers of socialism and teach young people about the ideas of liberty.

And this is why I’m optimistic. Because there are students standing up.

The solution? _The Tuttle Twins_.

_The Tuttle Twins_ teaches kids about free markets, individual liberty, limited government, and personal responsibility.

And it’s working...

Before I give you real stories of students fighting back, I must first ask how you can help. My personal friend Connor Boyack is the author of _The Tuttle Twins_. He is on a mission to distribute an additional 1,000,000 copies of the books.

[I am humbly asking you to help me raise $50,000 to distribute copies of The Tuttle Twins to schools, libraries, and families. It costs roughly $10 to distribute one copy. Can you chip in $10, $20, $40, or even $200 today?](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/hLOlfJRIUfU0dkLt549sqA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpIvn8P0RUaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUubGliZXJ0YXMub3JnL3R1dHRsZXR3aW5zLWxhdy1wYT91dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNDExMjImdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9cm9uVwNzcGNCCmc_VmJAZ5aBMnxSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)

Here’s my favorite example of _The Tuttle Twins_ inspiring the next generation:

A public school in Colorado kicked Jaiden out of class. His crime? He wore a Gadsden flag patch on his backpack.
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/hLOlfJRIUfU0dkLt549sqA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpIvn8P0RUaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUubGliZXJ0YXMub3JnL3R1dHRsZXR3aW5zLWxhdy1wYT91dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNDExMjImdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9cm9uVwNzcGNCCmc_VmJAZ5aBMnxSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)
The director at Vanguard School, where Jaiden attends, believed that this historical flag has “origins with slavery” and was “disruptive to the classroom environment.” He told Jaiden’s mother that the boy could not return to class unless the patch was removed.

Jaiden refused to remove the patch. Good for him!

In an emergency meeting, the school board voted to allow Jaiden to wear the patch. That was a quick victory!

Jaiden is a special kid. He stands up for his beliefs. More importantly, he stands up for the truth. As his mom explained to me, he’s been reading the Tuttle Twins books for years and learning about freedom. Then, it came time for him to do something about it.

**What if we could teach an entire generation to be like Jaiden?**

_We can._

clean_body: This is unlike anything I’ve written you. |MCPREVIEWTEXT| | | | "Tuttle Twins" Friend, This is unlike anything I’ve written you. It may seem long but I have to explain to you why I’m optimistic for the future of our nation, and If you stay with me here, then I will even deliver you a book. Let’s start by showing where our education system currently stands: See the bright red line? That’s the growth of administrative staff... aka woke administrators who enforce D.E.I., CRT, and other nonsense onto our kids. Ever hear the phrase “Go woke. Go broke.” That’s our educational system. Fortunately, there is a solution that is turning the tide to educate our country’s youth against the dangers of socialism and teach young people about the ideas of liberty. And this is why I’m optimistic. Because there are students standing up. The solution? The Tuttle Twins. The Tuttle Twins teaches kids about free markets, individual liberty, limited government, and personal responsibility. And it’s working... Before I give you real stories of students fighting back, I must first ask how you can help. My personal friend Connor Boyack is the author of The Tuttle Twins. He is on a mission to distribute an additional 1,000,000 copies of the books. As a special offer, if you donate $40 or more, my friend Connor will send you The Tuttle Twins Learn About The Law. ~~ ~~ ~~ ~ ~ ~ Here’s my favorite example of The Tuttle Twins inspiring the next generation: A public school in Colorado kicked Jaiden out of class. His crime? He wore a Gadsden flag patch on his backpack. The director at Vanguard School, where Jaiden attends, believed that this historical flag has “origins with slavery” and was “disruptive to the classroom environment.” He told Jaiden’s mother that the boy could not return to class unless the patch was removed. Jaiden refused to remove the patch. Good for him! In an emergency meeting, the school board voted to allow Jaiden to wear the patch. That was a quick victory! Jaiden is a special kid. He stands up for his beliefs. More importantly, he stands up for the truth. As his mom explained to me, he’s been reading the Tuttle Twins books for years and learning about freedom. Then, it came time for him to do something about it. What if we could teach an entire generation to be like Jaiden? We can. ~~ ~~ ~~ ~ ~ ~ If Congress had read The Tuttle Twins as kids, I bet we wouldn’t be bankrupting our country and giving the Deep State warrantless spying! The time to start building the future is now, and your support is critical to our mission. Thank you. Mike Lee P.S. I’ve included a heartwarming letter below from a kid who was also inspired by The Tuttle Twins. This is how we can change the future. body:
It's like we're living out Romans 1:25

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=31e28bc409834b6dabcca4273f020198&_e=Qcre8adQliINtZG_vGVNgOMjRMaLBsYEYKtwIcB0gYl9KpgioD9WFyV6hqeeWli4zhSlOYQUVPOOPMnxRTARLQj1AzBcM-ojN8k_76J5jzmyCQC9tp13lMa3TueNcdX58LbUx-KeOj4_U10YLLbqQl2hhZ8goFfRQzApLZhcLQEzHv6DIVCzl0oFBqwSNrqOf8WOqTfmKf0wiowPMhgev3patNg6A3REe9QtFXptuBuAA0EVh9TJ---Abkk-hfwzHA5D-0PYXYhmJv2ZTDnk7Af76GDoQCtf5oZm71a6XaRd8_pfJqUS1s8L-RJA_T1Kfp9zPphA8_2I_F7owv_DnOM-l3niDeJXnPCajUx_q_GOBf02J8ET_LpFk7arD9tc_PMCOpXKYowNCEAqXWCEwToL0rvtwXnB98a2Uj-qWFXaIYqQ_c7W2su8rS7mj_6z)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=31e28bc409834b6dabcca4273f020198&_e=Qcre8adQliINtZG_vGVNgOMjRMaLBsYEYKtwIcB0gYl9KpgioD9WFyV6hqeeWli4zhSlOYQUVPOOPMnxRTARLQj1AzBcM-ojN8k_76J5jzmyCQC9tp13lMa3TueNcdX58LbUx-KeOj4_U10YLLbqQl2hhZ8goFfRQzApLZhcLQEzHv6DIVCzl0oFBqwSNrqOf8WOqTfmKf0wiowPMhgev3patNg6A3REe9QtFXptuBuAA0EVh9TJ---Abkk-hfwzHA5D-0PYXYhmJv2ZTDnk7BEUF2NmYC_Wj7gtS7senjkvqTLqG-97Mc47vjRlD0PEUQae8d7X3XveRzwP5FdzAJ0gxB7nYWrtWo6vyA-bn3103kbCXh9adCmpTrxe7qc4tzPx1-EpxSYW35vBhX_4hXD64KD5ferrXUCIYG_QjpzQUFp_NFHKaswhs7fOMYWS)I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.

Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=31e28bc409834b6dabcca4273f020198&_e=Qcre8adQliINtZG_vGVNgOMjRMaLBsYEYKtwIcB0gYl9KpgioD9WFyV6hqeeWli4zhSlOYQUVPOOPMnxRTARLQj1AzBcM-ojN8k_76J5jzmyCQC9tp13lMa3TueNcdX58LbUx-KeOj4_U10YLLbqQl2hhZ8goFfRQzApLZhcLQEzHv6DIVCzl0oFBqwSNrqOf8WOqTfmKf0wiowPMhgev3patNg6A3REe9QtFXptuBuAA0EVh9TJ---Abkk-hfwzHA5D-0PYXYhmJv2ZTDnk7DkCglR6WqW5APCRHzrFWMAABFWC1cXOF8dyWKLWsjKRnkL44huhnELGw-O-LyWfHTwnzFNALN6NtxaGStMVGW9k2qe_IVJTKj_JxO2yW-PC3aLCsEURwiBFbtzoXun9VkJqnpkPwW9yFWUUyRoccMY5X8pG0MXycSzqPdsQ4Ht_)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____
---
| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ. When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence. As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King. In my brand-new book, Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into: 1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist? 2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event? 3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture? 4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance? 5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem? Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure. In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative. would like to send you my brand-new book Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of Pathway to Victory. Make your generous gift here: Pathway to Victory is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support. May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus. Sharing the Truth of God's Word, __ | | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas Freedom Nation Today PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: Hillsdale College via Conservatives Give
subject: Six ways from Sunday at getting back at you
body:
Is it possible to repair the CIA?

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f9dea569a3aa496486d2864001f98d1e&_e=ZORaL4l3Il4c-s9NkHdsA46Ee4AZ6bHrPhaljoIlQLxQdqF4KLSGncZOO5drvCHgobyt0wZPTS_c6RxGkXQxyHJy0Pv7pZU6NlWZ2omeB4O2j7q-wvIE0zXGLl8MRCEo93LNdBUZXx6npMJSoC23rNlTMz38uin3oZ5k6OCm-N243N8lvifSY5S-T1_Rg3X5xpPaMS-qHqaMtREKvItsP2ZXD0eYqBJ0HgH-wD_7tU9oh65WeOdxLTKr-PxCWtEZr1ZIgYsImqa8QuZ9fvUlBEoUeVHMDpUQrncT_sihVg_mFbc4K4Ma8qKe-KpCUmr60-xURLL-6G7jQFhcbiVcuxVbt-ubsFouIJnJaXIunETUdAXII3ObEOgjQJliV4IEUVSxMLV_9WGQvp2Lzi2Rag%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

Is it possible to repair the CIA?

**[To answer this question, Hillsdale College has created a FREE online video series on the history and current crisis in U.S. intelligence](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f9dea569a3aa496486d2864001f98d1e&_e=ZORaL4l3Il4c-s9NkHdsA46Ee4AZ6bHrPhaljoIlQLxQdqF4KLSGncZOO5drvCHgobyt0wZPTS_c6RxGkXQxyHJy0Pv7pZU6NlWZ2omeB4O2j7q-wvIE0zXGLl8MRCEo93LNdBUZXx6npMJSoC23rNlTMz38uin3oZ5k6OCm-N243N8lvifSY5S-T1_Rg3X5xpPaMS-qHqaMtREKvItsP2ZXD0eYqBJ0HgH-wD_7tU_5BGnImi6ObZK8SLPyHvp_cRebwXpjeezFWuefPIlsLcdcnR4ogQddRKcb8-1y39eY-eX7TSNsfoy8bkx_WsIPriudRXM5XE1noMLNsJSc15fsF26isZz8W-kKlZYaXvKECoebYifjNDWJHVIY3zjQxqF4hyeqZ8gUF96HsocFBw%3D%3D).**

In this online video series, filmed during a conference held at Hillsdale College, you'll learn why we need intelligence and how it is used against American citizens and duly elected leaders.

The CIA--originally founded as the OSS--was created in the aftermath of Pearl Harbor to help protect America from foreign threats. But in the last few decades, this notorious agency...
* FAILED to foresee the 9/11 attack and then took over a decade to find Osama Bin Ladin

* COVERED for the Obama administration after the assault on our embassy in Benghazi that led to four American deaths

* THREATENED the sovereignty of the American people with the Russia collusion hoax

* FAILED to warn Americans about COVID-19

* HID the origins of the Hunter Biden laptop and declared it Russian disinformation

America's Founders would not recognize this notorious intelligence agency.

We still need intelligence to help protect us from foreign threats. We needed it in the aftermath of Pearl Harbor, and we need it even more today.

But now, the CIA serves its own interests...not those of the American people.

And so, it's no surprise that anyone in power who goes after the CIA is soon _not_ in power.

You might remember when New York Senator Chuck Schumer told MSNBC, **" Let me tell you, you take on the intelligence community, they have six ways from Sunday at getting back at you."**

Whether or not Schumer meant to make such a revealing statement, it is further evidence that you and I live in a country in which powerful government agencies do not operate according to the consent of the governed.

How did we get to this point? And how can we reform the CIA and our other intelligence agencies?

**I invite you to learn more about this critical topic through our free video series, U.S. Intelligence: History and Controversies.**

**You can receive instant access to this series right now using this secure link:**

[https://info.hillsdale.edu/us-intelligence-cca](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f9dea569a3aa496486d2864001f98d1e&_e=ZORaL4l3Il4c-s9NkHdsA46Ee4AZ6bHrPhaljoIlQLxQdqF4KLSGncZOO5drvCHgobyt0wZPTS_c6RxGkXQxyHJy0Pv7pZU6NlWZ2omeB4O2j7q-wvIE0zXGLl8MRCEo93LNdBUZXx6npMJSoC23rNlTMz38uin3oZ5k6OCm-N243N8lvifSY5S-T1_Rg3X5xpPaMS-qHqaMtREKvItsP2ZXD0eYqBJ0HgH-wD_7tU-jk41oaFgclfd6r2HeJXbFiYgIfs9ElXcgEbTmMiBa8oxYOJTz7Xm-6YcPRITMlyM0BocLL-gKkBbn8W6PXEtf1VpCHqIM0jT1rEDm04IN3keJMSrShzVOGO9pL8BTHXcX-gC9g9FQxkSRNYaAfWgPQ-XGGQxpI3njw8Rc9ZHVmw%3D%3D)

Learning about the history of U.S. intelligence is essential to understanding our current crisis. I urge you to watch your free online video series on U.S. intelligence today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| |
---

Conservatives Give
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=f9dea569a3aa496486d2864001f98d1e&_t=8EW-G1eZ6z8v82vNVHTV-rma-WFITi2toZf8PuiiIVq6xLzgvVyzkJjoyLEBJ4r0ail2LGBlyXpBuQZ4PDNT5yybDXegMWMU5fk8xN2CycB8RT8C_sxs1NpiItY5wiqAbsbMCq-CKZC1w9UeO-qpi96FHEO7qlpN0up20n4EVa0%3D)

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Brand-new prophecy resources
body:
It's like we're living out Romans 1:25

| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7b9a8d97de9c4bef936bfb2bd4f2570d&_e=3YRpM5S_YlbwZWWeboH4FERR_G3ECAPRmgFcU7G5WO6oKCJFB7qGKPVu8G7uMX_MPodDa7XbINfE2_9jr_pMyKMak8EsA7IyKjXbUDjV3k6HDHjCTEWpZ3eIu88mv4Y9l-4ySt5PDdhdS7qc5UWLHH-sOVbK4z97oxMn_oLnBea6McOxYS1Oo7jgrmwNWW2UX3dTw3z6I_CTZi4uY8SEHiQ2gp2cvg6GmLy-fnbqIpMkpj2RC0lj9QA9w3SX3HcwF8fQkWuN4vAUJymHruIxqHiVSVjkRVkazOAwZ4gYhVwgpA0XuUjhrSlED8QtdkCubZapt6hie9RQMxQB4Zi-sI-PWQjeBQY0Qo2vtrd7CYpzqa7C33prncUHEpgo_XpiE_1bkZRuWoVuUA2KTiJAaWV1jyg4M5IJ1wfkjLVwiKzojufhH2remdjREccv6Lu9)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7b9a8d97de9c4bef936bfb2bd4f2570d&_e=3YRpM5S_YlbwZWWeboH4FERR_G3ECAPRmgFcU7G5WO6oKCJFB7qGKPVu8G7uMX_MPodDa7XbINfE2_9jr_pMyKMak8EsA7IyKjXbUDjV3k6HDHjCTEWpZ3eIu88mv4Y9l-4ySt5PDdhdS7qc5UWLHH-sOVbK4z97oxMn_oLnBea6McOxYS1Oo7jgrmwNWW2UX3dTw3z6I_CTZi4uY8SEHiQ2gp2cvg6GmLy-fnbqIpMkpj2RC0lj9QA9w3SX3HcwF8fQkWuN4vAUJymHruIxqJRvVV4VG_5E-sZsJCiUauTMnJ0JgdnAxXgMjcHODW2FnKukqSfAQ5dMRgppWD72Qj8t6zxZeGPfowpvKrdCrmjkdeTnwXaubbGJaXfkhpq7nA4q86jfp2S251_Wg6JMtWyspyUcsmd0Pg-ZvW-mcHpr_5aotkzbkU1dSRjKVa7A)I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.

Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7b9a8d97de9c4bef936bfb2bd4f2570d&_e=3YRpM5S_YlbwZWWeboH4FERR_G3ECAPRmgFcU7G5WO6oKCJFB7qGKPVu8G7uMX_MPodDa7XbINfE2_9jr_pMyKMak8EsA7IyKjXbUDjV3k6HDHjCTEWpZ3eIu88mv4Y9l-4ySt5PDdhdS7qc5UWLHH-sOVbK4z97oxMn_oLnBea6McOxYS1Oo7jgrmwNWW2UX3dTw3z6I_CTZi4uY8SEHiQ2gp2cvg6GmLy-fnbqIpMkpj2RC0lj9QA9w3SX3HcwF8fQkWuN4vAUJymHruIxqP_lbVg2iNSyPpgfaGgZzLOVI2DLnFlwvwI_O9F4QuZNq2ViT6DdEDyMbB7QTH2Vjn1Y7B0Qsz_Aw9gHaiNWy1Y3M8pBEhKHO0gtkhrI8Ivz7-IPFge1OImYE5pQBgoVJeWlCEMdgTzLKrbj0sZn4M9chtuHS6lVButQB3iV2vI1)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____
---
| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

Conservative Liberty Wire
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=7b9a8d97de9c4bef936bfb2bd4f2570d&_t=SwK0RR-r6EIx_xB4d4ZjfqatJMjuXU-Cvt5Cd-jWm7iFcvBN1i24ydlL9HgRmN5F11U_cSjrL01FyBr8KvtxUJTVQu89mjWsZmrxxzrFdJyxk8KiK634FXTH52GW-3au1mERFkm7rCOsxyNgX40lTwvGje5ho1l-Xuuw8-AWpd8%3D)

# [Tell Leader Schumer to confirm as many judges as possible before the GOP takes over!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4ac054f0-8d15-4dab-b646-23d4463c4e32/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | Now that Trump has already begun naming right-wing extremists to important cabinet positions, it's more important than ever that we get enough judges and regulators in position to keep them in check. [**Tell Leader Schumer to confirm as many judges as possible before the GOP takes over!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T37fc4a3b-bcb0-4a55-887a-1e17ca01ac72/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

_" While still in charge of the Senate and the White House, we must do all we can to safeguard our democracy. Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer must use every minute of the end-of-year legislative session to confirm federal judges and key regulators—none of whom can be removed by the next President!"_ wrote Sen. Elizabeth Warren for TIME.

Making the most of this lame-duck period is the most important thing that Democrats can do to help weather the coming storm. Add your name and tell Leader Schumer to start speed-running the confirmations for as many judges and regulators as possible before it's too late!

[**Tell Leader Schumer to confirm as many judges as possible before the GOP takes over!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfb9037eb-d541-4238-b396-a0ea3dbb1718/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | Now that Trump has already begun naming right-wing extremists to important cabinet positions, it's more important than ever that we get enough judges and regulators in position to keep them in check. " While still in charge of the Senate and the White House, we must do all we can to safeguard our democracy. Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer must use every minute of the end-of-year legislative session to confirm federal judges and key regulators—none of whom can be removed by the next President!" wrote Sen. Elizabeth Warren for TIME. Making the most of this lame-duck period is the most important thing that Democrats can do to help weather the coming storm. # Friday, November 22, 2024
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day in 1963, President John F. Kennedy was [assassinated in Dallas](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0zzGO6yAQgOHTQBcLBhzHBcVr3OW1W1oTGOxRMEQGxfHtV7v9XuD_9X3d5zty4rz8x41c-8QygwJ70foCMAfkdM5WBvdQYdSSnB4MwNCrHuTqfPC9HpCUp6tXPhAYG8egLPbjCDeS7H5iWgNobZRR3ZWsjcFHQ_HmBwXCKgrcyt61lRp9sMZ0ljftnS-bTG5t7VWF-SdgEjAdx9G1umLJiTN1ZV8ETCvm8CjlKWCi3HamKmB6Us4UzgvWirVyxsYly92F18Epcb0OwqplQ06_o_an_O3gOwAA__-za12L) while riding in an open limousine with Gov. John Connally, who was severely wounded in the shooting. Shortly after Kennedy was pronounced dead, Vice President Lyndon Baines Johnson was sworn in as president. San Antonio has unveiled a [highly anticipated plan](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGu4yAQAL_G7rBgISZXUFzjLtdeaRHvOl4JgwWbOPn70z299vWj0Wj-3uZb5MT58SfuFOS9lhk0OGWMApgxcvrMrsdw1_jL9BSMtwD-oi_Qb8HfNQF64yyS195Zd72PSOgBFz1q23P4LzMGwBirrR5Gcm7FZbW0XhevoXOakKXUQTYSese2pk95UR2WsvcpbCJH6-zvDqYOphZzzFIyl0pHqTKU-uhgwnJmKWdWLWb1DSjKQlUi552yKOQmlRdRz_wiToTqZNlUplO141mbipVy7GDqa8Dj5JS4jb5z-rFHTl8x8uOdV4B_AQAA__8Coms0) called "Project Marvel" to transform the downtown area with a new Spurs arena and multiple other developments. ## San Antonio Unveils 'Project Marvel'
San Antonio has unveiled plans for a [significant downtown sports and entertainment district](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGu4yAQAL_G7rBgISZXUFzjLtdeaRHvOl4JgwWbOPn70z299vWj0Wj-3uZb5MT58SfuFOS9lhk0OGWMApgxcvrMrsdw1_jL9BSMtwD-oi_Qb8HfNQF64yyS195Zd72PSOgBFz1q23P4LzMGwBirrR5Gcm7FZbW0XhevoXOakKXUQTYSese2pk95UR2WsvcpbCJH6-zvDqYOphZzzFIyl0pHqTKU-uhgwnJmKWdWLWb1DSjKQlUi552yKOQmlRdRz_wiToTqZNlUplO141mbipVy7GDqa8Dj5JS4jb5z-rFHTl8x8uOdV4B_AQAA__8Coms0) centered around a new Spurs arena, an expanded convention center, and mixed-use developments. Dubbed "Project Marvel," the concept includes retail, housing, a convention center hotel, improvements to the Alamodome, and a land bridge over I-37. The project is estimated to cost between $3-4 billion, with [potential funding sources](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00L1uwyAUxfGnwRsWXPAHA0MXb-na0SJwiakwWEDi5O2rVF27H_109P-6rBcTYki3T7Ojbk-fV2AgKecUYHUmxNcqO6evzCneoeaTAJgGNkC3aeO8AGuHeRznUSo1OTUDm-UMA_h5wC7oN8Y5AOeCCdaPKKV31gv0s50YEMnQhZZL3zZs-DTVx1d-YOlt3ruot9aOSsQHgYXAcp5nv7-qSSa1nEJ-jwgs13sNCWslsJjSgo1IYDlK_kbb6G7KAyOtx71UagomQ6tJ9E-gXCkhFRP9sR1d0e44Q4yhjhOR7LabEH-PtH_LPDT8BAAA__8TT2bd) including private investments, hotel taxes, and bond proposals. The [timeline for completing the new arena](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2O3CAURp8Gd4zgGrBdUKRxt2lTju7CZYcEgwU38_P20aTf7pM-6Ujn_Pq4fmAuuX79xIM8P1O7ggIjtZYA14i5vK5miv5TxU1P5PUyAyxWWZhuHjalrdYYaVE6xmAi2gVhtVapLaKasn_DtAbQelazujgyJsWQZkprWBQIoyhmbv3CN2J64kjl1e7UL6EdU_E35nOI-YeAXcD-eDwuf6gO-34F7Ng5h0IC9qNVegnYKbTajvcaZ-s8JFWmzpjrQZVlzIN7DizH-bcPObBKrNxqbvLs7TcFlgf2OxWJnSoK2GGZZQjo3LySxE-XpHExyc1pJ0MKLq52DcpsU_fxfORS8nCLMOrrwFz-S_C3Ve8e_gUAAP__-ox6Zg) and expanding the convention center is five years, while the land bridge and Alamodome upgrades are expected to take up to 15 years. Last month, San Antonio and Bexar County signed agreements with the Missions, a minor league baseball team, to [build a new downtown ballpark](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00L-O4yAQgPGnsTssGP8LBcU17nLtldZgBgcdZiwgcfL2q91-X-DTp9-_-3rHEEPa_-JBpr49ryBhEEoJgNVhiJ91aJ2x0mnVklFzDzCPcoT2YeTk9U1LmtBKrcdx1O5m5az90MM4Ut8G8x1TCkCpXvaym2gYvNt8T_62zRKaQZILlXNXH1TpjcXHD78odxsfbTSPWs_S9H8aWBpYCiZMlVPgTCfn2nHeG1gsvTGLjZ-pfgTumaiIysLi9l8kuoTjK1W-krBYyGKMolR04XmIM_PJBWMDS5uNO68QYyjT3AxyPzDEn4v6K8vLwFcAAAD__1U3Z4g) and redevelop the surrounding area.
## DPS Names New Director
Freeman F. Martin has been [named the new director](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL3u4yAQxJ8Gd1jL8uUUFNfQ5dorLQJLgg7bEebi5O1PTv9vZ0Y_zcyf63wNpZb1_jss5Po7bzMCKi4ER5xTKPUzqyG5G6SLGMgJKxGtBo3Dw5lkKISYyFg0SoI2GUCnSVplhMzTUNwJEwJRCAkSRkNK5RSzpDxFC8gUUCp9a2N_UKd32HP9bC9qY9yWobpH78-dyV8MPUN_HMf49_WPTpOhD62XWImhX-nYGfq6xVAZ-i-Ioc-NaAkrX87kyr8yT8-dp9Io9q0x9GguXGogk26CK6mRqwiWTwCaKxAZ6RwQL0Nz6XmUWstuLFNwX0Kp35b9x9teDv8HAAD__-YVbAs) of the Texas Department of Public Safety. He is succeeding Steve McCraw, who is set to retire at the end of the year. Currently serving as the senior deputy director, Martin has [held numerous roles](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2O5CAQhJ8GZz2Ctj2eDQgucbaXXjhqQ7NG4k-Ad8dvf_Lkm7XUnz5V1b_P5yf54NPXX4qs-8vlJ0qcQClAfFry4XxOg9WbtB9qYK2WEXGZ5YzDrsnxRhvLx33DZXN3HJVyJOcPsg-e7Tx4fcmUQlRqlKO83XmanDVuZPcwi0QxSba-53rrO3d-UXPhzN9cbybHIei999LE-EfgKnBthU2vRwzZUEj80y5K4Npf1zMffYe3AzhAoZYFrhclcL1iCFyVet8C13JswRto5LifYHKMvjWfExyJko_5aOEEKiX71Bu4yhwpgQOIVLtPQA1saWB9ZdNzHaq25ceH4Nt9EZP8iuTDu0P_ddRvjf8DAAD__6blfQE) during his 34-year career with DPS, including trooper, Texas Ranger, and deputy director. He established an anti-gang unit in San Antonio and helped develop the Texas Rangers Major Crime Scene Response Team. Martin helped [lead the agency’s responses](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOwyAQRL8Gd1iwYOMUFNe4y7VXWoRdEiRsIoxC8vcnJ9deuftGT6P5OS9nF1Pcrt9uJVufIS8gQHMpOcCCLqbXoju0F4En2ZGVRgGYQQzQ3Sy6YPSo5DQOAr2ZHMkTOT8padAPk-uiPWRSAkiphBL9SFoH9EFRmLwRwLQgjDWXvt6o0tPtIb3yg0rv89ole6v1vjP1xWBmMLfW-u3iMbQDM5g3ajuDOWXvEoP5LeB_z89R3Halwje3EnKMhXzNhefAPxjvR1QZAVoPDOauWLy3mFLcR8O0uK4upneX-u84Dwu_AQAA__9homb6) to significant incidents, including the Austin serial bomber case, the Sutherland Springs mass shooting, and Hurricane Harvey. Most recently, he played a key role in implementing Operation Lone Star, a multi-year state initiative aimed at combating illegal immigration. Martin holds a bachelor’s degree in criminal justice and graduated from Northwestern University's School of Police Staff and Command.
## 'Flying Spiders' Descend On Southeast Texas
Silky white threads have [filled Southeast Texas skies](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1uwyAURp8Gb1iXC47jgaGLt3TtaN3wYyMRsIDE8dtX6d71-6Sjo_NzW24UYkjrNz2cbm-fFwRUXAiOuFgK8VxUZ_Ud7CQ6p8UoEccBBuw27WGY1BVGSwQ0DJYAjZiUFcPdojS-C_oDEwJRCAkS-otTylvjpfNXMwIyBc6GlkvfNtfcm6qPZ3650pv86KLeWtsrk18MZ4bzcRy92UpOn5fhvD6j5yZTbQxnKi2Y6D4zxZerLSdu8jO1k_t4hrTyugfrSuXFkWkhJy6mSSJMot-3vSva7keIMdTLyBSsDwrxz6L9m-Wl8TcAAP__Q3NmOA) in recent weeks, sparking both fascination and discomfort among residents. The natural phenomenon, known as "spider ballooning," occurs when young spiders release silk to catch the wind, allowing them to disperse and find new habitats. Recent cold fronts have brought an influx of "flying" spiders to the region. Residents have [taken to social media](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOpiAUhZ8Gu2u4VwUsKLaxm223NCiXXyL-GGHGmbffuP12J_lOTnK-Px_zh4spvl-_3cG2foc8k6QeEIFo9i6mn7lvvF2kH7Fhi7oj0oMcqNks4spmdMuAKxpjghlQKRmk18y9HKmJ9hlDJELsZCdbxX0f_Bo6DmbVkkQv2cear7ZuXPnblZB-8hdf7ZqPJtmt1rOI7pegSdB033cb3MpLzvtTEDS9rvx5FkETGqM1ScLByEEqQdOZS31I3iHC_s43lHxwfjM8hD3ULRZYOOSLYfmscG-uQiwQK9Qnppz3AinuDOWMni-4eSkgaCJpUJFWyowKBzMKmprL-vOOKcWitOjl63Ax_XtR_6v1y9LfAAAA__9smnfF) to share their reactions to the occurrence, with some describing the spiderlings as "invisible snow," "alien spores,” “Mother Nature's dandruff,” and "fallout from Elon's space test flight."
| [](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLuK8zAUhJ9G7mzORRenUPGDcZe_SWBLI1tSLFBiY2uzydsv3q23OYdhhuFjPs7D2aWcHrf_7h5secVlICBZI9ZEg3cpvwdZeTuCP2EVLBomMgoUVbPVPBkCjS17P2qPRrHX4Ggc21ZxaKtkjzJEIkQGhkYHKaOfIofYTgZISAg-lWVryhxKeLk95vfyDFszLfcq27mUdRf8T1AvqI9j83AlPcPqynwkBPWbP06zzqvgfk9ecIeglSC9fo6CO5KgDAvSEx7qFwfra3-JadtLjScFh0uCu-Oz4O7aX6rN-vUr5Zx2bYSE292l_ANV_lzpaek7AAD__5QyYhc) [**Doctor Says You Need This 1 Protein for Joint Pain**](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLuK8zAUhJ9G7mzORRenUPGDcZe_SWBLI1tSLFBiY2uzydsv3q23OYdhhuFjPs7D2aWcHrf_7h5secVlICBZI9ZEg3cpvwdZeTuCP2EVLBomMgoUVbPVPBkCjS17P2qPRrHX4Ggc21ZxaKtkjzJEIkQGhkYHKaOfIofYTgZISAg-lWVryhxKeLk95vfyDFszLfcq27mUdRf8T1AvqI9j83AlPcPqynwkBPWbP06zzqvgfk9ecIeglSC9fo6CO5KgDAvSEx7qFwfra3-JadtLjScFh0uCu-Oz4O7aX6rN-vUr5Zx2bYSE292l_ANV_lzpaek7AAD__5QyYhc)[ ](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLuK8zAUhJ9G7mzORRenUPGDcZe_SWBLI1tSLFBiY2uzydsv3q23OYdhhuFjPs7D2aWcHrf_7h5secVlICBZI9ZEg3cpvwdZeTuCP2EVLBomMgoUVbPVPBkCjS17P2qPRrHX4Ggc21ZxaKtkjzJEIkQGhkYHKaOfIofYTgZISAg-lWVryhxKeLk95vfyDFszLfcq27mUdRf8T1AvqI9j83AlPcPqynwkBPWbP06zzqvgfk9ecIeglSC9fo6CO5KgDAvSEx7qFwfra3-JadtLjScFh0uCu-Oz4O7aX6rN-vUr5Zx2bYSE292l_ANV_lzpaek7AAD__5QyYhc) If you're over the age of 50, male or female - top doctor reveals the best protein to restore bone density, soothe long joint pain and regain mobility. ([See Details](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOpDAQRL_GZD2yGzNA4OASsrn0QtTgNvhkMLK9zMzfrxhtunHVeyrVv8f4IB_8vvyljU15uTiiRA1KAeJoyYf3qCtrJml7VbFRbY3YNrLBajV6avmusLN922rVM2u0znWNm5sebScrby6ZUohK1bKWtztr7ezsanbd3EoUWrL1JaZbWbnwi7IL73hyus1xq4JZSzmyqP8IHAQOa4w2-J2vUOBwuQUOSgkcPiwsF7rHBDRNsRSg40jx5Awbv_wcIUOmHf5_0Q7Jn5zgSYUTROc4AW3eQvIRlkS7ZTgpBH7_VPIaU6GFBQ5VMvZ4-hB8vrdCy2UjHz57y68Hnga_AwAA__8ZlnVQ)) **➤ Meanwhile** , Abbott announced that the state is installing additional buoys in the Rio Grande in an effort to deter illegal border crossings. ([More](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0j7GyqyAURb8GOhw4YIgFxWvs8tpbOiAHZQYlAyTq399J-tvvvdasn8f0sDHFfflvNzTtDHkCDooJwQAmb2O6JkW9cdwPgqIRWgLonvdAV4NuEACSowC4ux61D84PQXFEHESPNJoPTAgAISSXvLuhUsHPQWK4z5oDURx9bLl0bcWGp60hXfmNpZvzRpNZW3tWIv8RGAmMx3F0IZ_avmqL-2dCYNzxqATG75lteMY5M5eLx8LcK1-VlZjZUuzukRbjn0dMKdabJoovm43pa2p_pr8N_AYAAP__yl1dcg)) **➤ Dallas:** A federal jury ordered former Dallas police officer Amber Guyger to pay the family of Botham Jean nearly $100 million in damages for Jean's wrongful death in 2018. Guyger is currently serving a 10-year murder sentence for killing Jean. Dubbed "Project Marvel," the concept includes retail, housing, a convention center hotel, improvements to the Alamodome, and a land bridge over I-37. The project is estimated to cost between $3-4 billion, with including private investments, hotel taxes, and bond proposals. The and expanding the convention center is five years, while the land bridge and Alamodome upgrades are expected to take up to 15 years. Last month, San Antonio and Bexar County signed agreements with the Missions, a minor league baseball team, to and redevelop the surrounding area. DPS Names New Director Freeman F. Martin has been of the Texas Department of Public Safety. He is succeeding Steve McCraw, who is set to retire at the end of the year. Currently serving as the senior deputy director, Martin has during his 34-year career with DPS, including trooper, Texas Ranger, and deputy director. He established an anti-gang unit in San Antonio and helped develop the Texas Rangers Major Crime Scene Response Team. Martin helped to significant incidents, including the Austin serial bomber case, the Sutherland Springs mass shooting, and Hurricane Harvey. Most recently, he played a key role in implementing Operation Lone Star, a multi-year state initiative aimed at combating illegal immigration. Martin holds a bachelor’s degree in criminal justice and graduated from Northwestern University's School of Police Staff and Command. 'Flying Spiders' Descend On Southeast Texas Silky white threads have in recent weeks, sparking both fascination and discomfort among residents. The natural phenomenon, known as "spider ballooning," occurs when young spiders release silk to catch the wind, allowing them to disperse and find new habitats. Recent cold fronts have brought an influx of "flying" spiders to the region. Residents have to share their reactions to the occurrence, with some describing the spiderlings as "invisible snow," "alien spores,” “Mother Nature's dandruff,” and "fallout from Elon's space test flight." | If you're over the age of 50, male or female - top doctor reveals the best protein to restore bone density, soothe long joint pain and regain mobility.
