() ➤ Dallas: A federal jury ordered former Dallas police officer Amber Guyger to pay the family of Botham Jean nearly $100 million in damages for Jean's wrongful death in 2018. Guyger is currently serving a 10-year murder sentence for killing Jean. () ➤ Houston: The city is investigating reports of a raw sewage leak and extensive black mold at the Pleasant Hill Village senior living complex in the Fifth Ward, operated by a community development corporation affiliated with a local church. () ➤ Several passengers on a Tuesday American Airlines flight from Milwaukee to DFW restrained a man with duct tape after he attempted to exit the plane mid-flight. ## Gaetz Withdraws, Trump Nominates Bondi
Former Rep. [Matt Gaetz withdrew his name](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOozAQQL_GdET2YDAULq6hy7VXogke8JyMHZlRUPbrV9l-6ye9J71_9-WOnDjvf_EgL1tZQINtjWkBloCc3ottgt-IgLqGvHEdgOv7YWqiHyeYgp1Gt7pV47qO2g0E62PqBnzYPjTsPzZjAIzpnDE3B4Mbe1x1DxZN2JTVFFhKvf0vnCXSlt7lRfW2lqNJPoo8T9X9UTArmCVS5JQ-TMEcy0GZrlPBjOHgzKdUFC5ZwdxrDdaO7YEi7Y4kX-3FEkPF62xRpNRM73anTBWTgrmpPjwvTonPwSmr9wP5p9PIb09eHr4DAAD__xtCZCw) from consideration as President-elect Donald Trump's attorney general nominee on Thursday, saying his nomination was becoming "a distraction" to the transition. Bondi served as Florida's AG from 2011 to 2019 under then-Governors Rick Scott and Charlie Crist. ## GOP Wins Final Senate Seat in Pennsylvania
Pennsylvania Democratic [Sen. Bob Casey conceded](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAQRb_G7hwxY2B4BcVr0mXbLa0JDAm7GFs2SuS_X3n7La-udHR0Pm_TjXPJ9fHBs_iWlgkV6gFgQJwi53JMuo8-iaCMvXigEZGMsf_6p-dkXQDR0RDT_e5G1DYkss4KBG1Tn_1JA0AEGAngQmjJGQ7KoGaIqdNKYm7Ldvlacm1PSeVYXrJdwjL3xT9bW_du_N_htcMrr1Xe-3mdY2s5FOnwGniXY5hDWLY5h-9hlVr3o7y4Zh52qdxkIEjGaTDpDgIpUlJKkgVyyjEFHfrNx_WdS8m7pU6rx8y5_Eq0v6K8PP4EAAD__1tcYvI) his reelection bid to Republican David McCormick on Thursday, giving the GOP a 53-47 majority in the U.S. Senate next year. The Associated Press projected McCormick as the winner of the tight race on Nov. 7, but Casey refused to concede [for over two weeks](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOpDAQRL_GZEZ2gwcIHFxCNpdeiBq7melbYyPsBfH3KzbbYLMqlapUev-e0xM5cHz9xZVsWdIEClqptQSYPHK4prbydiECaiqyumsAOmMeQ_W2ahkQkZTul6brTds65czQGxxImUbPFdt7TWsArZtO67qDR9cbdMpAi9ovolXkuaS9_p84ljct4UoH7bVLaxXsu5Qti-aPgFHAeJ5nfS4B71DAGOnMAsYtBS7sbomb_Ok8rcntWOScZukw0yVdio48ZVmS3Gn7nAM7jNLjwV6uzqV9ZfchOcqNYsxXODAyykwRC93tQrkIGKvd-u3kEDg_OtGq14ocvm-X3zAeFr4CAAD__7TRd8s), following a slow ballot-counting process marked by lawsuits and accusations of law violations. The slim margins [triggered an automatic recount](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00L3OnDAQheGrMZ0RHn4MhYs0dJs2JZodD7uTGBthC8TdR7v9Vx_p6NH757E8UILE12_c2JU1LdBAp43RAItHCffSVd6tzMBtxc7YFsD2_TBVb0fcTcaPo7fr0ExI7UimnybylpE65krc580YAGNaa0xtYbBjj9T00KHxq-oa9lLSUf9NEsub13Cnk4-a0lYF9y5lz6r9pWBWMF_XVccnRb7yZ1cw7ylIEcoK5i-bA1ORFBXMz_TUhJlvTSkSe8565xjzHU6MgjpzxML6QGLt8WS9EaVjE_qnD4poRgPWVofz-yUhSB6s6prXhhK-tvJTq9PB_wAAAP__uGxtNA), with results expected next week, but Casey's surprise concession interrupted the process. McCormick will now be sworn in as [Pennsylvania’s junior senator](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvgzAQhX-N2S7iDojJ4KELW7p2RId9JG6NjbBDxL-v6N7l6UlP-vT0fd3HO_vg4-OTFzFlTiPV1AIiEI2OfTjGtnJmFiFpKjGoGyLddddb9TT93LZ0Q741Wgux5Ym4R6ypt01PU115c9IQiRAbjXjRdNV9x7buqGV0s2prcb6k7fKdfCxPmcORdtkuNi1VMM9S1qyaD0WDoiEea8rlnBQNJ1jRgHj2M14ZoryzoiFLhClNYDnLATZFK04yrBJjPsLO0TO8MmSJXAQ2tgIlwSbrawrecgTHu3ewWJu2xdsfRUO1Gbe-fQg-X7Vq68fCPvydLP9J2w39BgAA__95u24X) in January.
## Man Sues For $800 Million Tossed in Dump
A man from Wales is launching his final legal battle against a local council for the right to [search a landfill for his hard drive](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kr3u3CoQxZ8Gd7Mygz_uFi58E62U4p825WrWjNckGFYwXsdNnj2yHaVLw_xgmHPQEd8-7h_kvAvPrzRzJ2O8Y4kVaA2Id0vOb_eqsN3IjGwK7nRrENu6bq7F1OGjakrDmrUdh7ocNFNtWm740ZTtdTSF63Y1rRG1Nq3Wlxab9r-ahrLGirQdVVWydRLT5Xt0QSYe_RbfnC5DnAvfTSKvrEyv8Kbwtq7rZc5h7ym8cYAlK7zNMfC2V0o_WPaTtrrC7Lx3MYAkprwkhmkJAkPaXhJhdoETjO45SQaJkFiS4zfDw8kQXYAxJlkCw8QweHJzhpUy0DA4y0HI-w1kSnEN4AJ4CnZ03iu8UYK-18vbfGkVGmX6X8r0wj9Fmc-9whrLcKxMyW8H_X86Hnw866BMWz5g4qP4mEXhJzo3f_1qLO0yv7L8GZtjOu_LRKfkOWF5IHt26BkvCq9F6uxr3TPKTauq8jmT80fo8q9P8O7wdwAAAP__sj-wZQ) containing 8,000 Bitcoins, worth close to $800 million today. James Howells, 39, whose partner mistakenly discarded the hard drive at the dump in 2013, faces an initial hearing next month, where the council will attempt to dismiss his case. Despite offering the council up to [25% of the recovered value](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z72KtDAUxvGrSbqRnGM-fIsUb2M3224pMTnqGaIZNIx494vbb_fAAz_4fz-HZ-DM2_wVVvJ1KgMq1A-AB-KQAudr0DL5iQipleTBtYjOGPtPLj52zlowkYIyFI1tR-isVdZoRZMzo2R_awCIAK0DaBxa15kQlUEdIE1CK0pcy968Cm91oSlf5UN7E8sqs19qfR-i_S-wF9if59mMY7w_gf1G5yGwD3vlmOmecd5Vui4w-Cpy9-l9cs58WCe0mtfA-Vetf1V-PP4EAAD__7MbUqQ) and claiming he has narrowed the search area to 100,000 tons of waste, town officials maintain his proposed excavation is "not possible" due to environmental concerns. Howells, a systems engineer, mined Bitcoin in 2009 when it was virtually worthless but quit after his then-partner [complained about his noisy laptop](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LFyhCAQgOGnwQ4GVpFYUCSF3aW90kFYzk1WuVFyzr19Jpm0eYFv_vmvl-kSiGm7vYcVfc1lAg2dNEYCTCkQP6euST4jArYNeuNaAGdtPzSLx4w9YnLDPOseTILe5ZjCkIIdIEFsyP9oxgAY0zpjlIPevdgQtYUumJRFpzFRLbv6KLTVBTM_ywN3FcvasF9qvR-ifRUwChjP81S_SWsgVrGor08B44bnIWAMe6XIKE1n9NCCFTC-UY2FNjnTNoeb5LClTMzyGhgPabVe1VJXbnaf7icx09E70enbH7829b8hDw_fAQAA__8vCWJM) keeping her awake. Bitcoin neared a record high of nearly $100,000 yesterday.

East Africa has just endured its worst drought in 40 years, leaving tens of millions without access to clean water, wiping out millions of livestock, and destroying crops. With domestic food production crippled, Somalia has relied heavily on imports—90% of its wheat coming from Russia and Ukraine—until those shipments stopped. Now, two in five children in Somalia suffer from acute malnutrition, and cholera is spreading in some regions. Trump then nominated former Florida Attorney General for the post. Bondi served as Florida's AG from 2011 to 2019 under then-Governors Rick Scott and Charlie Crist. Several Republican senators Gaetz's withdrawal, with Sen. John Cornyn (R-Texas) saying the confirmation hearing would have been "like (Supreme Court Justice Brett) Kavanaugh on steroids." GOP Wins Final Senate Seat in Pennsylvania Pennsylvania Democratic his reelection bid to Republican David McCormick on Thursday, giving the GOP a 53-47 majority in the U.S. Senate next year. The Associated Press projected McCormick as the winner of the tight race on Nov. 7, but Casey refused to concede , following a slow ballot-counting process marked by lawsuits and accusations of law violations. The slim margins , with results expected next week, but Casey's surprise concession interrupted the process. McCormick will now be sworn in as in January. Man Sues For $800 Million Tossed in Dump A man from Wales is launching his final legal battle against a local council for the right to containing 8,000 Bitcoins, worth close to $800 million today. James Howells, 39, whose partner mistakenly discarded the hard drive at the dump in 2013, faces an initial hearing next month, where the council will attempt to dismiss his case. Despite offering the council up to and claiming he has narrowed the search area to 100,000 tons of waste, town officials maintain his proposed excavation is "not possible" due to environmental concerns. Howells, a systems engineer, mined Bitcoin in 2009 when it was virtually worthless but quit after his then-partner keeping her awake. East Africa has just endured its worst drought in 40 years, leaving tens of millions without access to clean water, wiping out millions of livestock, and destroying crops. With domestic food production crippled, Somalia has relied heavily on imports—90% of its wheat coming from Russia and Ukraine—until those shipments stopped. Now, two in five children in Somalia suffer from acute malnutrition, and cholera is spreading in some regions. The food crisis, compounded by global humanitarian aid being redirected to Europe and the Middle East, has created a perfect storm, leading to a sharp rise in child malnutrition. name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: What Will We Do in Heaven?
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWzgaPtW-N
How can we be sure that heaven exists?

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWzgaPtW-N

Hi
Friend,

How can
we be sure that heaven exists?

It's a
question that has crossed the minds of many. Is heaven just a
comforting idea to help us get through life, or is it a real,
tangible place where we will one day dwell?

The good
news is that the Bible gives us clear answers. Jesus Himself
said, "I go to prepare a place for you… I will come again
and receive you to myself, that where I am, there you may be
also" (John 14:2-3). Heaven is a real destination for those who
trust in Christ, and it's where we will spend eternity with God.

But what
do we really know about this place? What will we do there? Will
we recognize our loved ones?

In my
book A Place Called Heaven, I answer 10 surprising questions
about heaven, offering a clear biblical picture of our eternal
home, including:

What
Will We Do in Heaven?
Will
Heaven Be the Same for Everyone?
How
Can I Prepare for My Journey to Heaven?
And
several more

This
resource will encourage you and help you prepare for the ultimate
destination God has promised.

For your
gift of any amount to Pathway to Victory, I'd love to send you a
copy of A Place Called Heaven. I pray that this book will give
you a greater sense of peace and excitement about the future and
a renewed focus on living for eternity today.

Get your
copy here:
https://secure.ptv.org/a-place-called-heaven-generous-gift-1

Thank you
for your partnership in sharing the hope of Christ with the
world!

Sincerely,
Dr.
Robert Jeffress

P.S. -
For your generous gift of $125 or more, I'll send you not only
the book but a companion gift book called Encouragement from A
Place Called Heaven, as well as our ministry-exclusive brochure,
the sermon message series on DVD and MP3 audio, and A Place
Called Heaven for Kids-a beautifully illustrated book designed to
help children understand their eternal home with Jesus. Click
here to claim your resources:
https://secure.ptv.org/encouragement-from-a-place-called-heaven-mega-kit-1

name: History Facts
subject: The supercontinents before Pangaea
body:
Despite breaking apart into the seven continents we know and love around 200 million years ago, Pangaea remains fairly well known long after its heyday. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68c6f5jpl4ptsy1fagkh63rz9yo948glc9uvdb12rj99dec4gwmgg7tso4i48bed877k4d8kt4t5ay0jj12g664fnnfhc75u2xkv836de24uz0i51xsq83e6ak14t9c4soa9lx5i5wkci12xv&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sncpqr&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [Pangaea wasn’t the only supercontinent.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sncpqr&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Science & Industry](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sncpqr&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sncpqr&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| D espite breaking apart into the seven continents we know and love around 200 million years ago, Pangaea remains fairly well known long after its heyday. Less well known is the fact that it wasn’t the only supercontinent in Earth’s history. Pangaea was preceded by at least one other: [Rodinia](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sncpqr&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), which formed about 1.3 billion years ago and separated 750 million years ago. There was also the relatively short-lived [Pannotia](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sncpqr&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), which was here for about 50 million years beginning 600 million years ago, though there's debate as to whether its landmasses ever fully formed into a single continent.
---
A number of other supercontinents may also have existed, including [Gondwana](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sncpqr&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) (likely the best known), as well as [Atlantica](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sncpqr&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) and [Vaalbara](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sncpqr&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), which remain disputed due to a lack of evidence. Some consider these megacontinents instead, which are smaller — the conventional [definition](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sncpqr&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) of a supercontinent is a landmass consisting of at least 75% of the planet’s continental crust. Pangaea formed between 320 million and 195 million years ago due to plate tectonics — an incredibly slow process that shifts the Earth’s surface over the course of hundreds of millions of years — and broke apart for the same reason. This is also why North America, South America, Europe, Asia, Africa, Australia, and Antarctica won’t be here forever, with several continents likely to [merge](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sncpqr&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), but we probably won’t have to update our maps anytime soon.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sncpqr&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sncpqr&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

~46 million

| Countries in Africa, the most of any continent

| | | Did you know?
---|---|---
## Another supercontinent might form in the next 250 million years.
Supercontinents are believed to form every 300 million to 500 million years or so, which means we’re [due](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sncpqr&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) for another one in a few hundred million years. When they aren’t busy deciding whether to call it Pangaea Ultima, Pangaea II, or Pangaea Proxima, scientists have been speculating as to the effects the supercontinent will have on life — most of which aren’t especially rosy. Due to increased volcanic activity and much higher carbon dioxide levels, as much as 92% of the planet could be uninhabitable to mammals when the next supercontinent forms in about 250 million years.

clean_body: Despite breaking apart into the seven continents we know and love around 200 million years ago, Pangaea remains fairly well known long after its heyday. | D espite breaking apart into the seven continents we know and love around 200 million years ago, Pangaea remains fairly well known long after its heyday. Less well known is the fact that it wasn’t the only supercontinent in Earth’s history. Pangaea was preceded by at least one other: , which formed about 1.3 billion years ago and separated 750 million years ago. There was also the relatively short-lived , which was here for about 50 million years beginning 600 million years ago, though there's debate as to whether its landmasses ever fully formed into a single continent. A number of other supercontinents may also have existed, including (likely the best known), as well as and , which remain disputed due to a lack of evidence. Some consider these megacontinents instead, which are smaller — the conventional of a supercontinent is a landmass consisting of at least 75% of the planet’s continental crust. Pangaea formed between 320 million and 195 million years ago due to plate tectonics — an incredibly slow process that shifts the Earth’s surface over the course of hundreds of millions of years — and broke apart for the same reason. This is also why North America, South America, Europe, Asia, Africa, Australia, and Antarctica won’t be here forever, with several continents likely to , but we probably won’t have to update our maps anytime soon. | Thank you for supporting our advertisers! | By the Numbers | | Size (in square miles) of Asia, the largest continent 17.2 million | | Continental blocks Pangaea formed from (Gondwana, Euramerica, Siberia) 3 | Continental blocks Pangaea formed from (Gondwana, Euramerica, Siberia) 3 | | Population of Australia ~46 million | | Countries in Africa, the most of any continent 54 | Countries in Africa, the most of any continent 54 | | | Did you know? ---|---|--- Another supercontinent might form in the next 250 million years. Supercontinents are believed to form every 300 million to 500 million years or so, which means we’re for another one in a few hundred million years. When they aren’t busy deciding whether to call it Pangaea Ultima, Pangaea II, or Pangaea Proxima, scientists have been speculating as to the effects the supercontinent will have on life — most of which aren’t especially rosy. Due to increased volcanic activity and much higher carbon dioxide levels, as much as 92% of the planet could be uninhabitable to mammals when the next supercontinent forms in about 250 million years. name: Kirk Cameron
subject: How we stop the Hollywood Groomers
body:
Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues...

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: **_You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children._** Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zmjl31el33etpu8q9gess8srjdjhfq2sqdvbcklo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9ieepb2c5h2bs)
---
| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zt1di9t3cqc0rfh0b49d93e51pmuc0plqn622mvg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9ieepb2c5h2bs)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[**Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zif4a9k3tkg4g7bdl92c4k4e7dovs7jasshi51n0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9ieepb2c5h2bs)** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zqh2mv7i4cupcqr6g98k0gj35f0ggf619938e6g8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9ieepb2c5h2bs) ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you**** all ten episodes of** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ **for your family to enjoy**** FREE on DVD.** ** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter. **
---
| | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father
---
| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zrldrv9faou5dvptrnuf40g7a3uej63i1h8a2dc8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9ieepb2c5h2bs)

name: Breaking News Alerts
subject: Please don’t cry.. Pete Hegseth will live on in our hearts forever.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Ronny Jackson
body:
Here’s the sad news in case you missed it.

| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z7dgnv9qjcb50m8iccqir0b2o0fu1a69uf2uf0l8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9ie1ob1cjh2bs)

---
After President Trump made Pete Hegseth our Secretary of Defense, I was **PETRIFIED** when I heard news of the Democrat plot to **DESTROY** him.

_**While you were MIA**_ , Pete Hegseth stood by Trump’s side & **DEFENDED** him as the **CORRUPT LEFT** attempted to put President Trumpin**JAIL**.

They realize to get to Trump, they must **RUIN Pete Hegseth**.

**NOW, it's getting personal** ; they’re **GOING TO WAR with Pete Hegseth** and his family... whatever they can do to bring him down – **NOTHING is off limits.**

**Pete Hegseth is experiencing the most RUTHLESS attack on a Secretary of Defense in U.S. HISTORY.**

_**I can’t bear to watch this any more... It's just too much.**_

The **WOKE Democrats’ petition to IMPEACH Pete Hegseth** has reached** MILLIONS OF SIGNATURES**.

**If we let Pete Hegseth FALL to the WOKE MOB – they’ll have everything they need to go after President Trump, and eventually _YOU_.**

[**So, today we’re calling on 3,000,000 PATRIOTS to go on the record and say: **](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z7nq38cnhriklh4phq6mk0mk4p7orv8dgga2718o_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9ie1ob1cjh2bs)

---
If Pete Hegseth goes, then Democrats will have **TOTAL POWER** to go after Trump.
The attacks on Pete Hegseth will only **GROW** if nothing is done right here, right now.
[**ADD YOUR NAME IMMEDIATELY TO STAND WITH PETE HEGSETH!**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zvqa823o51fimfs0l7bdge9a3le028rjrq12rb58_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9ie1ob1cjh2bs)

body:

| | | | Greetings!You're Invited to meet Senator Amanda Chase
---

| Amanda will be at the Dogged State Distillery Company from 6pm to 8pm tonight.
Just stop by to say hello, pick up a yard sign, bumper sticker and learn how to participate in the upcoming Special Election that will take place in just a few weeks.
To receive updates about the December Special Election, please sign up for updates at chaseforsenate.com or join us this Friday evening.
Hope to see you there! Amanda

---
| Greetings!, I am super excited to announce a number of meet and greets that my campaign will be hosting across Senate District 10. Here is our current schedule.
If you would like to host a meet and greet, please reach out to Craig at craig@chaseforva.com.
Please take advantage of this opportunity. I want to hear what issues are important to you and how I can best put my 8 years in the Senate to work for you.
While we have a Special Election during the upcoming busy holiday season, I really hope you will take advantage of this opportunity to meet up.
I'm running for state senate in a Special Election to be held this December to fill John McGuire's term in the Virginia Senate to represent Amelia, Appomattox, Buckingham, Cumberland, Prince Edward, Fluvanna, Goochland, Western Hanover, the Shady Grove precinct in Henrico and Powhatan counties.
We will fill you in on how to participate and vote in the Special Election in December and give you an opportunity to ask questions. I really hope you will save the date and join us.

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Stop the indoctrination of our children
body:
Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues...

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: **_You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children._** Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1t7aktv0ghqec77jca9pic9cidtm7se3e9903l8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9ie1ob1cdh2bs)
---
| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7dlvpqik4ulo7mtnea7bbcjppih34jsuq0nlgb8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9ie1ob1cdh2bs)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[**Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ze3p0j9u0mr5q35ifrla8iga2hjoqf5v2flm41u0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9ie1ob1cdh2bs)** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zopfrskhapbie6atl5vp9i4u5ujtdc8q0iaq1abg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9ie1ob1cdh2bs) ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you**** all ten episodes of** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ **for your family to enjoy**** FREE on DVD.** ** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter. **

name: With Honor Action
subject: Happy Birthday, Marines
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WITH HONOR ACTION, INC
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/cf075bb99e6b/2-acts-and-a-vp-nominee-14050393?e=33f53a5b1a)
---
| [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/cf075bb99e6b/2-acts-and-a-vp-nominee-14050393?e=33f53a5b1a)
---
| | | |
---
| | | | Friends, Last week, the United States Marine Corps celebrated its [249th birthday](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=41e7ffe67d&e=33f53a5b1a), and during this year’s birthday celebration aboard the USS Intrepid Museum, With Honor Action CEO and U.S. Marine Corps veteran, Rye Barcott, received the Corporal Allen J. Striffer Marine for Life Award. During his remarks, Rye shared his positive reflections on the future of America, saying in part, _**“The 250th birthday of the Marine Corps will be just one year before the 250th birthday of the United States, and there are some historians who have suggested that the average life of an empire is basically 250 years. Some folks have said [in response to this], 'where is America going to go?’ Well America is going to continue to be a beacon on the hill, and one of the reasons for that is because of the veterans that have fought and know that freedom isn’t free.” **_ To hear Rye’s full remarks at the birthday celebration, [click here](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=53952eade9&e=33f53a5b1a) or the video below.
---
| [ ](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=dc46899bc7&e=33f53a5b1a)
---
| To every Marine who has served, and to those who are currently serving, we thank you for service and sacrifice and we wish you a happy birthday! With Honor Action is committed to fighting polarization in Congress alongside a group of principled veteran leaders in the For Country Caucus. Learn more about With Honor Action, the For Country Caucus, and the marines we work alongside [here](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=09cb7659f6&e=33f53a5b1a).
---
| | | |
---
| Please follow With Honor Action on X via this [link](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=0707a1e479&e=33f53a5b1a),
and consider forwarding this to a friend who may be interested in learning -- and doing -- more for our country.

USO Supporter,
Next week, Americans will celebrate Thanksgiving with family, friends, food and fun. However you celebrate, we sincerely hope you enjoy this time with your family and loved ones.
But for service members deployed far from home, it'll just be another Thursday. Another day in a lonely barracks, thousands of miles away from their loved ones. Another day of the same old mess hall food. Another day of hoping they'll be able to find a secure internet connection to call home before their kids go to bed. **It 's up to us to brighten this day for them.**
The USO is determined to uplift our service members on this important day. That's why we've set a goal to fund 2,500 Thanksgiving meals at military bases and USO Centers around the world.
**And we 're so glad to share that the NFL is _matching_ all gifts, [but we're counting on YOU to help us reach this ambitious goal by Thursday at midnight.](https://links.e.uso.)**
[$37.50 CAN HELP PROVIDE
ONE THANKSGIVING MEAL**](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/YWdETY8Pzmf~/a2NSV2orWUFaVjRvL05FcVZUUzZaaWJJNGNINkdCZlZWa3N4U3U1YTQ1YTF6TzN5b1JjN09heWcwTTB6OFpncm9mT3FBNDNETzVaWHBTeFhYa0l2Q0FMbWZzNWo0cnBHOWJpWlJMeGJmeFU9S0/YkRpZ2poVVQzTnVhWVhmbzF5NnZ3OExNaS9qcjBHR292L2w0S1JIeXZQblBMRU94S2JlUXpCUU5kZEFjL2RZNk9lQjU5enU0alppOExscXBwWVhkRTNXeXZYZEFXNUJOS0)
---
[$75 CAN HELP PROVIDE
TWO THANKSGIVING MEALS**](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[$150 CAN HELP PROVIDE
FOUR THANKSGIVING MEALS**](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[GIVE ANOTHER AMOUNT ](https://links.e.uso.)
---
Spending Thanksgiving far away from their loved ones is just one of many, many sacrifices our military members make throughout the year in service of our country while asking nothing of us in return. **We may not be able to bring them home or fully understand the challenges they go through -- but we can make sure they enjoy a warm, festive Thanksgiving meal.**
**[Please, will you rush $37.50 or more right now to DOUBLE the value of your gift to support our heroes this Thanksgiving and year-round? There couldn't be a better time to donate this holiday season.](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/yvb0Cw_3yvFq/a2NSV2orWUFaVjRvL05FcVZUUzZaaWJJNGNINkdCZlZWa3N4U3U1YTQ1YTF6TzN5b1JjN09heWcwTTB6OFpncm9mT3FBNDNETzVaWHBTeFhYa0l2Q0FMbWZzNWo0cnBHOWJpWlJMeGJmeFU9S0/YkRpZ2poVVQzTnVhWVhmbzF5NnZ3OExNaS9qcjBHR292L2w0S1JIeXZQblBMRU94S2JlUXpCUU5kZEFjL2RZNk9lQjU5enU0alppOExscXBwWVhkRTNXeXZYZEFXNUJOS0)**
[MATCH MY GIFT](https://links.e.uso.)
---
Thank you for supporting our heroes in uniform when it matters most,
The USO
*The NFL is matching all gifts to the USO through a USO mail, email and text message campaign, dollar for dollar, up to a total of $50,000, through December 15, 2024.
**Your contribution will be joined with the contributions of others and used where it is needed most to strengthen the well-being of the people serving in America's military and their families.

name: Texas Organizing Project
subject: Sharing with our communities hope and a vision for change / Compartiendo con nuestras comunidades esperanza y una visión de cambio
body:
Lea el boletín en español abajo [#Español]
Having the community conversations needed to drive change in San Antonio
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Community%20Lunch%20SA.jpg]
Another community lunch for our Bexar County Right2Justice team is in the books ! Our thanks to all who joined us this past Saturday afternoon as we broke bread and dove into hard, honest conversation on what it will take to win more humane reforms to our local legal system.
Through our organizing of people who have dealt first-hand with the impacts of our legal system in Bexar County, we are identifying issues within the probation system that our community wants to see changed most.
Stay tuned in the coming weeks, as our own homegrown probation campaign starts to take shape in the coming months.
For more information on how you can get involved, email Michael Nachebe at mnachebe@organizetexas.org [mnachebe@organizetexas.org] .
Learning about what it takes to win for our Dallas communities
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/David%20Villalobos%20Dallas%20panel.jpg]
TOP's very own David Villalobos , our Political Director, participated in a panel discussion Thursday in Dallas with community allies to share his thoughts on what's needed to construct a bigger, bolder people-powered movement for change in the Metroplex, especially in this volatile political moment.
Solidarity and restoration will be key as our movement aims to win more locally while countering MAGA’s backwards policies. The Organizing School hosted the discussion.
For more information about the event, contact David at dvillalobos@organizetexas.org [dvillalobos@organizetexas.org] .
DECEMBER 11:
Dallas County TOP housing justice campaign meet-up
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Dallas%20housing%20action%20-%20Meadows%20at%20Ferguson.jpg]
TOP's Dallas County Housing Justice campaign is ramping up and looking to have a greater impact as we prepare for 2025.
Join us at our next campaign meeting on December 11 from 5 - 7 p.m. at the Dallas TOP office (3910 Gaston Ave., Ste. 250) where we'll break bread and plan out our campaign organizing efforts for the coming months. Come drop by and find out how you can plug in!
For more information, contact Iman at ibouzid@organizetexas.org [ibouzid@organizetexas.org] .
TOP Tip: Shop smart and protect yourself against pesky holiday scams
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Holiday%20shopping%20scam.jpeg]
Online shopping scams are terrible enough as is. When you factor in the holiday season, the scams get even more annoying and problematic. Check out these quick, easy tips from AARP on how you can better identify and protect yourself and your loved ones from these threats. [https://www.aarp.org/money/scams-fraud/info-2019/holiday.html]
Español
Manteniendo las conversaciones comunitarias necesarias para impulsar un cambio positivo en San Antonio
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Community%20Lunch%20SA.jpg]
¡Otro almuerzo comunitario para nuestro equipo de Right2Justice en el condado de Bexar está en los libros! Gracias a todos los que nos acompañaron este pasado sábado por la tarde mientras compartíamos el pan y nos sumergíamos en una conversación difícil pero honesta sobre lo que se necesita para lograr reformas más humanas en nuestro sistema legal local.
A través de nuestra organización con personas que han vivido de primera mano los impactos de nuestro sistema legal en el condado de Bexar, estamos identificando los problemas dentro del sistema de libertad condicional que nuestra comunidad más quiere cambiar.
Manténganse al tanto en las próximas semanas, ya que nuestra propia campaña local sobre libertad condicional comenzará a tomar forma en los próximos meses.
Para obtener más información sobre cómo puede participar, envíe un correo electrónico a Michael Nachebe a mnachebe@organizetexas.org [mnachebe@organizetexas.org] .
Aprendemos qué se necesita para ganar por nuestras comunidades de Dallas
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/David%20Villalobos%20Dallas%20panel.jpg]
David Villalobos , director político de TOP, participó en un panel de discusión el jueves en Dallas con aliados de la comunidad para compartir sus ideas sobre lo que se necesita para construir un movimiento más grande y audaz impulsado por la gente para el cambio en el Metroplex, especialmente en este momento político volátil.
La solidaridad y la restauración serán importantes, ya que nuestro movimiento busca ganar más a nivel local y oponerse a las políticas regresivas de MAGA. La Escuela de Organización organizó la discusión.
Para obtener más información sobre el evento, comuníquese con David en dvillalobos@organizetexas.org [dvillalobos@organizetexas.org] .
11 DE DICIEMBRE:
Reunión de la campaña TOP por la justicia en materia de vivienda del condado de Dallas
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Dallas%20housing%20action%20-%20Meadows%20at%20Ferguson.jpg]
La campaña de TOP por la justicia en la vivienda en el condado de Dallas está cobrando impulso y busca tener un mayor impacto mientras nos preparamos para 2025.
Únase a nosotros en nuestra próxima reunión de campaña el 11 de diciembre de 5 a 7 p. m. en la oficina de TOP en Dallas (3910 Gaston Ave., Ste. 250), donde compartiremos ideas y planificaremos nuestros esfuerzos de organización de campaña para los próximos meses. ¡Ven y descubre cómo puedes participar!
Para obtener más información, comuníquese con Iman a ibouzid@organizetexas.org [ibouzid@organizetexas.org] .
Consejos de TOP: Compre de forma inteligente y protéjase contra las molestas estafas navideñas
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Holiday%20shopping%20scam.jpeg]
Las estafas en las compras online son bastante terribles de por sí. Si se tiene en cuenta la temporada de fiestas, las estafas se vuelven aún más molestas y problemáticas. Vea estos consejos rápidos y sencillos de AARP sobre cómo puede identificar y protegerse mejor a usted y a sus seres queridos de estas amenazas. [https://www.aarp.org/money/scams-fraud/info-2019/holiday.html]
Copyright (C) 2024 Texas Organizing Project. All rights reserved.

Texas Organizing Project
700 S. Zarzamora, Suite 212
San Antonio, TX 78207
United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/_pdeZq7FqkSM3uHo3kegbw2?unsubscribedata=0NMfZaleqgkuL%2FkPnNwqIUUFEFTfMhKMizd0MNax%2FFtp9xZA7Y98E2r2mb00xRAx5I2fOaihc9Ers%2BnFJSv5HaqR0W%2BNevLu2c2W2MTq6rQZ1awfsQIZBBkJSAeLE3bZQcwIHNp6w6jVp3go4JqRc0BE1TFBpfSBFUUIBzZ75MNxpHfrf%2B%2FwPhF9cX2HC1yUnP6fsjjC1zU2ZjxnVSHCnj8FoXy7fAGj8aIvXzOPG2oho7DFryfrRNJkoMUXKp%2B5Ddew%2BDRLI6v7hG7xpi9XTFXYezpRd6LfOQPh86XPxDbTthSh7zGg2hQC9W6hPc7GrctWjShMijtQbF0DhremaR3KLQ4fu02LOsEnr9CKmFHEdcWBJcPLvW4QCFytEFXp43Y2uuD2K50ymLV8qC%2Fv%2BBmWGI%2BUGv48fc9U64B2oGI%3D .

name: Anderson Clayton
subject: Republicans are trying to take away your vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Taee21184-b5c9-4ba1-ace2-7456925409c8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| VICTORY: Justice Allison Riggs elected to the NC Supreme Court! Millions of North Carolinians voted to keep Justice Allison Riggs on the NC Supreme Court - and she is leading by **_722_** votes! 722 votes, people! That is a field margin. That means that everything you did, every door you knocked, every dollar you gave, every call you made, is what secured this victory. You own a piece of this win. In a race as close as this, we need to be prepared to defend your work. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tffa92aad-d070-456a-817c-7fae4e4f0744/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Here’s the thing we know about Republicans in North Carolina: they will do pretty much anything to entrench their own power. They have already filed protests with county boards to take away lawfully cast votes. We are going to have to go on defense in all 100 counties in a process that could take weeks. And if you know one thing about lawyers, it’s that they are expensive. [We need your help. Can you pitch in today to support Justice Riggs and Blue Amp Action?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdc4337ea-ae40-4775-98dd-4846e81fb638/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [SPLIT A DONATION →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T68a278cd-8188-466e-b28d-54ca4ec3edbb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Justice Riggs’ election means a strong voice on the Court to speak out for democracy, women’s freedom to control their own bodies, the rights of workers, and more. And it means we are one step closer to taking back the Court in 2028. We are ready to defend this victory and stand up for voters. Mounting this robust legal defense will be expensive, and we’re asking for your support. For justice, Anderson North Carolina Democratic Party Chair
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |

---|---
| **Blue Amp Action PAC**
PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/loc_em_fr_20241122_riggsclayton_b3_f1_s1_c1_90op_n-t1?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf9ecb8f0-e29a-4332-9f78-e9807553b65a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC

subject: President Obama is SO right...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee, dlcc
body:
State Democrats have been tasked with a heavy burden: protecting our democracy and standing up to state Republicans’ hate-filled agenda. | | |
---

body:
He just moved to keep his case against President Trump ALIVE so he can finish the job when he leaves office.

| |
---
| | | Friend -

**Corrupt Manhattan DA Alvin Bragg just spit in the face of the American People. **

The People chose Donald J. Trump as our 47th President. Yet Bragg just moved to keep his bogus case against President Trump ALIVE so he can finish the job when he leaves office.

That's why I'm calling for the IMMEDIATE DISMISSAL of this sham case. _**[If you agree, I ask you to sign my nationwide petition right here and right now:](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zt3t65pc6digap0euauk03ois020dtl1q6pruht8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cpg64p74cth2bs "If you agree, I ask you to sign my nationwide petition right here and right now:")**_

Thanks for all you do,
_- Steve _

STEVE SCALISE
**House Majority Leader**

---

_A personal note from Majority Leader Steve Scalise:_

I'm humbled to announce that I am your new House Majority Leader. My first order of business is checking in with our best supporters, so I just launched my new** MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY** for that specific reason.

_**[I'd be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zja5kltggejnt8kht1b3agkm02f9h4tbohhvsi6g_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cpg64p74cth2bs "I’d be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.")**_

Steve Scalise
_House Majority Leader_

name: Dan Goldman
subject: I don’t agree often with Jim Jordan, but…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
|
#
---
Peter, I spent the past two years as a member of Jim Jordan’s so-called Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government, through which he constantly made unsupported allegations that Special Counsel Jack Smith’s two indictments against Donald Trump were politically motivated. With his victory last week, it now appears that Trump’s primary objective in running for President — to stay out of jail and avoid accountability for his crimes — is coming to fruition because of the Department of Justice’s policy against prosecuting a sitting president. **So now that it appears that the Special Counsel’s investigation will soon come to a close, Trump’s MAGA allies in the House are doubling down on their partisan probing of the DOJ in servitude of Trump.** — Last week, Jim Jordan sent a letter to Jack Smith demanding that he preserve documents relating to his investigations into Donald Trump — setting the stage for Smith to testify to Congress, as all recent Special Counsels have done. Now Peter, I almost never agree with Jim Jordan, but this time I do. **The American people deserve to learn everything about the Special Counsel’s investigation, including whether Trump’s and Jordan’s unsupported allegations of politicization have any merit whatsoever.** For the last two years, Republicans’ allegations that Democrats and the Biden Administration “weaponized” the government were debunked time and time again. In reality, this is nothing more than projection. Republicans themselves are guilty of abusing the power of public office — targeting President Biden and his cabinet members with sham “investigations,” holding partisan Congressional hearings designed to help Trump’s campaign, and falsely attacking the FBI and the Department of Justice to go after Hunter Biden and protect Donald Trump. Of course, the Republicans’ sham impeachment investigation of President Biden was the best example of how their allegations crumbled when the evidence came in. So I join Chairman Jordan’s efforts to get to the bottom of House Republicans’ numerous allegations that have thus far been unsupported by any evidence — **because the American people deserve to know the truth about the Special Counsel’s investigations.** **[MAGA Republicans must be held accountable for their lies, their deception, and their abuses of power in Congress. If you support my work to shed light on their partisan games, please pitch in a contribution of any amount today:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97487581/513596887/205054163?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20241122_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGM0YjMyNS1lMGE4LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bgsBF3HfysQmNN6IVKSDxbeNBS139DDsHiR1ETyayB4=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97487582/513596888/205054163?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20241122_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGM0YjMyNS1lMGE4LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bgsBF3HfysQmNN6IVKSDxbeNBS139DDsHiR1ETyayB4=)

| [](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=3yxm9h9329w9q98ybs733cou5ocwjv3l914ak4m3e35dlxags54xnzf1cnfastv76bsbmtt3xtpv6llf2f2bkp603f42b2wwucbhro5q0o9ylt832dj9zljuggeff7jj8zbgua8h5vk8ux0i1v1f0f4sko38397m8uponlx7p2pnpohwkm15ln6xp2pjjb0v2kgov30p1ohu8g2e43jze3f700wjetkfy3m6lkmpqvmouo5ynoxcmkve4ut5pxeekoa8q7z0u9qvpzzalu1sgjaa4aqb4w19z&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sncx20&__onlt=h) | **[How Banks Can Seize Your Accounts?](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=3yxm9h9329w9q98ybs733cou5ocwjv3l91wevuuuuuv2yixkb0ox6m1x3cadtqww53tkkms29w622tvm79gy7testpo71rspmncekj2y2lg5vj4sgf3ln23maub6gtmd44tgphj1vcoas5tkqt9ncvvk53r9b0suvg1dxlrug07hrnrs9tfsmaw8uw91kro7zntizg96elv39l7p7be1ka17l1eki2qsw6jfmsnxq8te7fjcrjv8cffxs4f3st7j89ydxqoinh569kyb6tfaev0jxgfceyxbv&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sncx20&__onlt=h)

Banks don’t need your permission to legally seize your deposits. **This is how you can protect your savings. [**Learn More**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=3yxm9h9329w9q98ybs733cou5ocwjv3l920i4icj8jipm7v2jhwx0im4t5vgunxj3tv8y3r0jykwjl2dncyusyqigjwnpeo61idcutlg5zqa4p0gygmak492u6xvhczwlx9g93x7jid4pbl0drsgs9lrngdnmdbch5c6hl9gmk2rt9lnwbxcy1jha245l5zi7a5sexu0wy6an4nknnys5898k30llyg3umxrwkofpjb7jnbgwusd6b3qdd51voz1u6xmex2e5shf69xbptxic4p7318esb65z&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sncx20&__onlt=h)
---|---
[](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sncx20&__onlt=h) | [**BRICS Plans to End US Dollar Dominance**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sncx20&__onlt=h)

The anti-dollar drive spearheaded by China and Russia is spreading quickly. **Can this "Evil" plan be a threat to your wealth?** [**Learn More**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sncx20&__onlt=h)
[](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sncx20&__onlt=h) | **[New Leadership, Same Financial Risks?](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sncx20&__onlt=h)**

The dust has settled, but the economic risks haven't. **Discover what you need to know to shield your financial future.**
[**Learn More**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sncx20&__onlt=h)
* * *
**[Reality Check: Are You Prepared for What's Next?](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sncx20&__onlt=h)** With everything going on today, it’s natural to feel a growing sense of unease about the future. Rising costs of everyday essentials, inflation eating into the value of our hard-earned dollars, and news of escalating national debt are impacting people across the board. The middle class feels the pinch acutely, with many left wondering how long they can maintain their standard of living without making sacrifices. Global shifts, like the alliance of BRICS nations pushing for economic independence from the U.S. dollar, and ongoing market volatility add layers of unpredictability that complicate even the best-laid financial plans. It’s easy to find yourself asking: **[What happens if the world doesn’t return to “normal”?](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sncx20&__onlt=h)** One pressing concern that keeps emerging is the U.S. dollar’s diminishing purchasing power. According to recent data from the U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics and the World Bank, the dollar has lost over 20% of its purchasing power since 2020. In practical terms, this devaluation means that a dollar today buys far less than it did just four years ago, impacting everyday expenses, savings, and the value of long-term assets. **[For the average middle-class American, each percentage point lost further erodes financial security, forcing them to either cut back or explore alternative ways to protect and grow their savings.](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sncx20&__onlt=h)** [](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sncx20&__onlt=h) For many, day-to-day routines, busy schedules, and opinions from advisors, family, and friends often pull attention away from the bigger picture. When it comes to finances, it’s tempting to put off critical decisions, assume the status quo will hold, or rely on others’ advice without evaluating what’s truly best for long-term security. **[But in times like these, with so many factors shifting all at once, taking proactive steps has never been more important.](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sncx20&__onlt=h)** The question is no longer whether to take action but what kind of action to take. How can we prepare for an economic environment that feels as unpredictable as it is challenging? How can we maintain our lifestyles, protect our families, and still plan for the future, regardless of what uncertainties arise? **[Diversification—spreading out assets to manage risk—has long been a cornerstone of financial planning in uncertain times.](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sncx20&__onlt=h)** Throughout history, people have turned to various methods to safeguard their wealth with assets that retain value even when the market fluctuates. In today’s world, including options in your portfolio that offer stability, and long-term resilience can bring peace of mind and create a more secure future. **Why Gold and Silver?** These assets are not tied to any single economy, currency, or policy, giving them a unique role in a diversified portfolio. Unlike assets solely tied to market performance, gold and silver possess intrinsic value that has historically held up through market and economic shifts. They’re valued not because of fleeting trends but because of their enduring role as stores of value across civilizations, providing an extra layer of security when times feel uncertain. **[This is precisely why central banks and governments are steadily increasing their reserves of gold and silver.](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sncx20&__onlt=h)** We understand that taking action can seem complex, especially with so much information and influence pulling us in different directions. However, the biggest risk isn’t taking action—it’s staying fully exposed to a financial system already showing signs of cracks. The question isn’t whether assets like gold and silver value have—central banks and governments worldwide have already answered that for us. The real question is: How comfortable are you leaving your wealth fully exposed to a system under strain? Having clarity about your financial direction matters. Discover steps you can take toward a more diversified, secure future aligned with your goals. That is why we are giving you the[**free Wealth Education Guide**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sncx20&__onlt=h), in addition to **FREE $250** worth of silver with any qualified purchase above $10,000.

This guide is a valuable resource that shows you how to navigate these turbulent times and make informed decisions about your financial future. **[Request Your Free Learning Kit Today!](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sncx20&__onlt=h)** [](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sncx20&__onlt=h)

[](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sncx20&__onlt=h)

name: PoliticsPA
subject: Your PA pollsters recap Election 2024
body:
Tune into the latest installment of the Voices of Reason podcast. | | | |
---
| | | Welcome to the latest edition of _Voices of Reason_ where we’ll recap exclusive news and data featured in our most recent podcast.

This segment dives into PA's 2024 election with two top pollsters, **Chris Borick** of Muhlenberg College and **Berwood Yost** of F&M, unpacking the numbers, trends, and surprises that shaped the outcome. From voter turnout to shifting coalitions, you don't want to miss the driving factors behind PA's 2024 decision.
---
| **Big Names Make News**
---
| **Muhlenberg Pollster Chris Borick** illustrated the "degrees of magnitude" for 2024 voter issues. "Reproductive rights is a top tier issue, so is border security. But there were three tier levels up before you got to inflation and the economy – and Trump wins overwhelmingly on that." [[Watch](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=060f9163ba&e=b7b3eddce2)]

**F &M Pollster Berwood Yost **explained why new coalitions might not stick for the next election. "I think we're just in a competitive environment where either side might win because the divisions are so narrow." [[Watch](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a3e44ecc1b&e=b7b3eddce2)]
---
|
* * *
---
| **Numbers You Need to Know**
---
| _Public Opinion_
* Post-election, Americans are experiencing a range of emotions: **27% report feeling worried** , 15% hopeful, 12% relieved, and another 12% indifferent. [[IPSOS](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=f3f5c91692&e=b7b3eddce2)]
* Only 36 statewide recounts have occurred between 2000 and 2023. Of those, **just three have resulted in a reversal** of the original results. [[Democracy Docket](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=258d009148&e=b7b3eddce2)]

_Voter Issues_
* The top issues for Pennsylvania voters this cycle were the **economy at 31%** , the state of **democracy at 31%** , abortion at 15%, and immigration at 13%. [[Washington Post](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=ce53616057&e=b7b3eddce2)]
* **Only 13% of PA voters** decided who to vote for the month of the election. [[Washington Post](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=9a53b842ec&e=b7b3eddce2)]

_Elections_
* The McCormick vs. Casey Senate race was among the most expensive federal elections this cycle with **over $130.5 million** being spent by PACs supporting McCormick. [[WHYY](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=59e418c4f4&e=b7b3eddce2)]

---
|
* * *
---
| **Explained: Casey trailed Harris an abnormal amount in Philly + it's suburbs**
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=89add4a884&e=b7b3eddce2 "Why PA "Bled Red" Statewide in 2024 – Pollster Election Recap | Voices of Reason")
---
|
* * *
---
| **In case you missed it...**
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=99378a1508&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
| Fact-checkers often play umpire but rarely call it fair. One side’s truths are labeled “needs more context,” while the other’s whoppers get a pass. That’s why we launched [FactCheckPA](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=2940481ec7&e=b7b3eddce2): to sort fact from fiction, no matter the source. Follow us for breakdowns of claims from Pennsylvania politicians, interest groups, and media—and [send us tips](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=b534f7ce97&e=b7b3eddce2) on what to check.
---
| [Submit a Fact-Check Request](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=1073b68ad2&e=b7b3eddce2 "Submit a Fact-Check Request")
---
|
* * *
---
| The _Voices of Reason_ podcast has covered the most important issues in Pennsylvania politics – from [education funding](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=8f6c7e8b3e&e=b7b3eddce2) to [trust in elections](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=b3c5fe3633&e=b7b3eddce2). Secretary of the Commonwealth [Al Schmidt](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=11089a6917&e=b7b3eddce2), PA Treasurer [Stacy Garrity](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=f60b3ec101&e=b7b3eddce2), and House Appropriations Chairman [Jordan Harris](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=ce517f4353&e=b7b3eddce2) are just a few of many influential guests who have joined us for exclusive interviews and roundtable discussions.
Visit the _Voice of Reason_ [YouTube page](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=e557bae4fb&e=b7b3eddce2) to experience all the great moments you missed.
---
|
* * *
---
| **Get in Touch**
---
| We like smart ideas and want to hear from you.

Send feedback and inquire about appearing on _Voices of Reason_ , at [press@politicspa.com](mailto:press@politicspa.com?subject=Voices%20of%20Reason%20Podcast%20Inquiry).
---
|
---
| | | | | | [](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a31f73243e&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
[](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=bce14df34b&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
[](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7aa200ad58&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2024 Broad + Liberty, All rights reserved._
You're getting _Voices of Reason_ updates due to your interest in the PoliticsPA & Broad + Liberty websites, plus stories with impact in Pennsylvania, the Greater Philadelphia area, and beyond.

**Our mailing address is:**
Broad + Liberty323 West Front StreetSuite 200Media, PA 19063
[Add us to your address book](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7902855e75)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/profile?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7902855e75&e=b7b3eddce2&c=4467555d9e) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7902855e75&t=b&e=b7b3eddce2&c=4467555d9e).

[](https://login.mailchimp.com/signup/email-referral/?aid=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1)
---
|

# [BREAKING: ICC Issues Arrest Warrants for Netanyahu & Hamas Leaders](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=152008906&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUyMDA4OTA2LCJpYXQiOjE3MzIyODgwNjgsImV4cCI6MTczNDg4MDA2OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.9ICFgyJefDsJ1hPAZY4F3Vl3Ay7CSE9Cr--Zw2RKLdw)

| | [Qasim Rashid](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)

| Nov 22

Back in May I reported on [the ICC's application for arrest warrants for Israeli and Hamas leaders](https://substack.com/redirect/fd6fbe81-1850-40b8-97cc-499e1e7ff71b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Now, in a historic move, the International Criminal Court has formally issued arrest warrants for Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu, former Defense Minister Yoav Gallant, and Hamas leader Mohammed Deif, who is believed to be dead. While the Biden administration quickly condemned the arrest warrant, Netanyahu went a step further and accused the ICC of antisemitism. Meanwhile, the EU and hundreds of ICC member states confirmed they would enforce the arrest warrant should Netanyahu travel to any of those states. Netanyahu has already cancelled his trip to the Netherlands to avoid arrest. What do this arrest warrants mean, what is happening in the Biden White House, and what actions can we take to help push through a peaceful resolution? **Let 's Address This**.
