name: GIFFORDS
subject: The Office of Gun Violence Prevention is in jeopardy
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
The gun lobby is already pushing to dismantle this key office that was created to save lives from preventable gun violence
#

Friends -
The NSSF, which is the firearm industry’s trade association, is already calling on the incoming administration to dismantle the first-ever federal Office of Gun Violence Prevention.
The Office of Gun Violence Prevention was established by the Biden-Harris Administration in 2023. It has been a first-of-its-kind federal government effort to coordinate with states and federal officials to stop violence, invest in community intervention programs, respond to shootings, and support survivors.
In particular, the office is helping to distribute the largest investment in youth mental health ever, by giving $1 billion to schools across the country and hiring and training more than 14,000 mental health professionals who can help students process the trauma of gun violence. Shutting down this office would be a severe blow to public safety.
It’s no surprise that the NSSF, whose mission is gun manufacturer profits, would rather line their pockets through selling more firearms than keep our communities safe from preventable gun violence.
Our work to call on the Trump Administration to keep the Office of Gun Violence Prevention in place is well underway, and we need your support to help us in this important advocacy.
[**So please, will you make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today to help us call on the incoming administration to keep the vitally important Office of Gun Violence Prevention in place?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-nov24.MBs8nS&refcode=em241122-1-30&t=1&akid=9484%2E3935704%2Edlrn8L)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

Peter, I'm honored to announce that I was just elected Freshman President by my fellow Freshmen House colleagues! ## Scientists Find Rats Love to Drive Tiny Cars
Scientists have discovered that laboratory rats don't just drive tiny cars--they actually [enjoy taking the scenic route](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8kDGvozAQhH8NdEb2hgQoXFxDl2uvRMZe480ZHNkbEP_-xOk1r3ndN5rRaDR_ntPTUKRt-W1W1H7xE_s0gYRWKCUAJmconlNbO-0RAW81atXdAIa-7VQdNMJw730Pj2FWflCqmy167_zduBn83dakrzalAFQvleyb1lvjnJNzZx-yU1C1Eh1xys0r0cYBfTzTjrmxaa2jDszvUt1-VTBWMB7H0UTasVjCzeKVqWAMaCKHCsYNPzl9ed8kU-Ei2HyWwCKbi5NwmXYUTNsprMlFcMBTcEp_L1pF-rBIm3ilU2RyWOqs3fugGKk8uqqVy2oo_l_JPz23a_gXAAD__wAMd0E). At the University of Richmond, neuroscientists found their rodent test subjects mastered custom-built "rat-operated vehicles" (ROVs). The rats showed enthusiasm for their motorized adventures, often jumping into their tiny cars and revving their "lever engines" with the eagerness of teenage drivers. [Watch a video here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8z71qwzAUxfGnkbYY3SvVcgYNhWK6pFOh0MXo48pWkaPUUWz89sV9gKznwA_-X5fhYlNO1_HDzmTiGIcay4AC1QnghDgEm_I-KB5MJEKSnAxoiXjulAY-GaBWYKfRCuk7VBDh7JzTSvuI4sU7nsyhASBCJ0B0jYrehhCE074VGpApQSHVsjQ_JV3rRDHvZaWl8WXm2Uy13u5MvjLsGfbbtjV7edSHo-M_Flv9xGS_MvkGble_7-7zWyu-mHDbUs7p3mqmxDjblP_J-ixzNfgXAAD__xReVQw). The study began with a humble cereal container and evolved into a "rodent version of Tesla's Cybertruck." It revealed an unexpected bonus: rats display visible signs of joy and anticipation--including a newly observed "umbrella handle" tail position that suggests they're [quite literally high on life](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8kLFuhDAQRL_GdHuyF86GwkUaukubEhl7gY04jPCK0_19RKS0aVYrzejNaL4ewyPwytv8GZ7kp3kaZMoDamzAGEAcUuD1PTRV8hMRUl2RN65G7NrGmWrx2jqK1AVrR2PvY6xd19Z1Z3Q33q2xXcX-ohmDaFptdHtrphhSSnp00WpnUDWaEks-bt-ZN1loWt_5pOMW87Na_SKyF1V_KOwV9tt7z0UuSWF_gRX2xlzHKexLZNoi_X3CRQoIhbjwNsMRpMCSXyAZ0sEnQeISryiQJQjIQnDkRNtlCydBgI0owZQPKDtRUthXh0_7i9eVi3Wq0fMz8PrbVP5b7_T4EwAA__8R5XM9).
## Liver Donor Meets Boy She Saved
A New York woman, Sandy Flash, [donated a portion of her liver](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx80LGOtCAUBeCnwQ4DFxykoPiTP26zs-2WBuWid4MwUeLEt9_MPMDW38nJyfm-j3dPifLy5Td0cYljjWUEAZpLyQHG4Cldo26Ci4iAqkEnjQKwvTayWd2k7c0qCybOQWgxm07IzqKwoGyEKBpyrzYpAWQvpOhbHWcfQhCTmW_CSGBaYKBa9vanUK4rxnSVE_d2LluT3Frr42DqH4OBweCnOePzaJfyYgbDx_0ln3RSXhgMz7L5zDfEevCpXHzF9MDAD38iT-8QL_viMw8l-0olMxiOWvaLqYECU_-l7Hppul43uwuPJ6VEx80wLZbNU3pvqn_9dDr4DQAA__-Hcmq5) to one-year-old Sonny, who was diagnosed with biliary atresia. Flash and Sonny met at Cleveland Clinic, where Flash, who called the donation "the most fulfilling thing I've ever done" next to having her children, met the boy she helped save. After Flash's donation, Sonny has made progress in growth and development, with his mother calling organ donation "an unconditional gift." Watch [a video of their meeting here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8z8FqhDAUheGnSXYjuTfR6CKLQnHVmUWhdCnR3GhKnIiTUezTF_sAsz0HPvi_r93Vhhju483OZPzou-xThwLVBeCC2Dkb4tEp7ownQpKcDGiJ2NRKA58MITSNrWSJDm0pQfXNUDkBquo1CUE8mFMDQIRagKgL5QfrnBO9HiqhAZkS5EJOa_GTwj1P5OORNlqLIc08minn5cHkG8OWYbvve3GkZ372dP7nYvMwMdluTL5_xvIDb0vC3y--GrfsIcbwqDRTYpxtiP9kfpW5GfwLAAD__wA8VQo).
## Rural Grandma Becomes Fashion Star
A Zambian grandmother has become a social media sensation after her New York-based stylist granddaughter began photographing her in [high-fashion outfits against rural backdrops](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8zz2OqzAUxfHV2F2Q77WDoXDxGrq8dkrkj2twZHAEVgiz-hGzgOmOdKSf9P96jA-bclqn_3YhE6c41lhGFKhuADfEMdiUz1HxYCIRkuRkQEvEvlMa-Gy0u1Po0Qvr0HUyopQgAFvfoyTygidzaQCI0AkQXaOityEE4bRvhQZkSlBItWzNs6S1zhTzWd60Nb4sPJu51tfO5D-GA8PhOI7GOX99DIeVjp3hYLeafKZr-g-e-ft5V-en8M2E15FyTnurmRLTYlP-VetfpW-DPwEAAP__apFXAw). Margret Chola, in her mid-80s and known as _Legendary Glamma_ , has gained [225,000 Instagram followers](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8z7FuwyAQgOGngS0WnElwBoZKlbd07Ygu3IGpwI5sFMtvX7kP0P3XJ_3fD__AXPKcvrCyiyn6FhcPCsxF6wuAJ8zl8EaSi8zAvWSnbQ9wH4zVcnIQhmju8XqngDdlgEiZqwnMVuNTA8vsTk1rAD0orYbOxIBEpJ423JTVIIxiym1Zu58lz23iWI7lzWsXliqLm1p7baL_EDAKGPd97_K8NUwr1rMQMBZOPBOuh08Fa8Wz7MepiP6TZ7k6eu25lLzdrDAqVczlj27_7b4d_AYAAP__mAdZLA) since Diana Kaumba started the "Granny Series" in 2023. Chola, who models designer clothes and accessories in her village setting near Lusaka, says the project has given her a new purpose, while Kaumba uses the series to highlight that older people still have much to contribute.

From a rural grandma turning heads as an unexpected fashion icon to a Marine quietly stepping off a plane , today's Feel Good Flyover hopes to remind you that our world is full of good news and wonder. If today's edition made you smile, hit reply and let us know--we'd love to hear from you! We're sponsored on this Friday by our friends at , upgrade your windows and doors this winter. | Scientists Find Rats Love to Drive Tiny Cars Scientists have discovered that laboratory rats don't just drive tiny cars--they actually . At the University of Richmond, neuroscientists found their rodent test subjects mastered custom-built "rat-operated vehicles" (ROVs). The rats showed enthusiasm for their motorized adventures, often jumping into their tiny cars and revving their "lever engines" with the eagerness of teenage drivers. . The study began with a humble cereal container and evolved into a "rodent version of Tesla's Cybertruck." It revealed an unexpected bonus: rats display visible signs of joy and anticipation--including a newly observed "umbrella handle" tail position that suggests they're . Liver Donor Meets Boy She Saved A New York woman, Sandy Flash, to one-year-old Sonny, who was diagnosed with biliary atresia. Flash and Sonny met at Cleveland Clinic, where Flash, who called the donation "the most fulfilling thing I've ever done" next to having her children, met the boy she helped save. After Flash's donation, Sonny has made progress in growth and development, with his mother calling organ donation "an unconditional gift." Watch . When I ran for this seat in 2022, our race came down to just 564 votes. It was the second-closest race in the entire country. This year, I know that we can finish the job. Right now, our race is **_still too close to call_** and we know it’s going to come down to every last vote. **[Will you split a donation between our recount fund and Fair Shot PAC today to ensure we can count every vote in CA-13 and flip this seat?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97509031/513659445/536045643?refcode=AU_FSP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20241122_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTk2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWI1MGJhOC1mYmE4LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BSO7_AYjtkOVBYVJr4O-fVTWQYNnus45z3FfloaEi-w=)** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97509034/513659448/536045643?refcode=AU_FSP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20241122_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTk2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWI1MGJhOC1mYmE4LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BSO7_AYjtkOVBYVJr4O-fVTWQYNnus45z3FfloaEi-w=)

I decided to run for Congress again because the San Joaquin Valley deserves leaders who work just as hard as we do. I got into this race to finally get results for this community, just like I did for 10 years in the California State Assembly.
**I’ve been part of close races before, and we knew this year’s race would be another one. As votes continue to be counted, I just want to say how thankful I am to have your support.**
**Let’s finish the job. That means counting every single vote.**
**[This isn’t over. Please split a donation of $25 or more between our recount fund and Fair Shot PAC. In a race this close, everything counts.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97509036/513659451/536045643?amount=25&refcode=AU_FSP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20241122_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTk2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWI1MGJhOC1mYmE4LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BSO7_AYjtkOVBYVJr4O-fVTWQYNnus45z3FfloaEi-w=)**

Greetings

The Young Democrats of America will gather for an exciting Winter Meeting from **December 6-8** in **Boston, Massachusetts**. This in-person event will bring together young leaders from across the nation for discussions and reflections on the 2024 election results, hands-on training sessions, important organizational business, and much more. **We want to remind you that today, November 22, is the final day to book your hotel.** You can find all the information in this email on our website at **[yda.org/ydabos](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.Khhv6i-A6kGAx4x-ts_8mqfLav433QGxwS8LKF02-tc5qhDhhJOtrktTf5HsODWGqpi6BqSfjRTkmNZLSbLOLPPQwEZlenmw5HYbtqMmmD2rIICNvveGfyAbnAg38HTP35kFIUSLG05AZPdRR6xqxj29NyIzd2Z9kbsl_QlXMa_NKcVxBNraGahulhcEErk6y7eh0APeHcpwetb_ZW4Zb6XEmFpbi2K2UfYAC4jI6Wf8MSXmD3VsW3YYbQdIg8gyiTontYKnEN8ZjFPUdU9LEGRKJXO6hP10Y8kdd0XR890/4bo/objkZ9l4RFe5Z7TizlTxnw/h1/h001.AjW4vlHsGAVnc9-QAXyrufkXbSH6Pl_4_27ThIUi9JM)

Top Democrat,

Last week, we sent you an urgent petition asking you to stand with Jack Smith after Trump said Smith should be thrown out of the country.

**But our records indicate that you still haven’t signed.** We’re still [17] your state signatures short of our goal!

[**Team, we can’t abandon Special Counsel Jack Smith. name: Josh Hawley on Fox News
subject: “We need a new Church Committee to look into the DOJ and FBI”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=502c0431a2bd41919eb6f0a07e0284b0&_e=GV8CHH_VVJDsNfvUfxDxbW6M4SYfuF_5xCff8vPB4ehE2gCs0ZnoRv9CUKJN1gRzTIyMboW1kGEZugLkdc3W0aBq7bd7Kg8mIiL64mReyI5Eqig9BUOB49JDk9i0ZeqmxUSjZik_D0ec7FCcYZqENmSaOCnYY3p1cdS-mjSqFR556Zs8suecygxmFrzhKa-H1QFhYXNomUP342DMUE5QVvZtUZihZiUOlOnzxGcjYGXvdy5pWZFeBUpRkeZQECIZySWy9VojKSpmsBJoaTstdAaG6kqCpeGqxGlAestISofBVT1MzgkUMOB3tfdsrCqs06pabPGAakkxeCUrSXP4ZPsadoe2vKvbE78y1DD61JdirQu71QZMs4f2Yqi2e99U24Y_MAuuG1gJy-hxryIFog%3D%3D)
---
Peter,
---
For far too long, America's Department of Justice and the FBI have wielded their power as a political weapon. We've seen them target conservative groups, pro-life individuals, all the way up to President Trump. It's out of control, it's un-American, and it needs to stop!

We need a new Church Committee to hold hearings, discover the truth, and present it all to the American people. Sunlight is the best disinfectant, and we need to shed light on what these agencies actually do, and how deep the rot is. Order and honor must be restored to these agencies! **WATCH THE INTERVIEW BELOW ⬇︎⬇︎⬇︎**
---
[](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=502c0431a2bd41919eb6f0a07e0284b0&_e=GV8CHH_VVJDsNfvUfxDxbW6M4SYfuF_5xCff8vPB4ehE2gCs0ZnoRv9CUKJN1gRzTIyMboW1kGEZugLkdc3W0aBq7bd7Kg8mIiL64mReyI5Eqig9BUOB49JDk9i0ZeqmxUSjZik_D0ec7FCcYZqENmSaOCnYY3p1cdS-mjSqFR556Zs8suecygxmFrzhKa-H1QFhYXNomUP342DMUE5QVvZtUZihZiUOlOnzxGcjYGUwrObYLXllYlMLr6rWrdgTY7-KBZlQX4hr_TL0J_1YDX6xpsc6aiZi2E_j6NMtrKL9Y1jgW-M3C1bSoLrvNGfo9X3pfMyX6EiNaiyHlPV9Rf8Uh3Lp0UmP8C8vh2N1G9zEBA1idzFYyrczfW5Pg0VAoVNs73KbI8mAz8QNGImMPA%3D%3D)
---
The DOJ and FBI should work _FOR_ the American taxpayers, yet we are reading stories of how those very same taxpayers are targets of persecution and prosecution based on political ideologies contrary to the left-wing agenda. Here's a great quote from the interview:

_What I think we need Sean, we need a new Church Committee like we had way back in the 70s that looked into the abuses of the CIA and the IRS. We need one of those now for the Department of Justice and the FBI. We need to open the books on what these agencies have done, how they've gone after Trump, how they’ve gone after conservatives, how they’ve gone after religious Americans, people of faith. We need to lay it all be and then we need to fire everybody involved and we need to overhaul DOJ and the FBI._
---
[**STAND WITH JOSH HAWLEY >>>**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=502c0431a2bd41919eb6f0a07e0284b0&_e=GV8CHH_VVJDsNfvUfxDxbW6M4SYfuF_5xCff8vPB4ehE2gCs0ZnoRv9CUKJN1gRzTIyMboW1kGEZugLkdc3W0aBq7bd7Kg8mIiL64mReyI5Eqig9BUOB49JDk9i0ZeqmxUSjZik_D0ec7FCcYZqENmSaOCnYY3p1cdS-mjSqFR556Zs8suecygxmFrzhKa-H1QFhYXNomUP342DMUE5QVvZtUZihZiUOlOnzxGcjYGXYse8HMU9bLxcD0icA36VInWiYbXKp6h69E0ZAO6iL1djOI5PMu3XfhrgKit3wUiD8a0WfbOnYJRWkLREsqEceFZDg99LcjwIxzBMb1ok3pb1lx_C0bjoys5fqG3TY8e3ZfayJcHnosoLS9e_8mLhAEo56W6HdU1d3cJaB5PncNg%3D%3D)
---
In Liberty,

Team Hawley

name: George Whitesides
subject: Your input requested
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97511313/513666626/2104826962?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWU3MjhjYS1mZmE4LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dg78ImI5Ee88QoCH7FaqTerrwijv2C2RrqcTLW91XCY=)
Peter,

With the election in our rearview mirror and Thanksgiving around the corner, I’m reflecting on how grateful I am to represent California’s 27th District in Congress.

I’ve spent the last week in Washington, DC participating in orientation for new Members, and I’m fired up to get started come January.

I won’t sugarcoat it: With Republicans in control of the House, it will be a battle – but I’m prepared to keep fighting for good local jobs, lower everyday costs, safeguard reproductive freedom, protect Social Security and Medicare, and much more.

That’s why I’m reaching out to you today with our post-election survey. Listening to your thoughts and getting work done for you in Congress is my top priority, and your answers to our new survey will help inform that.

**[Will you take just a minute to complete the survey?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97511314/513666627/1304592134?refcode=em-11.22.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWU3MjhjYS1mZmE4LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dg78ImI5Ee88QoCH7FaqTerrwijv2C2RrqcTLW91XCY=&emci=73e728ca-ffa8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=79e728ca-ffa8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=36198509)**

clean_body: | = Peter, With the election in our rearview mirror and Thanksgiving around the corner, I’m reflecting on how grateful I am to represent California’s 27th District in Congress. I’ve spent the last week in Washington, DC participating in orientation for new Members, and I’m fired up to get started come January. I won’t sugarcoat it: With Republicans in control of the House, it will be a battle – but I’m prepared to keep fighting for good local jobs, lower everyday costs, safeguard reproductive freedom, protect Social Security and Medicare, and much more. That’s why I’m reaching out to you today with our post-election survey. Listening to your thoughts and getting work done for you in Congress is my top priority, and your answers to our new survey will help inform that. | ** Thank you, George =** | = = = George has spent his career solving problems. Now, he’s ready to deliver for the people of California's 27th Congressional District. = To learn more about George and his commitment to working families, please visit: = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . George Whitesides for Congress P.O. Box 221776 Newhall, CA 91322 United States

name: Lindsey Scholten
subject: Get ready for OLCV’s Virtual Town Hall with Senator Wyden!
body:
Join us on December 19th! Make sure you RSVP now. | | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97511455/513667191/138054893?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY0ZjM0NGQ4LWZmYTgtZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ehHfYfsykPSSGiZ9Ov1MhDoFeTy522xKjO5hJIMBlhM=&emci=351d15b0-3ca8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=64f344d8-ffa8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=2107230) Hi Peter, I know there’s a lot on everyone’s mind as we continue to grapple with the federal election results. With climate chaos hitting our planet hard, we need to continue taking bold steps to address the devastating effects of climate impacts. The results of the federal election will make our work difficult to say the least, so it’s time for states to push back and step up for climate action. We’re ready to do that right here in Oregon. As we prepare for the newly elected president and Congress to take office, OLCV is hosting a Virtual Town Hall on the Environment with Senator Wyden, to [learn directly from Senator Wyden about the ongoing fight for climate action and environmental protections in D.C.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97511456/513667192/-1782305511?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY0ZjM0NGQ4LWZmYTgtZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ehHfYfsykPSSGiZ9Ov1MhDoFeTy522xKjO5hJIMBlhM=&emci=351d15b0-3ca8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=64f344d8-ffa8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=2107230) **WHEN:** Thursday, December 19th, at 11:30 am PT. Mark your calendars today!
**WHERE:** Zoom webinar (link will be shared a few days before the town hall)
[**RSVP for OLCV’s Virtual Town Hall on the Environment with Senator Wyden**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97511457/513667193/-1782305511?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY0ZjM0NGQ4LWZmYTgtZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ehHfYfsykPSSGiZ9Ov1MhDoFeTy522xKjO5hJIMBlhM=&emci=351d15b0-3ca8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=64f344d8-ffa8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=2107230) Senator Ron Wyden has been standing up for conservation and environmental values in D.C., voicing our support for strong safeguards for our air, water, forests, wildlife, and communities. Leadership on these important issues at the federal level is now more important than ever. On December 19th, Senator Wyden will update us on what he is working on now, talk to us about how the climate investments of the IRA will benefit Oregon and how the federal election outcome may impact those investments, and answer selected audience questions. We will also get to learn the latest on efforts to secure permanent protections for the Owyhee Canyonlands. [You can submit questions about your top priority environmental issues at the bottom of the RSVP form.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97511458/513667194/-1782305511?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY0ZjM0NGQ4LWZmYTgtZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ehHfYfsykPSSGiZ9Ov1MhDoFeTy522xKjO5hJIMBlhM=&emci=351d15b0-3ca8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=64f344d8-ffa8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=2107230) We hope to see you there! Sincerely,
Lindsey Scholten
OLCV Executive Director |

| | Dear Friend, Today I need your help to defend myself against the Left’s “lawfare” before they can financially destroy my family.All I ask is that you **[Rush a “FIRST AMENDMENT FUND” Emergency contribution before midnight tonight.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=d04f2ec70e664ac29fb9211ca29849b2&_e=RuQnwgMhf_suYOso09BsK9DQNGqQzm2eS8nCAQ64SwXr6iumVv3_4_3jcy_cOWXdyT4RWj1YEGx_zVK7c1mmoNfp4UoBI256_66M2XGRmx-LZ6NhtJzMqVLgseg8JgxihqrQAjxbK8PRQbGXMdwXLKOteFhFfINibN3VvC1uZpdkRrSIgC3GQlb7TsM_cnbC_WQLHMyfcfY5PVRsQSf41CjsLCPHnP7NMKvjLD0iyARyK5WTempNP08DPdlv2Ij5cdXVD_zyCUexqNPokjp0jn_rii6ln6IHkOlA1VRMmLu_0ztf8Q6JR2T_gS825JYiFo7jmR9xJ3cg-EP3rcj2jacuszIoiGvczthVAoA5H8O6Sy5erKwPhZrSGuhbnH4dP2fR1X5AMapPJrwirOsrhF4WRQElbOokuwlPxqd3GFI%3D)** When an Arizona Election Official went on the record promising to _“Make life hell”_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself in this defamation case – and I'm afraid this battle is only getting started. Think about it. The Left wanted to force me to pay a multi-million-dollar legal judgment because I told the truth and called out election fraud.Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity.Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American. It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections.That’s what happened to me. Each day that the weight of this lawfare feels too much to bear, I think about President Trump and how he takes every attack head-on and never once thinks about backing down.Just think about what’s happening to him.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him -- his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom. **And he fights on.** So, if the Left thinks that some liberal-packed court threatening me with a hundred-million-dollar fine will get me to back down from this fight, **then they know _nothing_ about me.**And they know nothing about _you_ , too.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.This is about protecting their rights, giving them a prosperous America to live in, and defending our family name.To me, that was worth the millions of dollars this could have cost.Because nothing in this world can come between me and my family.Not the Left’s lawfare. Not power-drunk liberal prosecutors.Not litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.Thankfully, a generous group has stepped up and is willing to help me cover my legal expenses.So today, I must ask you to contribute to this new**“First Amendment Fund”** to help me defeat the Left’s sham lawfare. [**My friend, could you rush back a generous, tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, or more to help me cover the court fees, lawyers, expert witnesses, counsels, and so much more?**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=d04f2ec70e664ac29fb9211ca29849b2&_e=RuQnwgMhf_suYOso09BsK9DQNGqQzm2eS8nCAQ64SwXr6iumVv3_4_3jcy_cOWXdyT4RWj1YEGx_zVK7c1mmoNfp4UoBI256_66M2XGRmx-LZ6NhtJzMqVLgseg8JgxihqrQAjxbK8PRQbGXMdwXLKOteFhFfINibN3VvC1uZpdkRrSIgC3GQlb7TsM_cnbC_WQLHMyfcfY5PVRsQSf41CjsLCPHnP7NMKvjLD0iyARyK5WTempNP08DPdlv2Ij5cdXVD_zyCUexqNPokjp0juRLNyuqf-gLOWxSYigMVSFSTzarRyzdgxzwi4gyVFOIp3WYHvmmuaoeyQm5vk4PwwMG_i_qNnJlANjk3mlJ7dgjwP-HHtWSlHsbXSOMgn6yHWDYnPlwSl2PVncKYOfKOrX6fgmgSpA2d6zTkE3F7CY%3D) The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility. They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy.

# [That Thanksgiving Turkey Could be Deadly](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=283449&post_id=152024961&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUyMDI0OTYxLCJpYXQiOjE3MzIzMDA5MjEsImV4cCI6MTczNDg5MjkyMSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4MzQ0OSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.1WWrUKCvN3eLmgHqAo7hX-8jI_2LyhIGtI8-RZXKePE)
### COVID isn't the only bug to be worried about this holiday season
Nov 22
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=283449&post_id=152024961&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUyMDI0OTYxLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczMjMwMDkyMSwiZXhwIjoxNzM0ODkyOTIxLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjgzNDQ5Iiwic3ViIjoicmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.MgDhopPVw-wWABgwwrsjktMfzHrZPHQwGgutO3XPZ4Y&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=283449&post_id=152024961&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUyMDI0OTYxLCJpYXQiOjE3MzIzMDA5MjEsImV4cCI6MTczNDg5MjkyMSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4MzQ0OSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.1WWrUKCvN3eLmgHqAo7hX-8jI_2LyhIGtI8-RZXKePE&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/rebekahjones/p/that-thanksgiving-turkey-could-be?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/67e4fbe6-af7e-4a61-9e57-a4943173d160?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I won't give you my annual spiel about the harm caused by the mass meat production industry on global climate, regional environment and workers. I'll save that for the next Earth Day, which marks 15 years of vegetarianism for me and my family.
I also won't go into why you should disinvite your MAGA uncle, aunt, cousin, etc., though I hope you respect yourself not to surround yourself with bad people on what is supposed to be a day of community.
Fall means increased viral spread, and with the unique challenges of COVID-19, Influenza, H5N1 and a few active outbreaks of food-borne illnesses, this article is more of a public awareness campaign for your holiday planning.
I hope that you've heard by now of the highly infectious, **deadly[H5N1 outbreak](https://substack.com/redirect/a4a6a170-3339-417f-9ca4-8345d9882e1d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that's been simmering in the United States since 2022.
That slow simmer is now boiling over, and it could spell trouble if you plan to prepare certain kinds of foods for your family this Thanksgiving.
With a[ 50-60% mortality rate](https://substack.com/redirect/c9210cb1-866a-46a1-aced-721ff7502254?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), highly pathogenic Avian Influenza A(H5N1) first appeared in the United States in backyard and commercial poultry flocks in Colorado in February 2022.
By April 2024, the virus had infected dairy workers in Texas, then started showing up in dairy products soon after. Not long after that, the virus began showing up in pigs and[ cats](https://substack.com/redirect/6b8080c1-b8a2-4401-84ed-afdfb8001636?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Raw milk consumption[ killed half the resident cat population on a farm in Texas](https://substack.com/redirect/6b8080c1-b8a2-4401-84ed-afdfb8001636?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) this year just days after they were fed raw, unpasteurized dairy milk.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..VjI6OWY4q60hBUBc3H03VWV-TI2zk-zZzNfP07gzZhc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=152024961)
Testing by the FDA has found the virus byproducts in dairy milk, cottage cheese, sour cream, and baby formula.
Today, H5N1 is widespread in wild and commercial animals in all 48 contiguous states.
The CDC acknowledges that [there are far more cases than are being reported](https://substack.com/redirect/4ee40cf5-ce5c-4243-88a0-1d8998aed0cc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). One case in September was discovered during testing for seasonal influenza. Eight farm workers in Colorado showed they had previous infection out of 115 tested.
There are currently no publicly available H5N1 tests, and there are currently no vaccines (regular flu shot will not prevent bird flu infection).
The symptoms are similar to other kinds of influenza and even COVID-19: conjunctivitis (pink eye), cough, fatigue, fever, headaches, muscle or body aches, runny nose, shortness of breath.
The CDC website that's supposed to show proper handling of meat this holiday season goes to a 404 error page ([seriously, it does](https://substack.com/redirect/2b1520e5-d52d-4ab8-9c77-9221f866bc88?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)).
But another version can be found [here. ](https://substack.com/redirect/3111f5f5-0fe8-405b-a8a9-091cc1265a91?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)Hopefully the information is up to date, because the [date shown on the page is from July](https://substack.com/redirect/3cdc7c3b-3601-4bec-8099-5873ee39ed37?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and a lot has changed since then.
While proper cooking (internal temperature of at least 165*F) can reduce risk in poultry and eggs, handling the raw ingredients with bare bands or without proper protection still presents a serious risk.
* The first recommendation by the CDC is to avoid dead birds. A turkey is a dead bird.
* Second recommendation: Don't touch surfaces that could be contaminated, like your kitchen counter, sink and anywhere else contact with the dead bird has been made
* Don't go to poultry farms or bird markets, and definitely don't hunt wild birds.
* Wear a mask (this recommendation goes over so well these days), and throw away your masks/gloves after use
* Use the following measures if you are unable to avoid contact with wild birds or dead animals:
* Wear gloves and, after removing them, wash hands thoroughly
* Wear an N95 respirator
* Use eye protection, such as googles.

Unless you're planning to cook that bird in full Walter White lab gear, just don't get one this year.
Human cases were slow to start, but have[ recently exploded](https://substack.com/redirect/df124ce6-12b1-4fb4-bb6b-ae014af8db89?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) relative to where we were six months ago.
A recent case in a Canadian teenager suggests the virus has adapted to become more infectious to humans. Two additional cases in California this week [with no known contact with infected animals ](https://substack.com/redirect/df124ce6-12b1-4fb4-bb6b-ae014af8db89?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)also worry scientists about the virus' rapid adaptation.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/79550023-f25c-4611-ba68-550b7d456854?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The Biden administration's absolute failure in addressing this outbreak has become somewhat of an open wound for experts, especially on the heels of the COVID-19 pandemic.
"In an ideal world, we would be testing to monitor for signs that these changes are happening. But we're not testing nearly enough -- not nearly enough cattle or humans in particular -- to understand how the bird flu virus is evolving," Dr. Celine Gounder[ told CBS News.](https://substack.com/redirect/df124ce6-12b1-4fb4-bb6b-ae014af8db89?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Dr. Rick Bright, a federal virologist turned COVID-19 whistleblower during the Trump administration, said "The rapid spread of H5N1 & the escalation of risk to life & economy could've been prevented. It's sad, but true."
"That said, we can still stop it, but only if we act swiftly & decisively. We know what to do, but need strong leadership, coordination, collaboration, & funding," he added.
Dr. Eric Fiegl-Ding, another expert [who raised early alarms about COVID-19](https://substack.com/redirect/1c25e610-a1a1-40e5-b5d5-b736f99240c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), has also repeatedly raised the issue within expert communities.
All of those concerns have seemingly fell on deaf ears at the agencies responsible for handling such crises.
Mesoscale News with Rebekah Jones is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..VjI6OWY4q60hBUBc3H03VWV-TI2zk-zZzNfP07gzZhc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=152024961)
If you do plan to invite your MAGA relatives, and you refuse to listen to sound, expert advice and forego the dead bird this year, at least make sure you get your MAGA family to deal with the raw turkey. And serve them the heaviest helpings of anything that might be contaminated.
* * *
### Other food illnesses
There are eight unrelated and active food pathogen outbreak[ investigations ongoing ](https://substack.com/redirect/6787f203-b5fc-4022-89de-b7190f94d732?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)with the FDA:
* Five outbreaks of [E. coli](https://substack.com/redirect/8505806d-ed15-4119-b55a-69bd07a864dd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* Two cases of Salmonella
* One case of Listeria

Six of those cases are from unknown causes/products. As for the other two:
An organic carrot farm in California was contaminated with E. coli from a neighboring cattle operation.
McDonald's onions were contaminated with E. coli during production/processing at the Taylor Farms processing center in Colorado Springs, Colorado-- a facility that also processes meat products.
E. coli does not naturally occur in plants. Modern use of corn and other starches as cattle feed cause the over-production of E. coli bacteria to breakdown the food in the gut of the cattle. Corn is not part of a cow's natural diet, and feeding them corn has caused widespread food contamination since corn replaced natural foods in their diets.
Foodborne illness like E. coli sicken about 50 million Americans every year, hospitalizing hundreds of thousands and killing thousands. All contamination of E. coli with food comes from the meat production process.
Remember the baby formula crisis in 2022?
It wasn't "supply chain" issues that caused a near national crisis, though that's what the media and even some politicians might have told you. The truth is that "supply chain" issues, in the sense of not having people to produce the products needed, was far less of an issue than the contamination of said products.
Abbott Nutrition, the largest infant formula manufacturer in America, recalled multiple brands of formula due to _**bacterial infection -** specifically Salmonella, Cronobacter_, and E. coli.
Salmonella, like E. coli, is a bacteria found in the intestinal tracts of animals, including birds.
The shortage hit lower and middle-income women hardest because programs like WIC only allow purchases from designated manufacturers.
In 2018, Abbot was the largest baby formula vendor in the country, controlling over two-thirds of the market. In 2022, Abbot was the _only_ approved WIC brand manufacturer for 23 states plus Washington, DC.
Like the Adderall shortage that could have been instantly relieved if a simple change in policy was made, the "shortage" was a result of bacterial contamination by meat byproducts and a Congress unwilling to make exceptions in a crisis.
Oh, and the CDC plans to take two weeks off for the holiday and won't be updating the unacceptably abysmal data they provide for H5N1 until December 2.
It was last updated November 16.
* * *
### Other public health concerns this holiday season
**COVID-19 and Influenza** continue to sicken and kill Americans, and with increased travel and transmission, those numbers will likely rise over the next few months.
**Respiratory syncytial virus (RSV)** is a common, contagious virus that infects the nose, throat, lungs, and breathing passages. It's a leading cause of childhood illness and hospitalizations in infants, and can also cause severe disease in older adults.
RSV cases have been [steadily increasing ](https://substack.com/redirect/4a625518-2399-431d-9ffa-15c0c614cf52?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)since September, as have influenza cases.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4a6af96b-d829-4e5c-924a-e08c69661962?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
For all three pathogens, wearing a face mask is an effective measure to reduce risk and exposure.
* * *
## AGU in DC
Do you live in the DMV (DC-MD-VA) area? The American Geophysical Union will be hosting its annual conference in DC next month, December 8-13, 2024. You can learn more about the event, join the AGU, and/or sign up to attend [here](https://substack.com/redirect/24d3ba73-917c-48a6-aad0-945ffae5e4e0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). I will be at several key sessions, including the Saturday, Dec. 8 workshop, "Science to Action: Practical Skills for Scientists to Participate in and Support Nonviolent Grassroots Activism" and the Wednesday, Dec. 11 AGU Awards Banquet. I hope to see you there!

I'll save that for the next Earth Day, which marks 15 years of vegetarianism for me and my family. I also won't go into why you should disinvite your MAGA uncle, aunt, cousin, etc., though I hope you respect yourself not to surround yourself with bad people on what is supposed to be a day of community. Fall means increased viral spread, and with the unique challenges of COVID-19, Influenza, H5N1 and a few active outbreaks of food-borne illnesses, this article is more of a public awareness campaign for your holiday planning. I hope that you've heard by now of the highly infectious, deadly that's been simmering in the United States since 2022. That slow simmer is now boiling over, and it could spell trouble if you plan to prepare certain kinds of foods for your family this Thanksgiving. With a, highly pathogenic Avian Influenza A(H5N1) first appeared in the United States in backyard and commercial poultry flocks in Colorado in February 2022. By April 2024, the virus had infected dairy workers in Texas, then started showing up in dairy products soon after. Not long after that, the virus began showing up in pigs and. Raw milk consumption this year just days after they were fed raw, unpasteurized dairy milk. Testing by the FDA has found the virus byproducts in dairy milk, cottage cheese, sour cream, and baby formula. Today, H5N1 is widespread in wild and commercial animals in all 48 contiguous states. The CDC acknowledges that . One case in September was discovered during testing for seasonal influenza. Eight farm workers in Colorado showed they had previous infection out of 115 tested. There are currently no publicly available H5N1 tests, and there are currently no vaccines (regular flu shot will not prevent bird flu infection). The symptoms are similar to other kinds of influenza and even COVID-19: conjunctivitis (pink eye), cough, fatigue, fever, headaches, muscle or body aches, runny nose, shortness of breath. The CDC website that's supposed to show proper handling of meat this holiday season goes to a 404 error page (). But another version can be found the information is up to date, because the and a lot has changed since then. While proper cooking (internal temperature of at least 165F) can reduce risk in poultry and eggs, handling the raw ingredients with bare bands or without proper protection still presents a serious risk. The first recommendation by the CDC is to avoid dead birds. A turkey is a dead bird. Second recommendation: Don't touch surfaces that could be contaminated, like your kitchen counter, sink and anywhere else contact with the dead bird has been made Don't go to poultry farms or bird markets, and definitely don't hunt wild birds. Wear a mask (this recommendation goes over so well these days), and throw away your masks/gloves after use Use the following measures if you are unable to avoid contact with wild birds or dead animals: Wear gloves and, after removing them, wash hands thoroughly Wear an N95 respirator Use eye protection, such as googles. Unless you're planning to cook that bird in full Walter White lab gear, just don't get one this year. Human cases were slow to start, but have relative to where we were six months ago. A recent case in a Canadian teenager suggests the virus has adapted to become more infectious to humans. Two additional cases in California this week worry scientists about the virus' rapid adaptation. | | ---|---|--- The Biden administration's absolute failure in addressing this outbreak has become somewhat of an open wound for experts, especially on the heels of the COVID-19 pandemic. "In an ideal world, we would be testing to monitor for signs that these changes are happening. But we're not testing nearly enough -- not nearly enough cattle or humans in particular -- to understand how the bird flu virus is evolving," Dr. Celine Gounder Dr. Rick Bright, a federal virologist turned COVID-19 whistleblower during the Trump administration, said "The rapid spread of H5N1 & the escalation of risk to life & economy could've been prevented. It's sad, but true." "That said, we can still stop it, but only if we act swiftly & decisively. We know what to do, but need strong leadership, coordination, collaboration, & funding," he added. Dr. Eric Fiegl-Ding, another expert , has also repeatedly raised the issue within expert communities. All of those concerns have seemingly fell on deaf ears at the agencies responsible for handling such crises. Mesoscale News with Rebekah Jones is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. If you do plan to invite your MAGA relatives, and you refuse to listen to sound, expert advice and forego the dead bird this year, at least make sure you get your MAGA family to deal with the raw turkey. And serve them the heaviest helpings of anything that might be contaminated. Other food illnesses There are eight unrelated and active food pathogen outbreak the FDA: Five outbreaks of Two cases of Salmonella One case of Listeria Six of those cases are from unknown causes/products. As for the other two: An organic carrot farm in California was contaminated with E. coli from a neighboring cattle operation. McDonald's onions were contaminated with E. coli during production/processing at the Taylor Farms processing center in Colorado Springs, Colorado-- a facility that also processes meat products. E. coli does not naturally occur in plants. Modern use of corn and other starches as cattle feed cause the over-production of E. coli bacteria to breakdown the food in the gut of the cattle. Corn is not part of a cow's natural diet, and feeding them corn has caused widespread food contamination since corn replaced natural foods in their diets. Foodborne illness like E. coli sicken about 50 million Americans every year, hospitalizing hundreds of thousands and killing thousands. All contamination of E. coli with food comes from the meat production process. Remember the baby formula crisis in 2022? It wasn't "supply chain" issues that caused a near national crisis, though that's what the media and even some politicians might have told you. The truth is that "supply chain" issues, in the sense of not having people to produce the products needed, was far less of an issue than the contamination of said products. Abbott Nutrition, the largest infant formula manufacturer in America, recalled multiple brands of formula due to bacterial infection - specifically Salmonella, Cronobacter, and E. coli. Salmonella, like E. coli, is a bacteria found in the intestinal tracts of animals, including birds. The shortage hit lower and middle-income women hardest because programs like WIC only allow purchases from designated manufacturers. In 2018, Abbot was the largest baby formula vendor in the country, controlling over two-thirds of the market. In 2022, Abbot was the only approved WIC brand manufacturer for 23 states plus Washington, DC. Like the Adderall shortage that could have been instantly relieved if a simple change in policy was made, the "shortage" was a result of bacterial contamination by meat byproducts and a Congress unwilling to make exceptions in a crisis. Oh, and the CDC plans to take two weeks off for the holiday and won't be updating the unacceptably abysmal data they provide for H5N1 until December 2. It was last updated November 16. Other public health concerns this holiday season COVID-19 and Influenza continue to sicken and kill Americans, and with increased travel and transmission, those numbers will likely rise over the next few months. Respiratory syncytial virus (RSV) is a common, contagious virus that infects the nose, throat, lungs, and breathing passages. It's a leading cause of childhood illness and hospitalizations in infants, and can also cause severe disease in older adults. RSV cases have been September, as have influenza cases. | | ---|---|--- For all three pathogens, wearing a face mask is an effective measure to reduce risk and exposure. AGU in DC Do you live in the DMV (DC-MD-VA) area? The American Geophysical Union will be hosting its annual conference in DC next month, December 8-13, 2024. You can learn more about the event, join the AGU, and/or sign up to attend . I will be at several key sessions, including the Saturday, Dec. 8 workshop, "Science to Action: Practical Skills for Scientists to Participate in and Support Nonviolent Grassroots Activism" and the Wednesday, Dec. 11 AGU Awards Banquet. I hope to see you there! You 're currently a free subscriber to Mesoscale.News with Rebekah Jones. For the full experience, upgrade your subscription. You can continue supporting my work by donating at one of the options below: Make checks payable and send to: Rebekah Jones PO BOX 3371 Silver Spring, MD 20918 -30- | | | | | | | (C) 2024 Rebekah Jones PO BOX 3371, Silver Spring, MD 20918 ? ?

body:

Peter,

I want to first, again, say thank you. Your tireless dedication is truly unmatched, and it is because of you that our race for IA-01 is this close.

I also want to thank you for your patience. As we have requested a recount, and the process is underway, we are so grateful to continue to have you by our side. In the last presidential election, Mariannette Miller-Meeks only won by six votes. Right now, we’re only behind by a few hundred votes – or 0.2% of the vote total – and we are still fighting in this race.

With the stakes this high, and the votes this close, we need to ensure every vote is counted and every voice is heard. That’s why I want to ask you today if you could chip in once again to help us in this recount and finish what we started. You can make a donation here: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bohannanrfemail**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97511921/513668585/-678669148?refcode=em24_241122_recfnd_fndd_gq_act___cbp_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_241122_recfnd_fndd_gq_act___cbp_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=875a6e60-01a9-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzVhNmU2MC0wMWE5LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M6YN77xKa0TGxBBpHgUPq-4eTkUetpiaNmF8_gQ88Ww=)

Tell Congress: Pass the No Kings Act
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97511995/513668858/240436357?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2M2YxMWNjZS0wMWE5LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZQvWPDgHkiADj5iU2qA4kvWNkeFtAbUDcKhpEYmDnHk=&emci=2ca58583-2da8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=63f11cce-01a9-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=6787172)

Our nation’s founders were very clear, folks: **No one is above the law.**
But earlier this year, the Supreme Court tossed out centuries of precedent and granted Trump “absolute immunity” that would likely protect him from accountability for his actions on January 6th.
Where’s the justice in that?
If the highest court in the nation won’t defend our democracy, we have no choice but to fight back.
**The No Kings Act would invalidate the extreme Trump immunity ruling and say clearly that presidents do NOT have immunity for criminal actions.**
[Add your name RIGHT NOW and demand that Congress pass the No Kings Act and protect our democracy.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97511997/513668860/-1798568517?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2M2YxMWNjZS0wMWE5LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZQvWPDgHkiADj5iU2qA4kvWNkeFtAbUDcKhpEYmDnHk=&emci=2ca58583-2da8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=63f11cce-01a9-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=6787172)

---
In her dissenting opinion on the absolute immunity ruling, Justice Sonia Sotomayor wrote, "In every use of official power, **the president is now a king above the law**."
We CANNOT allow Trump to enter the White House with the power of a king.
We CANNOT let our elected officials break the law with impunity.
We CANNOT let this threat to our democracy go unanswered.
[We have less than two months to go until Trump takes power. Congress needs to act NOW. Add your name today and tell your representatives to pass the No Kings Act.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97512004/513668866/-635769103?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2M2YxMWNjZS0wMWE5LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZQvWPDgHkiADj5iU2qA4kvWNkeFtAbUDcKhpEYmDnHk=&emci=2ca58583-2da8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=63f11cce-01a9-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=6787172)

clean_body: Tell Congress: Pass the No Kings Act | Our nation’s founders were very clear, folks: No one is above the law. But earlier this year, the Supreme Court tossed out centuries of precedent and granted Trump “absolute immunity” that would likely protect him from accountability for his actions on January 6th. Where’s the justice in that? If the highest court in the nation won’t defend our democracy, we have no choice but to fight back. The No Kings Act would invalidate the extreme Trump immunity ruling and say clearly that presidents do NOT have immunity for criminal actions. | In her dissenting opinion on the absolute immunity ruling, Justice Sonia Sotomayor wrote, "In every use of official power, the president is now a king above the law." We CANNOT allow Trump to enter the White House with the power of a king. We CANNOT let our elected officials break the law with impunity. We CANNOT let this threat to our democracy go unanswered. | Together, NextGen America | | | 👋 BEFORE YOU GO! 👋 NextGen is fighting to make sure young voters nationwide have a say in our democracy. And for our work to continue, we rely on donations from from everyday supporters like you. So if you're able, can we count on you to invest in our youth-powered movement? = |

EMILYs List endorsed _13_ U.S. House and U.S. Senate candidates across the swing states of Michigan, Wisconsin, Arizona, and Nevada in 2024. _Eight of them WON_.

**That's a big deal.**

EMILYs List women were victorious in these battleground states because of their effective messaging and organizing, and because of your support, Peter.

The campaigns of women like Sen.-elect **Elissa Slotkin (MI)** , Rep.-elect **Kristen McDonald Rivet (MI-08)** , and Sen. **Tammy Baldwin (WI)** will serve as blueprints for Democrats in 2026 and beyond.

**They beat the odds, overcame tough obstacles, and now, their leadership is needed more than ever.**

We're proud to invest in candidates who can lead the party forward. _(Just look at Rep.-elect Yassamin Ansari (AZ-03) — who has already been elected the House Democratic freshman class president!)_

You know by now that our guiding principle is **when women win, we all win**. And we're not taking these hard-fought victories for granted, Peter. [**EMILYs List is ready to build on our 2024 victories and help the next generation of Democratic pro-choice women build political power. body:

#
Peter – we’re running out of time.
With a few weeks to go until the new Congress and Trump are sworn in, the Democratic Senate majority is working tirelessly to confirm every Biden judicial nominee to a lifetime appointment on the federal bench.
[**Before I go on, will you please consider donating $10 or more to support our work in the Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97513714/513674155/-1444662483?amount=10&source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.11.22_FederalJudges_B1_F1_S1_C1_Actives_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTIyYzg5Yi0wNGE5LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MlfnKvoAjOOOIoT3sMHjg3M8lTYxvdqhFR9GByJCRbA=)
As of yesterday, we’ve confirmed **221 judges to the bench**. These nominees under the Biden-Harris administration are some of the best we’ve had – they look more like America and understand what the American experience truly is.
I have served on the Senate Judiciary Committee for more than two decades. During that time, I’ve evaluated and voted on more than one thousand judicial nominees in the Committee and on the Senate floor. And in my opinion, the record is clear: President Biden’s nominees to the federal bench represent the best of the judiciary and our country. They are highly qualified and professionally and demographically diverse.
But our work is not done. Any unfilled vacancy gives the incoming Trump Administration another opportunity to nominate and confirm right-wing ideologues. And Trump is calling on Republican senators to “Show Up and Hold the Line” by not confirming any more judges before his inauguration.
The Senate must confirm as many of the Biden administration’s highly qualified, diverse nominees as possible before the sun sets on the 118th Congress.
Time and time again, we’ve seen that Democrats get the job done – even in the face of adversity. [**So please Peter, chip in any amount to ensure that Democrats finish the job they started by confirming the remaining judicial nominees.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97513715/513674156/-1444662483?source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.11.22_FederalJudges_B1_F1_S1_C1_Actives_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTIyYzg5Yi0wNGE5LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MlfnKvoAjOOOIoT3sMHjg3M8lTYxvdqhFR9GByJCRbA=)
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._

clean_body: Help us prepare for the Trump Administration. Emails like these are an important aspect of our strategy to keep in touch with our supporters. If you want to receive fewer emails, click If you want to unsubscribe, click Peter – we’re running out of time. With a few weeks to go until the new Congress and Trump are sworn in, the Democratic Senate majority is working tirelessly to confirm every Biden judicial nominee to a lifetime appointment on the federal bench. = As of yesterday, we’ve confirmed 221 judges to the bench. These nominees under the Biden-Harris administration are some of the best we’ve had – they look more like America and understand what the American experience truly is. I have served on the Senate Judiciary Committee for more than two decades. During that time, I’ve evaluated and voted on more than one thousand judicial nominees in the Committee and on the Senate floor. And in my opinion, the record is clear: President Biden’s nominees to the federal bench represent the best of the judiciary and our country. They are highly qualified and professionally and demographically diverse. But our work is not done. Any unfilled vacancy gives the incoming Trump Administration another opportunity to nominate and confirm right-wing ideologues. And Trump is calling on Republican senators to “Show Up and Hold the Line” by not confirming any more judges before his inauguration. The Senate must confirm as many of the Biden administration’s highly qualified, diverse nominees as possible before the sun sets on the 118th Congress. Time and time again, we’ve seen that Democrats get the job done – even in the face of adversity. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. ****=** **=** **=** **=** **=** **=** Thank you, Dick Durbin Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin Emails like these are an important aspect of our strategy to keep in touch with our supporters. name: research@voteractionproject.org
subject: Supporter poll: National vote-by-mail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=112224_1&amount=25]
You are invited to join our one-click response poll.
For data integrity purposes, please do not complete this survey if your email address is not dpwillis67@gmail.com .
Mail-in balloting has been proven safe and secure after broad utilization in the last three elections. Opponents of voting rights are still working to restrict it to protect their own power in states across the country, but a solution has been proposed: A national vote-by-mail law passed by Congress.
We want to know your feelings on the topic. Will you take our one-question poll below?
Team: Are you in favor of a federal vote-by-mail law that allows for mail-in voting nationwide?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=112224_1&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=112224_1&amount=15]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=112224_1&amount=25 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=112224_1&amount=25]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://twitter.com/voteractionproj [https://twitter.com/voteractionproj] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=112224_1&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=112224_1&amount=25]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States

Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [] Donate Now [] Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Standing up for what’s right.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Right now, some are suggesting the Democratic Party should turn its back on trans people.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20241122-4531-footer&t=1&akid=4531%2E420207%2Ek3GB0y)
Peter,
This week, as anti-transgender rhetoric and violence is increasing across the nation, I led a group of House Democrats in introducing a resolution commemorating the Transgender Day of Remembrance.
Our position is clear: Too many transgender people have been killed just for living as their true, authentic selves. These violent acts, and countless other acts of discrimination, are terrifying — **but we won’t waver.**
We will never back down from fighting to ensure that all trans people can exist freely without fear of hate. Any attempts to attack this community are simply a distraction from the real work at hand to lift up and ensure opportunity for all Americans.
Yet, far too many people are suggesting the Democratic Party should turn its back on our trans friends, family members, and neighbors.
That’s why I was so proud that almost 100 of my colleagues co-sponsored my resolution, which is 50% more than last year. They recognize we all must continue to stand up and protect our trans community.
**I’m especially proud that six Democrats in Congress – in some of the toughest swing district seats in the country – stepped up to cosponsor the resolution: Angie Craig, Sharice Davids, Chris Pappas, Chris DeLuzio, Andrea Salinas and Eric Sorensen.**
They are pushing back with the rest of us. Rather than turning their back on some of their most vulnerable constituents, these Democrats have made the right choice and made it clear that they will stand up in the face of hatred, violence, and discrimination.
We need a lot more of that in the Democratic Party if we’re going to build the kind of mass grassroots movement that we’ll need to win lasting majorities. So it’s really important that we immediately support fellow Democrats who stand up for what’s right.
[**That’s why I’m asking you to split a donation of $3 or more between Angie Craig, Sharice Davids, Chris Pappas, Chris Deluzio, Andrea Salinas, Eric Sorensen, and me today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241122?refcode=em20241122-4531&amount=3&refcode2=4531_420207_k3GB0y&akid=4531%2E420207%2Ek3GB0y)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241122?amount=3&refcode=em20241122-4531&refcode2=4531_420207_k3GB0y&akid=4531%2E420207%2Ek3GB0y)**
Your donations will help us build the strong grassroots campaigns we need to defend their seats in the midterms, and it will show Democrats everywhere that the grassroots will have their back when they show up for the trans community.
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20241122-4531-footer&t=2&refcode2=4531_420207_k3GB0y&akid=4531%2E420207%2Ek3GB0y)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=3&akid=4531%2E420207%2Ek3GB0y)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=4531%2E420207%2Ek3GB0y)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

After celebrating our historic win together in Oregon, I flew out to Washington, D.C. for New Member Orientation to prepare for the start of my term in Congress. | My name is Adam Gray and I’m the Democratic nominee in California’s 13th Congressional District. When I ran for this seat in 2022, our race came down to just 564 votes. It was the second-closest race in the entire country. This year, I know that we can finish the job. Right now, our race is **_still too close to call_** and we know it’s going to come down to every last vote. name: Kirk Cameron
subject: I knew I had a duty to take action.
body:
Radical librarians call Adventure of Huckleberry Finn and To Kill a Mockingbird “racist.” They’ve stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder’s name from a prestigious book award because of her “problematic” Little House series. | | | If you haven’t heard about the “See You at the Library Day” on Fox News or Newsmax or your other favorite news sources, please let me tell you why it’s so critical.
---
| | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=af546272233f48ea969420b99e982bbc&_e=4yfpLNjmQGA05koWO59puKRx8cAjgAIfyLTr2XwxRUKLFoIPSFdtwmBhb67aGeBhJhtrjw0sLdvFQptWx3pgYKtsrLwN7e6S95HwuDeS2YQbfviiBt1BVIsU_cAkAh5L0DSmj1VkH_r9LJrJiPf7jtoPMr7_PbNeRxFGwXJjRXPg7w1wDmSCS9-teDe7zCyrISDoDBH2mMXoKwNZFdzF7p5NJcVsSBfdyMG9NdUZ2JilXwH9Qb9kJRu9TuvzcEc7baCbPpnvoff2jQFR29dfsc9QJPgo562zdMt5t7XI8OOaaiEeMNf5pwWavig1ERm-s473ogBmwHVWL4kMouAUXpMv0bcPv9bjq6Dimsilt_If1hK8pfz5PAGVV3oWfUw1TFEwUcqV1JAJ2WW0JMGiwQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Fellow Conservative,Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library with a kind but stern librarian. She would fill your mind with classics like _Pat the Bunny_ and _The Little Engine That Could_. And eventually you got old enough to roam by yourself and discover adventures like the _Three Musketeers_ , _Treasure Island_ and _Charlotte’s Web_.But today, all that has changed.The president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described “Marxist lesbian.”Radical librarians call _Adventure of Huckleberry Finn_ and _To Kill a Mockingbird_ “racist.” They’ve stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder’s name from a prestigious book award because of her “problematic” _Little House_ series.And they bring men in wearing full makeup, dresses, and high heels for “Drag Queen Story Hours” where books like these are read to children of all ages... A is for Activist. An ABC board book for “families who want their kids to grow up in a space that is unapologetic about activism, environmental justice, civil rights, LGBTQ rights, and everything else that activists believe in and fight for...”

| | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros’ Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA. And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content.Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion. The “Teen Zone” is filled with books like: _Rick_ about a cross-dressing Grandpa, _Melissa_ filled with graphic nudity, and _Darkstalker_ featuring gory violence and domestic abuse.But here’s what’s really alarming.We can’t just sit back and say, “Well, I’ll just make sure my family doesn’t go to “Drag Queen Story Hour” and we won’t check out those inappropriate books.”That may be good for your family – for now.But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values! **[**I hope you see why I need your help today to TAKE BACK OUR LIBRARIES.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=af546272233f48ea969420b99e982bbc&_e=4yfpLNjmQGA05koWO59puKRx8cAjgAIfyLTr2XwxRUKLFoIPSFdtwmBhb67aGeBhJhtrjw0sLdvFQptWx3pgYKtsrLwN7e6S95HwuDeS2YQbfviiBt1BVIsU_cAkAh5L0DSmj1VkH_r9LJrJiPf7jtoPMr7_PbNeRxFGwXJjRXPg7w1wDmSCS9-teDe7zCyrISDoDBH2mMXoKwNZFdzF7p5NJcVsSBfdyMG9NdUZ2JiA671lty2oKPSN9O-qKnS7ou2LndF83FzlPVnCE53ZeGujuvqde94UEJ9obkKh1jqx-PWHzV_OGK4TVIarnYY5qF-wGvy25CnAivXhYfPiuHje4eesU4BCeqY352ScUTiBvF-2S1QIDXwro3AH-MzLLlV5XjWWllRuXhYKnTAROA%3D%3D)** My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Left Behind.”I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian.When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named **Brave Books** , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit.And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome Brave Books that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism.And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn’t like that one bit.>> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves.>> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that’s original), Brave Books was accused of trying to “confuse and demoralize children,” our supporters were described as “bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about,” and on and on. I can’t even print most things these radicals said because it’s so vile.In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States.And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang “God Bless America,” and read wholesome and Godly books.It was incredible.But here’s the greatest part...From there, parents and grandparents started asking Brave Books how they could host Story Hours of their own.So Brave Books has organized a nationwide grassroots “See You at the Library” movement to take back our libraries. Now with the guidance of Brave Books, committed conservatives just like you book event rooms at their local library for conservative Story Hours that fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God.And whenever we can, Brave Books authors like swimmer Riley Gaines, TV personality Missy Robertson, and myself stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots at these Story Hours......for a very simple mission – to reject the Left’s radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America’s libraries.And our ambitious goal is to expand our “See You at the Library” movement to reach over 100,000 children in the next year.Which is why we need you! __**[_I hope you’ll be able to give a sponsorship gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, $150 or more today._..](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=af546272233f48ea969420b99e982bbc&_e=4yfpLNjmQGA05koWO59puKRx8cAjgAIfyLTr2XwxRUKLFoIPSFdtwmBhb67aGeBhJhtrjw0sLdvFQptWx3pgYKtsrLwN7e6S95HwuDeS2YQbfviiBt1BVIsU_cAkAh5L0DSmj1VkH_r9LJrJiPf7jtoPMr7_PbNeRxFGwXJjRXPg7w1wDmSCS9-teDe7zCyrISDoDBH2mMXoKwNZFdzF7p5NJcVsSBfdyMG9NdUZ2JgsOJAD9rmI5zlH8emlUtd9T7bzDK3MH8C2-hF8_bbs3XJ56RxKsYRQCy_PFIiPh5h-5ybzMD031mz_-dCOkaLAqIkFxKNdkq_9KVYP-xu3Wby7JJnjPqigsBkEUDEmOy1iVdtseWFiwBlWTvGs3tEGuBr-Uq_008AXtR_EN74L5Q%3D%3D)**Your sponsorship gift will be used to send a “Story Hour Kit” to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing an event at their library.The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items. Brave Books is a small Christian company. They don’t have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA.Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our Story Hours for over 100,000 children to counter the radical leftists who’ve taken control of our libraries. Knowing that, **_[_please consider a sponsorship gift of $175._](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=af546272233f48ea969420b99e982bbc&_e=4yfpLNjmQGA05koWO59puKRx8cAjgAIfyLTr2XwxRUKLFoIPSFdtwmBhb67aGeBhJhtrjw0sLdvFQptWx3pgYKtsrLwN7e6S95HwuDeS2YQbfviiBt1BVIsU_cAkAh5L0DSmj1VkH_r9LJrJiPf7jtoPMr7_PbNeRxFGwXJjRXPg7w1wDmSCS9-teDe7zCyrISDoDBH2mMXoKwNZFdzF7p5NJcVsSBfdyMG9NdUZ2JgD5TaEp2eYcJy1j1nsvMhuZuVHMqKQdCd75Hk2UTN6-93g2yut5XycS9P1N2k6Aw0rUIy1OGW2qxFCn51VllYp6U4MMiiJyLevbNmsKi3IkYxxOUL5Oi6JUh5EfU7QuaVT_p7e1h4Ts0ovBcBkzyCbyZBMf9BPwAKxmd-Zb7eguA%3D%3D)_** That’s enough to sponsor one entire “Story Hour Kit” yourself. Singlehandedly, you’ll be reaching 50 children with our wholesome, Godly, and patriotic message. **_[Whatever you can give whether it’s $35, $175, or anything higher or lower will be necessary for the success of the next “Story Hour Kit” to be sent.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=af546272233f48ea969420b99e982bbc&_e=4yfpLNjmQGA05koWO59puKRx8cAjgAIfyLTr2XwxRUKLFoIPSFdtwmBhb67aGeBhJhtrjw0sLdvFQptWx3pgYKtsrLwN7e6S95HwuDeS2YQbfviiBt1BVIsU_cAkAh5L0DSmj1VkH_r9LJrJiPf7jtoPMr7_PbNeRxFGwXJjRXPg7w1wDmSCS9-teDe7zCyrISDoDBH2mMXoKwNZFdzF7p5NJcVsSBfdyMG9NdUZ2Jgc2zrXWYczDqLUV6Y3uM093pEZMBpuGZ_LBGaRFnwwoIf6WpKxnuEzQ8-DcJ8p2_RwXPb6lgUyrni0VRMjZv3BICCveJDGmopRS3l6nGC4mTDacCNCiwDBu9nDRLPfEa_0jXHn-uoSkQ80R1ZrgJnYSM-OjmUBc_YFbPyPtVo1Kw%3D%3D)_**
