name: Jenna Burns
subject: Targeting my husband and President Trump
body:
Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex.
Dear Fellow Patriot,

If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.

She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars.

But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target.

She's also trying to lock my husband away for the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe.

**[Before I ask for your help, let me start at the beginning...](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=219639f64afb474b9272007207da44d7&_e=jR5RmDc0sQkBgAkxxdadcuUiETJBuLu3uU4nbfcZ7WbreqQz2XeCVIz8R9cnbuA6DVnlldeE93AiwgrbTBk5QdPf5aL-TTlF1LKczZWshWI7ZRmDiNlLkAnoZRBDtv11MNu2sOa67k4jmiWNDafcYUjF8ds4aBxhRO0L3-g1uB0laui_Z4TFQmeKMKulw3uYf_rCzVz472rrzdMrN_Jc91LLVlyfcd4tL9SGcamQoqL8-MbAO4n0ZIXh-Fob7L-f6BUrTbpYrRPVEdjDPkG18sfGuNGU3sT43DuEumNfUjxex850tHyf59OfmndQW154UsrsG4rqANRt87MldGS9k7VXfXIKMdCGo2Td_ENvli0dB7ZeCIvu6YUjXBFz2zno)**

My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent.
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=219639f64afb474b9272007207da44d7&_e=jR5RmDc0sQkBgAkxxdadcuUiETJBuLu3uU4nbfcZ7WbreqQz2XeCVIz8R9cnbuA6DVnlldeE93AiwgrbTBk5QdPf5aL-TTlF1LKczZWshWI7ZRmDiNlLkAnoZRBDtv11MNu2sOa67k4jmiWNDafcYUjF8ds4aBxhRO0L3-g1uB0laui_Z4TFQmeKMKulw3uYf_rCzVz472rrzdMrN_Jc91LLVlyfcd4tL9SGcamQoqLZoWtaD5h-FzO-7671edMednYcj_GqxttwU_hLjBZnrGfdNLUVxmcEZqs0q8LYWX6kEjJytoGgtEbQQv4dwKoFaA4hXNkaDrurYOCiJl4qZXWH5JS39ORiPLIQEPw5BQsj4WKL84OA7A8JuXGUb-GC)
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... **_life in prison_** could be his reward.

Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex.

Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over.

My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate.

That's when it happened.

The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.

James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over.

With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly.

James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. **So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder!**

James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket!

We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer.

We couldn't have been more wrong.

You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband.

For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.

The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars!

Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with “MURDERER” scribbled across his face in red spray paint.

Now you understand why I'm so upset and why **[I'm turning to you for help.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=219639f64afb474b9272007207da44d7&_e=jR5RmDc0sQkBgAkxxdadcuUiETJBuLu3uU4nbfcZ7WbreqQz2XeCVIz8R9cnbuA6DVnlldeE93AiwgrbTBk5QdPf5aL-TTlF1LKczZWshWI7ZRmDiNlLkAnoZRBDtv11MNu2sOa67k4jmiWNDafcYUjF8ds4aBxhRO0L3-g1uB0laui_Z4TFQmeKMKulw3uYf_rCzVz472rrzdMrN_Jc91LLVlyfcd4tL9SGcamQoqKEvhDgLPEsK6Z4G-Nhnpi4SIMW60Iq4u6D6Dso64SbXe2H0uu8N4Q00hYw3Pv9lc1oaKdyGrtUzZuShquNo5PKV8jWFaCs4VlmcHbrwrHDcrVPx3l3znX_Cx-yiQY0sd_W6_NjLLW75LXXprmeDhRy)**

James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people.

He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down.

When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class.

My husband is _exactly_ the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.

But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She _knows_ what happened that night. She _knows_ James was in a life-or-death situation. She _knows_ that the charge should have been dropped years ago.

But Fani Willis doesn't care.

She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo.

James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished.

We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.

It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him.

By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.

My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case.

And it still hasn't been enough.

I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family.

Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... **And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF.**

If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James.

LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment.

And we _were_ at our lowest moment!

Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name.

That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone...

**[Could you send a contribution today to help defend James?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=219639f64afb474b9272007207da44d7&_e=jR5RmDc0sQkBgAkxxdadcuUiETJBuLu3uU4nbfcZ7WbreqQz2XeCVIz8R9cnbuA6DVnlldeE93AiwgrbTBk5QdPf5aL-TTlF1LKczZWshWI7ZRmDiNlLkAnoZRBDtv11MNu2sOa67k4jmiWNDafcYUjF8ds4aBxhRO0L3-g1uB0laui_Z4TFQmeKMKulw3uYf_rCzVz472rrzdMrN_Jc91LLVlyfcd4tL9SGcamQoqKLPhGZImHYT_X469pD7tU8U9lVymCsCz2BNuUpv8uQIY15xAuCY8LxDR2c5vD46mm6Vijhr41QrMWDeKfkgvGJMVSloznq2OingsP-t339lHv_8O7iZO8NLJOcW31fDCC31jSi1tgFdCRqQR-D9M1J)**

James' trial is scheduled for November. His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all.

I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger.

But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband.

You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence.

**[So, if you're at all able, would you consider making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or $1,000 to LELDF to help wrongfully-accused officers like James?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=219639f64afb474b9272007207da44d7&_e=jR5RmDc0sQkBgAkxxdadcuUiETJBuLu3uU4nbfcZ7WbreqQz2XeCVIz8R9cnbuA6DVnlldeE93AiwgrbTBk5QdPf5aL-TTlF1LKczZWshWI7ZRmDiNlLkAnoZRBDtv11MNu2sOa67k4jmiWNDafcYUjF8ds4aBxhRO0L3-g1uB0laui_Z4TFQmeKMKulw3uYf_rCzVz472rrzdMrN_Jc91LLVlyfcd4tL9SGcamQoqIYBq-T1f1wx6hdnHxM6uS-cW6zlxGi-WlZGAMTjaz90jvPHbtzoGCkxP75wfjtNIMiOOnOFkmSNLKTtTZ4D9Zc1kQOObGrqhSTxuKniQRovfKwcg7DBBnXEXItwhlAMP8UXEwKZDHXAxIs7fWMrYGU)**

LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible.

And it's your **[$35 gift](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=219639f64afb474b9272007207da44d7&_e=jR5RmDc0sQkBgAkxxdadcuUiETJBuLu3uU4nbfcZ7WbreqQz2XeCVIz8R9cnbuA6DVnlldeE93AiwgrbTBk5QdPf5aL-TTlF1LKczZWshWI7ZRmDiNlLkAnoZRBDtv11MNu2sOa67k4jmiWNDafcYUjF8ds4aBxhRO0L3-g1uB0laui_Z4TFQmeKMKulw3uYf_rCzVz472rrzdMrN_Jc91LLVlyfcd4tL9SGcamQoqJLRoRz5wMkGjzWO2ktrJ1KTlbr_RtE6l82vwgulqKHmGfnxSXu-BdEWR58VTgT_1APnUL72VFIkkdU-htecGy98XHz-Kskg3c3y_zsFV-tAZFd6wkXN_bYvnM2zbeZpdGJlwC0akAzA9cZcTwd5J5t)** that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ in prison.

I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James.

Sincerely,
Jenna Burns

P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! **[Follow this link right now to make your best tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to LELDF.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=219639f64afb474b9272007207da44d7&_e=jR5RmDc0sQkBgAkxxdadcuUiETJBuLu3uU4nbfcZ7WbreqQz2XeCVIz8R9cnbuA6DVnlldeE93AiwgrbTBk5QdPf5aL-TTlF1LKczZWshWI7ZRmDiNlLkAnoZRBDtv11MNu2sOa67k4jmiWNDafcYUjF8ds4aBxhRO0L3-g1uB0laui_Z4TFQmeKMKulw3uYf_rCzVz472rrzdMrN_Jc91LLVlyfcd4tL9SGcamQoqKeiRwnq82suK8nVfQIG-aDOJGWzzS02uZAEppWEJuwD1kR-TiYmDPIXSOTcNFLUqcEKSrC8H9MXwvHTfstq7Ay1dK3ZPml19-WKzrCBH8k8Ck-N-c7TNbVEa5GKQ6WSZGE7Xp2bAJA6vnVa9dp3FNl)** Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit**www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_

name: Alan Dershowitz
subject: The New York Sun is Different
body:
It's a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.
And we need you to join us.

| | | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=06f0ecaaf79b43509a16cc5f43779c27&_e=BCV6l5wWUS0oZCvxpoYUjXN2xlfAj1Xe2clP1biE7Zhklt4wi0fLXfPht_e5CBn8oXEyv37cFV4xJVOIFWLsr-Gn2jNeKbUE9Q6hdNuo9J79T38Juyc8rujBLE8kxvHCvfJkh-4InAebUE90DLz3GyZx2XGKR8Flc4IXRVe1zGt2TW_Be3-VIfBcMCWloatAY2E89L4lfKn4Z2RAKcbS2k7140QBIpQ8O80whjTpVpl0Gbgua7c63JQ3wE1IRMiBhsrPRMwnlDVouAFB90vG2Ejc4_K9_oOsEXsF97UMFTLeDh0pnewFN6t0uWhbKduth2haEaNOvSIXyQlwXOuSaLkXyd2nqbdWfaaYUMogILhfo_vVEF4N0_t5gVTFDMl3)

---
# FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ
---
| | Dear Reader, In over sixty years in the legal profession, I’ve experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism — mostly the latter — and just how important and rare it is to get things right.

**In today’s media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong.** Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts.

**The New York Sun is different.** It’s a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.

Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point.

When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments.

The Sun’s deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate.

It will be no secret to you that I don’t agree with everything that can be found in the Sun’s pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism.

I’ve been impressed by the Sun’s growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join.

**The Sun’s success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth.** But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today.

Every person matters in this effort.

Don’t wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.
---

clean_body: It's a paper that places principle over politics and people over party. And we need you to join us. | | | | FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ | | Dear Reader, In over sixty years in the legal profession, I’ve experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism — mostly the latter — and just how important and rare it is to get things right. In today’s media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong. Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts. The New York Sun is different. It’s a paper that places principle over politics and people over party. Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point. When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments. The Sun’s deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate. It will be no secret to you that I don’t agree with everything that can be found in the Sun’s pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism. I’ve been impressed by the Sun’s growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join. The Sun’s success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth. But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today. Every person matters in this effort. Don’t wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now. | | | | | Alan Dershowitz Columnist for The New York Sun | | | | | Alan Dershowitz Columnist for The New York Sun | | |

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97514869/513677030/-926250309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzFjNmY2MS0wOGE5LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SsCqWErmOQUpEs2JAzBwLD7CkAFk0Ez8Mvv5j8TgrRQ=&emci=931c6f61-08a9-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=a71c6f61-08a9-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=24635485)
Friend, in January, we must pause all fundraising efforts. Why? In Maryland, during the legislative session, fundraising is prohibited so state leaders can remain focused on passing legislation. **That means the second the legislature gavels in to start the session, all our fundraising will stop for three months.** It’s right around the corner — and we need to focus our fundraising efforts to ensure we have the resources before then. This is Maryland’s decade. And our work to ensure we end the decade looking back at the progress we made means that we aren’t taking our foot off the gas. We’re moving fast to increase opportunity for all Marylanders. We can’t wait to see these investments pay off for our state! But with 100% of the Governor’s focus on building the Maryland we know we deserve, and the upcoming freeze, we have to ramp up our fundraising efforts now. **That’s where you come in.** It’s time to shift into full gear and raise enough to help us cover the time we aren’t able to fundraise. **[Will you chip in $5 or more now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97514870/513677031/-1089051268?refcode=em20241122-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzFjNmY2MS0wOGE5LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SsCqWErmOQUpEs2JAzBwLD7CkAFk0Ez8Mvv5j8TgrRQ=)** | **[Contribute »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97514871/513677032/-1089051268?refcode=em20241122-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzFjNmY2MS0wOGE5LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SsCqWErmOQUpEs2JAzBwLD7CkAFk0Ez8Mvv5j8TgrRQ=)**

| | Team,

I’ve said it before and I’ll say it again – life in Jersey has become too expensive. I hear it all the time – moms, dads, recent grads, and seniors telling me how much they love Jersey, but worry they won’t be able to afford to stay.

**It’s time for something to change. I’m running to be the "Lower Taxes, Lower Costs Governor," but I need your help to get there.**

clean_body: MSNBC is speaking loud and clear about the importance of the 2025 Virginia Governor’s race: | = | MSNBC is speaking loud and clear about the importance of the 2025 Virginia Governor’s race: = | = Peter, in case you missed it – the latest polls have Abigail tied with her potential Republican opponent. We saw what happened here in Virginia and across the country on November 5; Trump and Republicans made gains in places Democrats won handily in 2020. This race is shaping up to be a tough one, which means we need to do everything we can to prepare now. Abigail knows how to win competitive and tough races. She’s been doing it since she flipped VA-07 in 2018 for the first time since 1968. But we need your help. = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Team Spanberger * | | Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States | = =

name: The Democrats
subject: Thousands of Democrats have shared their thoughts -- will you?
body:
Here’s what we have on file for you:
---
Derek, Since we shared our 2025 Priorities Survey, thousands of Democrats have shared their thoughts and feedback on our Party’s next steps. So far, the results show that responders’ top concerns are the Trump administration’s ability to define the Supreme Court for decades by appointing even more ultraconservative justices and dismantling key federal agencies like the Department of Education. A majority of those who have taken the survey agree that the Party’s focus should be on messaging that connects with undecided voters, along with strengthening our voter protection and registration efforts. But we haven’t heard from _you_ yet! Take a look: _**Your DNC 2025 Priorities Survey Record**_ **Name:** Derek
**Member ID:** 22930333
**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Survey Completed?** No -- Not yet! ❌ **Share your thoughts → **[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/take_the_dncs_2025_priorities_survey/?refcode=em_20241122_2348_so&t=1&akid=2350%2E22930333%2EkaGT7F)** We’re so grateful for your support, Derek. As we continue building a strong, robust Party that will hold Trump and his Republican allies accountable, you’ll know your input helped shape our strategy. Thank you for everything, The Democrats _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2024?amount=3&express_lane=true&refcode=em_20241122_2348_so&refcode2=2350_22930333_kaGT7F&akid=2350%2E22930333%2EkaGT7F)**

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

subject: I'm ready, Peter

body:
“Minnesota attorney general on Trump: 'If he violates the rights of people, we're going to sue” – MPR

Peter,

When I was elected, I promised I would do everything in my power to protect Minnesotans’ fundamental rights – and that promise has never been more important. That’s why I want to be 100% clear:

I’m prepared to stand up to the second Trump administration if they attempt to interfere with any of the freedoms that people of our state enjoy, including access to abortion and immigrants’ ability to live without fear.

My office spent months preparing for the possibility of a Trump presidency, identifying potential threats and determining what we can do to make sure the people of Minnesota are protected.

Now, I didn’t run for Attorney General so I could sue Donald Trump. But I’ve done it before and I’ll do it again if he violates the rights of Minnesotans.

Peter, I will always fight to protect your fundamental rights from those who seek to restrict them. But I can’t do it alone.

None of my work is possible without support from this grassroots movement. That’s why I’m asking you to step up and help prove that we’re ready to defend our freedoms.

I wanted to remind you that you’re still eligible for Minnesota’s Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program. You have until December 31 to donate $75 (or $150 for couples) to our campaign and receive a full refund from the state of Minnesota.

Peter, will you make a refundable $75 donation right now to make it 100% clear that we will not back down?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

CHIP IN $10 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241122ke?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
CHIP IN $25 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241122ke?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
CHIP IN $75 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241122ke?express_lane=true&amount=75&refcode=express_lane_75]
CHIP IN $150 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241122ke?express_lane=true&amount=150&refcode=express_lane_150]
CHIP IN $250 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241122ke?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=express_lane_250]
OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241122ke?refcode=other]

Thank you,

Keith Ellison

You can now use your 2024 PCR to contribute up to $75 (or $150 for couples) and receive a full refund from the State of Minnesota.

Please take advantage of your PCR and make a REFUNDABLE $75 DONATION so Keith can continue fighting to help people afford their lives and live with safety, dignity, and respect.

CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241122ke?refcode=body&amount=25]

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: What lies ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97515747/513679919/623074613?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM3OTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzQ0YzVjNmUtMGNhOS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=wPmS25lW3PRL_6cylhRabbStGHLIeGCU2kBcy-JBtWs=&emci=cd4cf3fa-85a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=344c5c6e-0ca9-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=9329426)
---
I want to express my most heartfelt gratitude to you, Friend.

Over the course of this election, you fought with everything you had – voting, donating, volunteering, speaking with your neighbors and friends – to elect truly qualified leaders up and down the ballot – including to the presidency, our nation's highest office.
The outcome – after so much hard work and hope – is disappointing. It's also painful, knowing who is about to once again step into the most powerful office in the world. Many Americans all over the country are feeling a whole host of emotions: Fear, anger, sadness. You're not alone.
But whatever we are feeling now, we must channel it into resolution. We must focus on how we can use the power we have to protect and preserve what actually makes our nation great – democracy, the rule of law, freedom, opportunity.

Here's what that means for our work in the U.S. Senate right now: judges, judges, judges. While Democrats still hold the majority, and with President Biden still in office, we are working overtime in the Judiciary Committee to get as many of the president's judicial nominations as possible onto the Senate floor for votes. Without delay. My Democratic colleagues and I are united in achieving this.
We know what lies ahead. We know who Donald Trump is and what he has promised. A strong federal judiciary that represents the true values of our nation – with judges who lead with respect and reverence for our democracy and Constitution – will be a crucial check on the president-elect's agenda.
Friend, you have my word that, whatever the new year and administration hold, I am committed to fighting resolutely, smartly, and effectively. The fights ahead will be numerous. They will be challenging. But together, we can and must do our part to protect the values that truly make America great. Thank you for your partnership in that effort.

Sincerely,

Dick
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Major General Paul Eaton, U.S. Army, Ret.
subject: It’s a disgrace, Peter.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
You can be sure that if I still served in uniform, Trump’s Purity Board would slate me for separation, to be replaced by someone unwaveringly loyal to Trump above all else.
#
Paul Eaton here.
Purity Boards to purge the United States Armed Forces.
I never thought I’d see the day.
But now, with Trump set to retake office, that is the reality we face. It is a disgrace.
Trump aims to destroy the apolitical nature of the Military, purge our most seasoned and effective officers, and replace them with loyalists who will follow his every command — whether they are Constitutionally legal or not. And remember - the Supreme Court of our country granted him immunity for actions he may take as President. Something not granted to our military. Also useful to recall Stalin’s purge of the Soviet Army early during WWII. The Russian Army never recovered as the effects are still playing out in their invasion of Ukraine.
I served for over 33 years in the United States Army on Active Duty and retired as a Major General. I deployed around the world in defense of our nation. I upheld my oath to support and defend the Constitution.
You can be sure that if I still served, Trump’s Purity Board would slate me for relief, to be replaced by someone who demonstrates fealty to Trump above all else.
I will not sit idly by as Trump readies a purge of good, decent, honorable leaders from the Military. We may not be able to stop him, but we will not be silent.
[**Join me, join VoteVets, and join the thousands of others who have already added their voice to speak out against Trump’s Purity Boards and his purge of the United States Military. Add your name here, and then tell everyone you know that Trump is deadset on destroying our Military and making each of us less safe.](https://act.votevets.org/signup/241113_vv_em_purity_boards/?refcode=em241122-1-30&akid=33989%2E3013755%2ESZDcs8)**
| [ADD YOUR VOICE](https://act.votevets.org/signup/241113_vv_em_purity_boards/?refcode=em241122-1-30&akid=33989%2E3013755%2ESZDcs8)
---
These next four years will not be easy. But together, we will do everything we can to defend our democracy.
Thank you for joining us.
Very respectfully,
Paul Eaton
Senior Advisor, VoteVets
Major General, U.S. Army, Retired

name: Mark Warner
subject: Let me tell you about the candidate who will protect our Democratic majority in the Virginia state Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Control of the chamber is up for grabs, and the stakes are high.

|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97516131/513681142/1260074483?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_SrinivasanSplit_241122_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTA0MjY2Ni0wZGE5LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5sjGK7Ec_HKvyWQC-4Xx2N_xyfsoX2SrgAF0gxfNopc=) Control of the Virginia state Senate is up for grabs in January’s special election, Derek.

I know this feels like a fast turnaround following the general election, but the reality is, with a Republican trifecta in Washington, it’s more important than ever that we elect Democrats at the state level who will fight back against the GOP’s dangerous agenda.

**Right now, Democrats in the state Senate hold a razor-thin 21-19 majority. That means if Kannan Srinivasan loses his race in the 32nd district, Republicans will take control of the chamber.**

[_**So I’m asking: will you split a donation of $10 or more between me and Kannan Srinivasan so he can win next year and keep the Virginia state Senate blue?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97516132/513681143/1260074483?amount=10&refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_SrinivasanSplit_241122_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTA0MjY2Ni0wZGE5LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5sjGK7Ec_HKvyWQC-4Xx2N_xyfsoX2SrgAF0gxfNopc=)

If we want to keep moving Virginia forward in the face of national Republican obstruction, we need to hold on to our Democratic majority. I know Kannan Srinivasan is the right candidate to get it done – he has been a steadfast leader in the Virginia House of Delegates working to protect women’s reproductive rights, expand affordable health care, and strengthen public education.

I’m counting on this grassroots team to help me send Kannan to the state Senate in January so he can protect their single seat majority and Democrats can be the brick wall against the resurgence of Trump-era extremism.

[_**Can you split a $10 contribution today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97516133/513681144/1260074483?amount=10&refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_SrinivasanSplit_241122_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTA0MjY2Ni0wZGE5LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5sjGK7Ec_HKvyWQC-4Xx2N_xyfsoX2SrgAF0gxfNopc=)

Thank you,

Mark Warner

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: Why a Select Committee on the Cartels is Needed
body:
| | | | | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JDAR37AHM0F6FKKX5VGRQWVM_0)
---
| Peter- President Trump and his incoming Border Czar have made it clear that they intend to target the Mexican drug cartels with ferocity in their administration. I am pushing Speaker Mike Johnson to establish a Select Committee to Combat the Cartels, and I explain why this is needed below. I also recently penned an op-ed in National Review arguing why Joe Biden’s recent decision to allow Ukraine to take the fight to Russia gives President Trump the leverage he needs over Vladimir Putin, while dispelling fear mongering about WWIII. **As always, thank you for your continued support. We are already gearing up our campaign for the new Congress and the political and legislative battles ahead. Your support now ensures we have the resources we need to win the messaging war and ensure Republicans give President Trump a successful Congress. If you are able to donate anything at all to my campaign, your money will be spent winning these important fights on policy and communication:**
---
| | | | | [ DONATE NOW ](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JDAR37AHM0F6FKKX5VGRQWVM_1)
---
| Now, here's your brief.
---
|
---
| WHY WE NEED A SELECT COMMITTEE ON THE CARTELS
---
| |
---
| [**WATCH HERE**](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JDAR37AHM0F6FKKX5VGRQWVM_2)
---
| Last Congress, Republicans in the House created a select committee to address threats posed by the Chinese Communist Party led by former Representative Mike Gallagher. The select committee accomplished a few things - it showed that the United States was serious about confronting this threat, offered a venue for bipartisan attention toward the CCP outside of the usual partisan committee structure, and streamlined legislative action. The select committee on China was incredibly successful and we should mirror its structure for other priorities next Congress. First and foremost on the priority list must be combatting the Mexican Drug Cartels. Here’s why Speaker Johnson should create a select committee to combat the Mexican drug cartels:
1. The cartels are the greatest near-term threat. Full stop. President Trump agrees, as does his Border Czar Tom Homan.
2. I lead the House Cartel Task Force. We have solutions. But we don’t have any authority. A select committee will have a better chance of moving these bills to the House floor and to a president who will sign them.
3. The select committee would show that House Republicans are aligned with and committed to President Trump’s agenda to destroy the cartels.

Let’s get it done.
---
|
---
| MEXICO CAN BE A PARTNER IN COMBATING THE CARTELS
---
| |
---
| [**WATCH HERE**](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JDAR37AHM0F6FKKX5VGRQWVM_3)
---
| I recently joined a policy discussion with Axios focused on the Future of Defense, where I specifically focused on the policy solutions a select committee on the drug cartels might pass into law. But we cannot ignore a critical component of this fight: having a good partner in Mexico. It's time for a reality check on Mexico's disastrous "hugs, not bullets" approach to dealing with cartels. For the past six years, that soft-handed policy was nothing short of an open invitation for cartels to expand their operations unchecked. What did Mexico get in return? Record-high violence, brazen cartel activity, and a deteriorating security situation. Now, with President Claudia Sheinbaum leading the way, there’s been a shift in strategy. She’s shown a willingness to utilize intelligence gathering, deploy troops, and coordinate efforts between federal and state forces, all while continuing efforts to keep young people away from organized crime. It’s a promising start that deserves a strong backing. That’s where we can make a difference. By ensuring the Mexican military has the resources they need—like close air support and tactical assistance—we can strengthen their efforts to push back against these violent networks. Because let’s be clear: these criminal organizations don’t only threaten Mexico. They’re flooding our streets with drugs, fueling the opioid crisis, and endangering families on both sides of the border. We need to confront this threat together.
---
|
---
| PRESIDENT TRUMP'S NEW LEVERAGE OVER PUTIN
---
| |
---
| [**READ MY OP-ED HERE**](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JDAR37AHM0F6FKKX5VGRQWVM_4)
---
| Joe Biden made a remarkable shift in his policy toward Ukraine recently, allowing Ukraine to strike military targets inside of Russia using American-made ATACM missiles. It is a long overdue move by Biden to actually free Ukraine to take the fight to Russia, and it should be welcomed by the incoming Trump Administration. While there has been predictable outrage over this move, it actually gives President Trump significant leverage over Vladimir Putin. Instead of inheriting a costly and politically charged stalemate, he will inherit the leverage he needs to start out his presidency with a strong hand to play against Putin. By January 20, 2025, the Kremlin will have finally felt some of the pain it has wrought on Ukraine, sanctions will have been ramped up on Russia’s oil and gas sector, and that regime’s ability to supply troops and continue this costly war will have diminished. The Russians will finally be thinking about off-ramps. And then a new American president with a history of dealmaking steps onto the scene with an offer to start negotiating a peace deal. As a Trump supporter, I can’t imagine a better fortune for our 47th president. For those on the left and right who have fear mongered about WWIII caused by President Trump and Joe Biden respectively, the mongers have been proven wrong time and time again. This is especially true of President Trump, who is not the “isolationist” some want or believe him to be. President Trump killed Iranian General Qasem Soleimani while the left cried wolf about WWIII. Escalation never materialized. President Trump promised Vladimir Putin he would bomb Moscow if Russia invaded Ukraine. Russia never invaded Ukraine under President Trump. In President Trump’s second term, America will finally re-establish peace through strength around the world. The ability for Ukraine to strike military targets inside of Russia is the kind of American strength that just may give President Trump the leverage he needs to establish peace once again in Europe.
---
|
---
|
---
| | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JDAR37AHM0F6FKKX5VGRQWVM_5)
---
| **[CLICK HERE TO WATCH](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JDAR37AHM0F6FKKX5VGRQWVM_6)** Huge honor to have Mickey Schuch - [Carry Trainer on YouTube](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JDAR37AHM0F6FKKX5VGRQWVM_7) - review the ENDEX Lone Operator pants and Sidewinder Holster. This is a guy who knows his stuff and wouldn’t waste time reviewing a product he didn’t even like. His conclusion?

✅ Pants: Super comfortable, stylish, and easy to clean.
✅ Holster: So secure and discreet, it’s like it’s not even there.

Oh, and the best part? He did cartwheels... and the pistol didn’t budge.🤸💪

Watch [the full 20-minute test on his YouTube channel](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JDAR37AHM0F6FKKX5VGRQWVM_8) for the debrief and some suggestions from Mickey on ways to protect your trigger in a soft sided holster like this one. If you’re into target training, quick drawing, and survival skills, you’ll want to hit that follow button. He has a ton of great content.

Reminder that when you buy Endex, you're purchasing my campaign merchandise (which also means it's tax-free). So every purchase goes to support Republican races this November. Shop at the link below.
---
| | [ SHOP NOW ](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JDAR37AHM0F6FKKX5VGRQWVM_9)
---
|
---
| SOCIAL MEDIA
---
|
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
|
---
| NEWS
---
| **WSJ:** [**Brendan Carr, a Not-So-Radical FCC Deregulator**](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JDAR37AHM0F6FKKX5VGRQWVM_10) **NATIONAL REVIEW:** [**Progressive Delusions Die Hard**](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JDAR37AHM0F6FKKX5VGRQWVM_11) **AXIOS:** [**Mass deportations won't include going door to door, Rep. Dan Crenshaw says**](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JDAR37AHM0F6FKKX5VGRQWVM_12)
---
| | | That's it for this week's campaign brief. Thank you for reading.
---
| In service,
---
| |
---
| Dan Crenshaw
---
|
---
| | [ STAND WITH DAN CRENSHAW ](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JDAR37AHM0F6FKKX5VGRQWVM_13)
---
| | These updates are only possible with the generous gift of supporters like you! If you'd like to donate by check, please make your check payable and mail to: Dan Crenshaw for Congress, 5900 Memorial Drive, Suite 215, Houston, TX 77007.
---

| [ ](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JDAR37AHM0F6FKKX5VGRQWVM_14) [ ](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JDAR37AHM0F6FKKX5VGRQWVM_15) [ ](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JDAR37AHM0F6FKKX5VGRQWVM_16)
---
| |
---
| No longer want to receive these emails? [Unsubscribe](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JDAR37AHM0F6FKKX5VGRQWVM_17).
crenshawshop 5900 Memorial Drive Suite 215 Houston, Texas 77007

name: Katie Porter
subject: It helps to focus on the why
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39316%2E3422442%2EYMxHQ8)
Derek, being a good steward of our democracy isn’t always easy. There is a lot of work, so much noise, and on occasion, tough losses.
To pick yourself back up, it helps to focus on the _why_.
Over the past six years, I’ve had a number of frustrations with Washington. I’m tired of the inaction on issues like bringing down housing costs, protecting abortion rights, and preventing gun violence. And, I’m often _just tired_ from having to wake up at 5:30am to fly across the country to vote on a bill that almost always passes with unanimous support because Congress, especially its schedule, wasn’t designed for someone like me.
Some days, I’ve felt like the best I can do is get out of bed and put one foot in front of the other.
I know I have to keep going—and I do—because it’s part of how I do my part to build a better future for my kids.
As a mom, I worry for my children. I worry about whether they’ll be able to afford to live in California when they grow up. I worry about whether the climate crisis will make our state unlivable. I worry about what would happen if my daughter needs an abortion and can’t get one.
But, I can’t just worry; I’ve got to take action.
Our democracy and our kids are counting on us to keep showing up—and not just once every four years or two years. They need us to put one foot in front of the other and to continue marching toward progress, despite the setbacks and heartbreak along the way.
A better future is possible—if we work for it.
Look, I know it’s demoralizing when Donald Trump announces he’s nominating yet another unqualified sycophant for his cabinet. And, the prospect of a Republican trifecta in Washington and the harm they can do is scary.
I also know this. We are tough enough, and we aren’t going down without a fight.
Thanks for being in this movement,
Katie

**Katie Porter started Truth to Power to support Democrats who reject corporate PAC money** and are running to protect the environment, restore the nationwide right to an abortion, and create an economy that works for working people. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/truth-to-power-1?refcode=em20241122-39316&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=39316_3422442_YMxHQ8&akid=39316%2E3422442%2EYMxHQ8)**
---
Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [**you can do so here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-ttp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp-unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=39316%2E3422442%2EYMxHQ8).

To contribute via check, please address to: Truth to Power PAC, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Hollywood has done enough
body:
Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues... | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: **_You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children._** Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=97034cbd4cc8479ca718cc0ecf52316b&_e=wQOr1zLYg7GUhnC-fLXNn_-hxLEvw5Irwwq9svv9Q4_JUvgW0zJDrKXzfi4N0gD_7rm30xG533jFleTH7I8BOtMeI4OnnZC0QFtw_x9o5yioqczvuQsq22_I9meaWOvt1iFrQ8LA4f2YVrtxB49mARla3LxI2PsM7PRPushsPhlUxmEjrBcO0Fbf1HVL3ZSJjQ_bt40uCbrGLluynLbuQirnv8Zv98StksV3B6wqv78aPYFKfE2bOCRIS32rza9zOpY9cJItUo2PAw6DKmwicyWj_Js0fimHuKwPQaVyyTLk_D7VcLi23WRXVR-_742vbFT_S6gJIJ6IqJJKIqcOGa6uamQgxw77rL6rc_wYj5Y8gPSooXCYBe2dZkJs4VjiW14gu5aXQDuqX6-lasM9kg%3D%3D)
---
| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=97034cbd4cc8479ca718cc0ecf52316b&_e=wQOr1zLYg7GUhnC-fLXNn_-hxLEvw5Irwwq9svv9Q4_JUvgW0zJDrKXzfi4N0gD_7rm30xG533jFleTH7I8BOtMeI4OnnZC0QFtw_x9o5yioqczvuQsq22_I9meaWOvt1iFrQ8LA4f2YVrtxB49mARla3LxI2PsM7PRPushsPhlUxmEjrBcO0Fbf1HVL3ZSJjQ_bt40uCbrGLluynLbuQirnv8Zv98StksV3B6wqv78aPYFKfE2bOCRIS32rza9z87GczXtgxfHAIEN2yMqyZ2tBY2y0-xVzysSYdkAqufmKherB8cW9OC0i4ePc-vlU_QX8O6oCZ-4Lj9rhLx2HjJzd-yd19pa9pqGWX9T0dYg1hn5tn0c22OU5OL3DX6TEZmtqDTZpEdLham-6loNFKg%3D%3D)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[**Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=97034cbd4cc8479ca718cc0ecf52316b&_e=wQOr1zLYg7GUhnC-fLXNn_-hxLEvw5Irwwq9svv9Q4_JUvgW0zJDrKXzfi4N0gD_7rm30xG533jFleTH7I8BOtMeI4OnnZC0QFtw_x9o5yioqczvuQsq22_I9meaWOvt1iFrQ8LA4f2YVrtxB49mARla3LxI2PsM7PRPushsPhlUxmEjrBcO0Fbf1HVL3ZSJjQ_bt40uCbrGLluynLbuQirnv8Zv98StksV3B6wqv78aPYFKfE2bOCRIS32rza9ztGtLcrznPQeNICqEiT3j0TLIWcNPLNOyJcaR2oV5HFqgfuueORGdcrMki6xjYSneyCYvF1JCT7aRdV3Pd_ugqCPu-LQ9taC_6JH6wPPFhOdEKo06N_tiQmHnXCiwsqIqw_y2B4Z0KwgtZBc2UmFv_A%3D%3D)** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=97034cbd4cc8479ca718cc0ecf52316b&_e=wQOr1zLYg7GUhnC-fLXNn_-hxLEvw5Irwwq9svv9Q4_JUvgW0zJDrKXzfi4N0gD_7rm30xG533jFleTH7I8BOtMeI4OnnZC0QFtw_x9o5yioqczvuQsq22_I9meaWOvt1iFrQ8LA4f2YVrtxB49mARla3LxI2PsM7PRPushsPhlUxmEjrBcO0Fbf1HVL3ZSJjQ_bt40uCbrGLluynLbuQirnv8Zv98StksV3B6wqv78aPYFKfE2bOCRIS32rza9zP1mO0IH-g9VNDCijB8xb8e-tKFotjZ31Csfpeo_4mssPMQ3lW7gotfv9J9BDlTBYYf1e0gKEtlNTbfmSegcwew8vZG4mXxCQnQAli7GH5yVJ77mdQoOOBKxeiD4T_Myva6L3kTR4DNDW9scR1RA46A%3D%3D) ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you**** all ten episodes of** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ **for your family to enjoy**** FREE on DVD.** ** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter. **

| | This is one of my favorite knives to date.

I own a ton of expensive hunting knives and OTF blades, but truly nothing has been more convenient that this [car keys switchblade.](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19170/6374453/cf25fbabe6f3d9fc2129f8836777e9b553245563/2b426d65c7f45a0d85ead40ce78465098b6eb211)

It's always with me on the go, where my car keys are is where my concealed switch is too, this compact American designed knife, is called _**"The Firecracker" - and was initially launched for a 4th of July promotion.**_

Due to the growing response for this line of switchblades, they restocked and making them available again year-round.

These are going viral because there's nothing that [fits so flush on a keychain while having the OTF ejectable switch feature in a knife](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19170/6374453/cf25fbabe6f3d9fc2129f8836777e9b553245563/2b426d65c7f45a0d85ead40ce78465098b6eb211) on the go.

This is mobile convenience of switchblade knife perfect for easy daily tasks like opening mail/packages.

I find my car keys are always on me more often than an edc knife, so combining all in one place just makes my life easier being able to carry this tool so easily.

Doesn't get in your way only brings value and handiness to your life.

Get the Compact switchblade safely sits your pocket along with your car or truck keys.

name: Patti Reilly
subject: Help me save my son
body:
My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do.
Dear Peter,

My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do.

And though you and I have never met, I’m praying you’ll help me save him.

Here are some photos of Terence as a little boy.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ca093dda975c4950ba0a6fa5c2387fb4&_e=3NQnfN_ZWFB34pKI-oO67WBh8XEt6a0oQjEfyuC-ygG71sK3G1XpNmTKetqXyQZYgib8D2csZ9GMJvoJARs9fpdtwZgYqYJVZu8pKqD-P1sx3CBnTwdcLBCn5e1HTJV0wnQaoHXsqfSV3kkQhVTbUGbQtUAToNbLuw2GyAimdml-k4XCCogUY0KkEM7OcMj3ft77qb4ZbGez4DU61c-26EBrAu6d-z4UdiX4IWSwq_R0S0Y7Cg6XEQSrRUZOLVfxR36bpUxy6mXb2-a2gKflkldjMo3zBP-jXfErntW5w37aWp-cjbBxkq0gEuRp8SJpTzuIm7ps14C6xjniDUtouOqgZG677qUwY07IfU9964-DlQZly_AzgWT_zBKu846A7UGCR_FIhjYplPri6AL-mQ%3D%3D)
He always dreamed of following in his dad’s footsteps to be a police officer. I also included one of my favorites of us from the night he graduated from the Police Academy.

I was so proud that night.

Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be _wrongfully_ _convicted_ _of_ _murder_ **– murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch.**

[**_I’m praying you will help me save my son_**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ca093dda975c4950ba0a6fa5c2387fb4&_e=3NQnfN_ZWFB34pKI-oO67WBh8XEt6a0oQjEfyuC-ygG71sK3G1XpNmTKetqXyQZYgib8D2csZ9GMJvoJARs9fpdtwZgYqYJVZu8pKqD-P1sx3CBnTwdcLBCn5e1HTJV0wnQaoHXsqfSV3kkQhVTbUGbQtUAToNbLuw2GyAimdml-k4XCCogUY0KkEM7OcMj3ft77qb4ZbGez4DU61c-26EBrAu6d-z4UdiX4IWSwq_R0S0Y7Cg6XEQSrRUZOLVfx5esmrpz9FNY3Jt7eNnSWbTIHcLYWfKPaa4Sjk8Nn3_nhx0QPNX1JpMe_X45bNDFGfP8zBNARQYUp2oojjcikZIHqeVN9uOPG9m7Sz54dMzrmrE2imtfCkkep6rkMpn5ppPbxFYocWNAkNXOTx6u_Jg%3D%3D) – **but first, let me explain what happened.** Our nightmare started in October of 2020.

Terence was sitting in his patrol car when he received a report that a known gang member, Karon Hylton-Brown, was seen entering a rival gang’s territory.

Karon was a violent criminal with a rap sheet a mile long – including drugs, illegal gun possession, and assaults. Earlier that day, he was seen arguing with a rival gang member who owed him money. So Terence and other officers were concerned Karon was planning to get revenge.

When Terence saw Karon illegally driving a motorized scooter on the sidewalk without a helmet, he tried to pull him over to talk. Instead, Karon took off on the scooter.

Terence watched as Karon sped through traffic, weaving in and out of cars and blowing past red lights and stop signs.

My son knew Karon was putting others at risk, so for 3 minutes he slowly and carefully followed behind in his patrol car.

Then it happened.

Karon veered into an alleyway, drove out the other side without looking and slammed into a passing car.

After several days in the hospital, Karon died from his injuries. And here’s where the story takes a shocking turn...

Because Karon was black, and the incident happened just four months after George Floyd’s death, the anti-police mob went into frenzy.

They blamed Terence for the accident and smeared him as a racist.

There were protests and even riots. The mob threw rocks at officers, smashed store windows, and set fires.

Anti-police politicians piled on too. Without any evidence, they demanded my son be charged even though he did nothing to cause Karon’s death.

**The pressure campaign worked and prosecutors charged my son with Second-Degree Murder.**

**Terence was convicted in December 2022 and he was finally just sentenced – to 5 1⁄2 years in prison.**

Now you understand why I’m so heartbroken. The injustice is almost too much to bear.

My son was well-respected by the community he served. He trained many Rookies and set a good example for all of them. He was even awarded Officer of the Year!

But unless Terence’s appeal is successful, he’s going to prison – which is why I’m urgently turning to you for help today. The **Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund** (LELDF) has stepped forward to pay for Terence’s defense and is actively raising funds to pay for the appeal.

If you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know they’re a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Terence for over 30 years. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops – and their families – at their lowest moments.

We expect it will cost at least $150,000 to appeal Terence’s conviction.

So I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I’ve ever asked anyone:

[**_Will you help my son Terence fight the unjust charges against him by donating to LELDF today?_**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ca093dda975c4950ba0a6fa5c2387fb4&_e=3NQnfN_ZWFB34pKI-oO67WBh8XEt6a0oQjEfyuC-ygG71sK3G1XpNmTKetqXyQZYgib8D2csZ9GMJvoJARs9fpdtwZgYqYJVZu8pKqD-P1sx3CBnTwdcLBCn5e1HTJV0wnQaoHXsqfSV3kkQhVTbUGbQtUAToNbLuw2GyAimdml-k4XCCogUY0KkEM7OcMj3ft77qb4ZbGez4DU61c-26EBrAu6d-z4UdiX4IWSwq_R0S0Y7Cg6XEQSrRUZOLVfxcU4GOcLd50lOwpw-zu0_Bdr5QGbcER9Yd02ZFk1x2N3p1xQtPUc-zfNwNuzySft11miLO0PNOhD_ojYqtQZYMP834OGwYEjqwN0xTTV2vhl3_-4nWo0n4OGU1EyZXkbyrZS1mustOox0PSlh5b6bUg%3D%3D)

I’m not asking you to donate the entire $150,000 yourself – though it would be a huge weight off our shoulders if you are able to help that way.

[**_But your tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, or more will help LELDF fully fund Terence’s appeal over the next 12 months._**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ca093dda975c4950ba0a6fa5c2387fb4&_e=3NQnfN_ZWFB34pKI-oO67WBh8XEt6a0oQjEfyuC-ygG71sK3G1XpNmTKetqXyQZYgib8D2csZ9GMJvoJARs9fpdtwZgYqYJVZu8pKqD-P1sx3CBnTwdcLBCn5e1HTJV0wnQaoHXsqfSV3kkQhVTbUGbQtUAToNbLuw2GyAimdml-k4XCCogUY0KkEM7OcMj3ft77qb4ZbGez4DU61c-26EBrAu6d-z4UdiX4IWSwq_R0S0Y7Cg6XEQSrRUZOLVfxU-cFEHgJvA3Pbulsww61mHa6sl2DT-GxxEnUdGRtK7mvSBwTbRFOzLr_dCSlmC031WlghnGz5B8Ufrn0KKsgzxAh0q2gcpwHF6-ynW7rTQU_Ja2-FRJELe-v9XLzBT7C3sTqt_1XCQ72D3sPuQT6Mw%3D%3D) If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn’t be so bold as to ask for your help.

But I already lost my husband. He was a police officer too, and he was so proud that Terence followed in his footsteps. I simply can’t bear the thought of having another family member ripped away from me.

[**_So if you are at all able, please follow this link to make a tax-deductible donation to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund to help my Terence._**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ca093dda975c4950ba0a6fa5c2387fb4&_e=3NQnfN_ZWFB34pKI-oO67WBh8XEt6a0oQjEfyuC-ygG71sK3G1XpNmTKetqXyQZYgib8D2csZ9GMJvoJARs9fpdtwZgYqYJVZu8pKqD-P1sx3CBnTwdcLBCn5e1HTJV0wnQaoHXsqfSV3kkQhVTbUGbQtUAToNbLuw2GyAimdml-k4XCCogUY0KkEM7OcMj3ft77qb4ZbGez4DU61c-26EBrAu6d-z4UdiX4IWSwq_R0S0Y7Cg6XEQSrRUZOLVfxnOM-bCYzBuRobKl0ikSfs2YR2iygclC9LYKKObuEztHku7gMYm_2cQkdb8sLkEDTtGOF5UUjv-R97R1IQcUJOvWcHvR75QtBhXB8VJlVyieRAXuUBHBWHqm0Qw-KFSiWESY38hGUvBl5Qdlv1njKSw%3D%3D)

**Any amount – $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more – will help.**

And because LELDF is a non-profit organization, your gift is completely tax-deductible. But whatever you can afford to give, I ask that you rush it back quickly.

Right now, Terence can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind folks like you.

Thank you for taking the time to read my letter today.

And thank you in advance for helping LELDF support Terence and other wrongly accused officers.

Gratefully,
**Patti Reilly**

P.S. Don’t get me wrong, I’m thankful the judge granted Terence bond so he doesn’t have to report to prison just yet. Hopefully it never comes to that... but to get Terence’s conviction overturned, it’s going to cost at least $150,000 to fund his appeal. [**_Will you please help me save my son by making an urgent tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100 or more to LELDF today?_**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ca093dda975c4950ba0a6fa5c2387fb4&_e=3NQnfN_ZWFB34pKI-oO67WBh8XEt6a0oQjEfyuC-ygG71sK3G1XpNmTKetqXyQZYgib8D2csZ9GMJvoJARs9fpdtwZgYqYJVZu8pKqD-P1sx3CBnTwdcLBCn5e1HTJV0wnQaoHXsqfSV3kkQhVTbUGbQtUAToNbLuw2GyAimdml-k4XCCogUY0KkEM7OcMj3ft77qb4ZbGez4DU61c-26EBrAu6d-z4UdiX4IWSwq_R0S0Y7Cg6XEQSrRUZOLVfxNnW_Pw_U7ja-QzSOy5KjKr3AFwRhc8OlmUN2Ge8-toPR1QsiGI3O8SG7N-6YeEzFOxURuLaYfCAHx6gGH0RV-HvFMvw1ddi7etnmpLVkW9YqkSZzsZODEn4omGfpOIJOaCos6pXC3yHyb-Yt1hU8gA%3D%3D) Thank you for standing with Terence during this nightmare.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. clean_body: My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do. Dear Peter, My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do. And though you and I have never met, I’m praying you’ll help me save him. Here are some photos of Terence as a little boy. He always dreamed of following in his dad’s footsteps to be a police officer. I also included one of my favorites of us from the night he graduated from the Police Academy. I was so proud that night. Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be wrongfully convicted of murder – murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch. – but first, let me explain what happened. Our nightmare started in October of 2020. Terence was sitting in his patrol car when he received a report that a known gang member, Karon Hylton-Brown, was seen entering a rival gang’s territory. Karon was a violent criminal with a rap sheet a mile long – including drugs, illegal gun possession, and assaults. Earlier that day, he was seen arguing with a rival gang member who owed him money. So Terence and other officers were concerned Karon was planning to get revenge. When Terence saw Karon illegally driving a motorized scooter on the sidewalk without a helmet, he tried to pull him over to talk. Instead, Karon took off on the scooter. Terence watched as Karon sped through traffic, weaving in and out of cars and blowing past red lights and stop signs. My son knew Karon was putting others at risk, so for 3 minutes he slowly and carefully followed behind in his patrol car. Then it happened. Karon veered into an alleyway, drove out the other side without looking and slammed into a passing car. After several days in the hospital, Karon died from his injuries. And here’s where the story takes a shocking turn... Because Karon was black, and the incident happened just four months after George Floyd’s death, the anti-police mob went into frenzy. They blamed Terence for the accident and smeared him as a racist. There were protests and even riots. The mob threw rocks at officers, smashed store windows, and set fires. Anti-police politicians piled on too. Without any evidence, they demanded my son be charged even though he did nothing to cause Karon’s death. The pressure campaign worked and prosecutors charged my son with Second-Degree Murder. Terence was convicted in December 2022 and he was finally just sentenced – to 5 1⁄2 years in prison. Now you understand why I’m so heartbroken. The injustice is almost too much to bear. My son was well-respected by the community he served. He trained many Rookies and set a good example for all of them. He was even awarded Officer of the Year! But unless Terence’s appeal is successful, he’s going to prison – which is why I’m urgently turning to you for help today. The Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF) has stepped forward to pay for Terence’s defense and is actively raising funds to pay for the appeal. If you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know they’re a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Terence for over 30 years. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops – and their families – at their lowest moments. We expect it will cost at least $150,000 to appeal Terence’s conviction. So I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I’ve ever asked anyone: I’m not asking you to donate the entire $150,000 yourself – though it would be a huge weight off our shoulders if you are able to help that way. If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn’t be so bold as to ask for your help. But I already lost my husband. He was a police officer too, and he was so proud that Terence followed in his footsteps. I simply can’t bear the thought of having another family member ripped away from me. Any amount – $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more – will help. And because LELDF is a non-profit organization, your gift is completely tax-deductible. But whatever you can afford to give, I ask that you rush it back quickly. Right now, Terence can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind folks like you. Thank you for taking the time to read my letter today. And thank you in advance for helping LELDF support Terence and other wrongly accused officers. Gratefully, Patti Reilly P.S. Don’t get me wrong, I’m thankful the judge granted Terence bond so he doesn’t have to report to prison just yet. Hopefully it never comes to that... but to get Terence’s conviction overturned, it’s going to cost at least $150,000 to fund his appeal. Thank you for standing with Terence during this nightmare. More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visitwww.PoliceDefense.org. And remember -Blue Lives Matter! # FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Reader,**I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns.

I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism.

**But there's also far more to what the Sun is building.

As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be.

I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust.

The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored.

The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way.

**The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun.** A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.**My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly.**

I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths.

They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts.

Hi team,
We’re still here — and we’re not giving up.
The outcome of this election was not what we wanted or worked for. Donald Trump's hatred and corruption go against our core values, and it’s terrifying to imagine what the next four years may bring.
But Colorado stood out nationally, shifting to the left while much of the country moved to the right. The energy and enthusiasm shown by voters in our incredible state is still a victory, no matter what.
We’ve taken some time to rest and reflect on the election — and we hope you have, too. Now, we want to hear from you.
Looking back, what do you wish had been done differently? Moving forward, what policies do you want to see Michael and Democrats in Congress fight for?
Your voice is more important than ever. Will you share your thoughts by filling out our post-election survey here? [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/postelection-priorities-survey-2024]
POST-ELECTION SURVEY [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/postelection-priorities-survey-2024]
Thank you for taking the time — and making a difference.
Onwards,
Team Bennet

| Dear Fellow Patriot,

My name is Dr. Ben Carson, and along with my wife, Candy, I have spent years contemplating the challenges facing American families today.

Our new book, _The Perilous Fight_ , addresses these issues head-on, offering practical insights and solutions to restore and strengthen the family unit.

Why is this important? Because the family's pivotal role in our society is under threat, and without addressing these challenges, our foundational values may be lost. [](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=04eea194d85b49dd8df5c5be1f9f3380&_e=NmW1pWlnlcU9-WUtQmYgvVfOM8g2eGfK46VWpke73l4kl9uwX4-QLh0Ws32AUSe-dlJlR2nBqoxY5z_qj_nvHYN4RJ6OXqHucQDBfvaj-Aj5xJJUlvb9cqfct2FPY6HupUkwAe_RQK89XOt6UoaJP-oVMRQN_jE7FExY3Mte26hvE890G19hwekk90pHZc92739peR1Ux3IOYtALw7Al-_T1NnLxj8AwemZRfbY4b84c3iThcqQpfGOA_RdoKd79jQWBLYHNlgQ5C_PosDfMNMUAzzGco6u7MJLev2UwvaFen7CCOLCn_r-r4BVaKPbUW0s5cAxQ-6oIspQbS_TxILckPRa8R0cfTeJZu6zjtT8snhZK1sXa_fRe8zhrFz0BWQnVNlTtyv-8CR8zeSKJVgodKB9r2OdaCUUIEC4yus8%3D) In _The Perilous Fight_ , we dive deep into the social and economic pressures that families face, dissect the erosion of traditional values, and present actionable steps for rebuilding familial bonds. This book isn't just a series of observations; it's a roadmap to a healthier, more stable society through strong family units.

## Inside the Trump transition...
Trump's first White House Chief of Staff and my old boss, Reince Preibus joined me to discuss the inside workings of the Trump transition.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/fbaba082-34a6-4a1c-9cd7-5643fc9cefb5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## TONIGHT Alex Clark joins us at 6 pm...
We discuss the MAHA movement, how it helped get Trump elected, and how he's going to execute it to Make America Healthy Again.
[Click here and subscribe](https://substack.com/redirect/860805aa-cafd-4ae6-b04d-f79beacd3d2d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Next week we will be covering more of the transition with some great guests - don't miss a show.
## Don't forget to tune into The Morning Meeting, every morning at 9 am...
We run through the day the same way every major new publication does, give you the overview of what will be driving the day and then we open it up to you the viewer for questions and comments.
[Hit subscribe and turn on notifications](https://substack.com/redirect/860805aa-cafd-4ae6-b04d-f79beacd3d2d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

## Stories I'm Reading...
[The DOGE Plan to Reform Government ](https://substack.com/redirect/34917384-e33b-443e-808e-f8707317efbd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)-- Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy, via Wall Street Journal
[Comcast once regarded its cable group -- with channels like USA, MSNBC, E! and Oxygen -- as a crown jewel. Now it's spinning off nearly all of them into a $7 billion venture. ](https://substack.com/redirect/25d413cb-6dfc-43c2-947f-2bf78bec223d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)-- via Wall Street Journal
[For Minority Working-Class Voters, Dismay in Democrats Led to Distrust](https://substack.com/redirect/a5bdfe28-9122-4b45-9f40-b9b52fb5e4c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) -- via New York Times
[Trump's Signature Dance Moves Finds Its Way to the Sports World ](https://substack.com/redirect/ab88f11e-7d42-4f3c-875d-39599ed2e1eb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)-- via New York Times
[Influencers Who Often Post About News, and Who Sees Their Content --](https://substack.com/redirect/25c35624-022d-44d7-bdd1-ac96ff06880f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) via Pew Research
### Behind the scenes of the transition
In 2016 President Trump met with many of the nominees at his Bedminister Club where he posed for pictures as they came in and out. This time around he is not as public chasing to issue statements on his Truth Social platform. I was looking through some of the never before scene photos from 2016 and thought I'd share some (I also have some on my instagram follow [here](https://substack.com/redirect/83df6a80-ed71-4c51-8b6f-23b03150de12?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)).
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9ad72dd1-a69a-4478-b16f-0d356104422e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

## Trump isn't doing ANY MORE rallies...
But over the past few years, a production team and I went inside the rallies and talked to the group of people who went to ALL of the rallies: The Front Row Joes.
Check out the doc this weekend:
[Weekend Viewing](https://substack.com/redirect/6cb6d4fb-e9a3-4d47-9ea4-a9c2c1947d41?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

[By Inauguration ](https://substack..Ld3WdDORSEYmBqQ9t5NDJsDZjpBR8ONXlpsC7MWMdbA?)
## Let's talk about the nominee's "qualifications"
Much has been made of the "qualifications" of some of the Trump nominations. I question though whether it is really about qualifications or rather personality and their commitment to shake up the establishment that so many in the Washington establishment depend on.
Many folks on Capitol Hill were surprised by President Trump's nomination of Pete Hegseth as Secretary of Defense and openly questioned whether he could be confirmed. Let's look at Pete's background - Princeton graduate, leader of the veterans group Concerned Veterans for America, Army officer with deployments at Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, Iraq and Afghanistan and the recipient of two Bronzer Stars. Sounds pretty qualified to me.
All of this got me thinking about the "qualifications" of Biden cabinet. I wrote an entire chapter on the Biden cabinet in my book Radical Nation. Lets take a look at a few.
Denis McDonough is the Secretary of Veterans Affairs. He never served in the military. He has never been part of a Veterans Service Organization. He has no background in the two largest functions of the VA - securing loans and health care. Hmmm.....what exactly are his qualifications? Oh yeah, he was Obama's chief of staff. Qualified?...

name: Dominic Rapini
subject: The Future Looks Bright in America
body:
We are the dawn of a Golden Age | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/41e1f4928eaf/when-we-vote-we-win-14760971?e=8763c56857)
---
|
---
[](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=40984122c1&e=8763c56857)
| | | | |
---
|
# The Future Looks
# Bright in America
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | | _By Dominic Rapini, American Businessman and Political Commentator_
---
| As Donald Trump takes office, a sense of optimism is emerging nationwide. The middle class, often regarded as the backbone of America, is no longer being read, they are being positioned at the forefront of a bold economic and cultural renewal. Businesses are preparing to expand, families are beginning to feel the weight of economic strain lifting, and the concept of the American Dream—once thought to be fading—is being reignited. overlooked; ins
Trump’s presidency represents a paradigm shift—a government that embraces the dynamism of private enterprise, prioritizes results over politics, and advocates for the people who make this country thrive. From his focus on restoring jobs in communities once devastated by globalization to his plans for strengthening infrastructure and reimagining healthcare, the seeds of a brighter future are planted today.
Of course, there will be challenges ahead. Change of this magnitude only comes with resistance or the need for adjustment. However, if Trump’s early momentum is any indication, his administration is well-positioned to overcome obstacles and deliver on its promises. The president-elect has tapped into the hopes and ambitions of millions of Americans, and now he can channel those hopes into lasting, transformative action.
The future looks bright for America. With fresh leadership and a renewed commitment to the middle class, we are entering an era where opportunity is no longer reserved for the few but shared among all who strive for it. The challenging days of uncertainty and stagnation give way to an age of ambition, resilience, and growth.
_**The Trump presidency has opened the door to a new chapter of American greatness—and the best is yet to come.**_
---
|
---
