name: Allegiance Gold
subject: Reality Check: Are You Prepared for What's Next?
body:
[](https://link.myamericanpatriot.) | **[How Banks Can Seize Your Accounts?

](https://link.myamericanpatriot.)Banks don’t need your permission to legally seize your deposits. **This is how you can protect your savings. [**Learn More**](https://link.myamericanpatriot.)
---|---
[](https://link.myamericanpatriot.) | [**BRICS Plans to End US Dollar Dominance**

](https://link.myamericanpatriot.)The anti-dollar drive spearheaded by China and Russia is spreading quickly. **Can this "Evil" plan be a threat to your wealth?** [**Learn More**](https://link.myamericanpatriot.)
[](https://link.myamericanpatriot.) | **[New Leadership, Same Financial Risks?](https://link.myamericanpatriot.)
[](https://link.myamericanpatriot.)**
The dust has settled, but the economic risks haven't. **Discover what you need to know to shield your financial future.**
[**Learn More**](https://link.myamericanpatriot.)****

**[Reality Check: Are You Prepared for What's Next?](https://link.myamericanpatriot.)** With everything going on today, it’s natural to feel a growing sense of unease about the future. Rising costs of everyday essentials, inflation eating into the value of our hard-earned dollars, and news of escalating national debt are impacting people across the board. The middle class feels the pinch acutely, with many left wondering how long they can maintain their standard of living without making sacrifices. Global shifts, like the alliance of BRICS nations pushing for economic independence from the U.S. dollar, and ongoing market volatility add layers of unpredictability that complicate even the best-laid financial plans. It’s easy to find yourself asking: **[What happens if the world doesn’t return to “normal”?](https://link.myamericanpatriot.)** One pressing concern that keeps emerging is the U.S. dollar’s diminishing purchasing power. According to recent data from the U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics and the World Bank, the dollar has lost over 20% of its purchasing power since 2020. In practical terms, this devaluation means that a dollar today buys far less than it did just four years ago, impacting everyday expenses, savings, and the value of long-term assets. **[For the average middle-class American, each percentage point lost further erodes financial security, forcing them to either cut back or explore alternative ways to protect and grow their savings.](https://link.myamericanpatriot.)**
[](https://link.myamericanpatriot.)
For many, day-to-day routines, busy schedules, and opinions from advisors, family, and friends often pull attention away from the bigger picture. When it comes to finances, it’s tempting to put off critical decisions, assume the status quo will hold, or rely on others’ advice without evaluating what’s truly best for long-term security. **[But in times like these, with so many factors shifting all at once, taking proactive steps has never been more important.](https://link.myamericanpatriot.)** The question is no longer whether to take action but what kind of action to take. How can we prepare for an economic environment that feels as unpredictable as it is challenging? How can we maintain our lifestyles, protect our families, and still plan for the future, regardless of what uncertainties arise? **[Diversification—spreading out assets to manage risk—has long been a cornerstone of financial planning in uncertain times.](https://link.myamericanpatriot.)** Throughout history, people have turned to various methods to safeguard their wealth with assets that retain value even when the market fluctuates. In today’s world, including options in your portfolio that offer stability, and long-term resilience can bring peace of mind and create a more secure future. **Why Gold and Silver?** These assets are not tied to any single economy, currency, or policy, giving them a unique role in a diversified portfolio. Unlike assets solely tied to market performance, gold and silver possess intrinsic value that has historically held up through market and economic shifts. They’re valued not because of fleeting trends but because of their enduring role as stores of value across civilizations, providing an extra layer of security when times feel uncertain. **[This is precisely why central banks and governments are steadily increasing their reserves of gold and silver.](https://link.myamericanpatriot.)** We understand that taking action can seem complex, especially with so much information and influence pulling us in different directions. However, the biggest risk isn’t taking action—it’s staying fully exposed to a financial system already showing signs of cracks. The question isn’t whether assets like gold and silver value have—central banks and governments worldwide have already answered that for us. The real question is: How comfortable are you leaving your wealth fully exposed to a system under strain? Having clarity about your financial direction matters. Discover steps you can take toward a more diversified, secure future aligned with your goals. That is why we are giving you the[**free Wealth Education Guide**](https://link.myamericanpatriot.), in addition to **FREE $250** worth of silver with any qualified purchase above $10,000.

This guide is a valuable resource that shows you how to navigate these turbulent times and make informed decisions about your financial future. **[Request Your Free Learning Kit Today!](https://link.myamericanpatriot.)**
[](https://link.myamericanpatriot.)

[](https://link.myamericanpatriot.)

name: Stacey Abrams, Fair Fight
subject: Moving from resistance to insistence
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight
body:
Together we will fight for our democracy |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97517295/513684887/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20241122_f_KeepMovingForward_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmM2NWM4OC0xNGE5LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CFS2cR8aBQVd7eYXqQwB5etCKHaJPURaylrfdteoUAk=&emci=c4c65c88-14a9-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=cfc65c88-14a9-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=1037277)

| | I remember the first time we found ourselves facing a Trump administration. In those moments of anger and fear, we sparked a resistance. We organized and we persisted. We marched and we pushed back. We didn’t know what was to come, but we vowed to fight back. And then this year, November 5 happened — and it feels like we’re back where we started. But now, the President-elect has told us exactly what he plans to do, and his followers have written Project 2025 as a blueprint for the harm and disruption they intend to cause. This time, we know what to expect. While millions agree with the harm that Trump has promised, we have to remember that millions also did not agree, and they spoke up. **While the outcome of the election has left us with more questions than answers, our work is not done.** I know we’re exhausted, disheartened, and scared. But we’ve been here before. We’ve fought, resisted, and built — together. [**Today, we keep moving forward. I hope Fair Fight can count on your support as their work to protect voting rights is more important than ever.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97517296/513684888/-1598577384?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20241122_f_KeepMovingForward_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmM2NWM4OC0xNGE5LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CFS2cR8aBQVd7eYXqQwB5etCKHaJPURaylrfdteoUAk=) | [GIVE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97517297/513684889/-1598577384?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20241122_f_KeepMovingForward_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmM2NWM4OC0xNGE5LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CFS2cR8aBQVd7eYXqQwB5etCKHaJPURaylrfdteoUAk=)

As we prepare for the next four years, we cannot think that it’s enough this time to just resist. This time, we must **_insist_**.
We must insist on a government and leaders that respect our needs and demand the same for our communities. We must insist on fighting for our rights, even if we think we’re going to lose. We must insist on our own power and the change we have accomplished.
We exist between elections and between the harms. We are responsible for making the good and making change.
[**Our democracy depends on ensuring every voice is heard and every vote counts — and with your help, Fair Fight can continue to champion voting rights.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97517298/513684890/-1598577384?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20241122_f_KeepMovingForward_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmM2NWM4OC0xNGE5LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CFS2cR8aBQVd7eYXqQwB5etCKHaJPURaylrfdteoUAk=)

clean_body: Together we will fight for our democracy | | | I remember the first time we found ourselves facing a Trump administration. In those moments of anger and fear, we sparked a resistance. We organized and we persisted. We marched and we pushed back. We didn’t know what was to come, but we vowed to fight back. And then this year, November 5 happened — and it feels like we’re back where we started. But now, the President-elect has told us exactly what he plans to do, and his followers have written Project 2025 as a blueprint for the harm and disruption they intend to cause. This time, we know what to expect. While millions agree with the harm that Trump has promised, we have to remember that millions also did not agree, and they spoke up. While the outcome of the election has left us with more questions than answers, our work is not done. I know we’re exhausted, disheartened, and scared. But we’ve been here before. We’ve fought, resisted, and built — together. = | = As we prepare for the next four years, we cannot think that it’s enough this time to just resist. This time, we must insist. We must insist on a government and leaders that respect our needs and demand the same for our communities. We must insist on fighting for our rights, even if we think we’re going to lose. We must insist on our own power and the change we have accomplished. We exist between elections and between the harms. We are responsible for making the good and making change. = Keep believing in your vision and fighting. Mikie Sherrill is serving in Congress with Jason Crow to defend democracy and deliver for the people. Now, she's on a mission to get things done for New Jersey as governor. We hope you’ll read her message below, and then split a donation between her and Jason’s campaigns. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97517638/513686469/552371820?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_JC_FR_TAN_GEN_AC60_20241122_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjQ4OTJjZi0xNGE5LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T6VqOKlbph8g_gulafkekdnF8mjBZCYRDcQVj_Zwb3k=) Folks, we’ve been through a lot these last couple years. There have been urgent crises in this country, across the world, and here in New Jersey. As a graduate of the U.S. Naval Academy and a former helicopter aircraft commander, I learned early on that in a crisis, there are only three options: **you can either lead, follow, or get out of the way.** **[I know which one I pick — and that’s why I’m thrilled to share that I am officially running for Governor of New Jersey. In New Jersey, we don’t whine. **We work.**
We’re inventors, innovators, and builders. We work with our minds — and our hands.
So let’s be the state that builds more housing. The state that fixes the economy. And let’s make life more affordable for hard-working New Jerseyans — from health care, to groceries, to child care.
In Congress, I’ve fought every day to address these challenges. They aren’t new, and I’m ready to keep confronting them head-on.
**But we won’t stop there.**
This is the state, more than any other, that guaranteed our freedom as we fought for our nation’s independence. Today, we can also be the state that sets the gold standard for protecting rights and freedoms we know will be under attack from Donald Trump’s Washington – beginning with abortion rights.
Because in New Jersey, we love our country. We’re proud of our state. We value our freedoms. **And we’ll defend them with everything we’ve got.**
In the Navy, I was on a mission to protect our country. Now, I’m announcing my candidacy for governor on a mission to get things done for New Jersey.
**[I’m asking you to join us. clean_body: | Mikie Sherrill is serving in Congress with Jason Crow to defend democracy and deliver for the people. Now, she's on a mission to get things done for New Jersey as governor. We hope you’ll read her message below, and then split a donation between her and Jason’s campaigns. = Folks, we’ve been through a lot these last couple years. There have been urgent crises in this country, across the world, and here in New Jersey. As a graduate of the U.S. Naval Academy and a former helicopter aircraft commander, I learned early on that in a crisis, there are only three options: you can either lead, follow, or get out of the way. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Mikie Sherrill and Jason Crow will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = In New Jersey, we don’t whine. We work. We’re inventors, innovators, and builders. We work with our minds — and our hands. So let’s be the state that builds more housing. The state that fixes the economy. And let’s make life more affordable for hard-working New Jerseyans — from health care, to groceries, to child care. In Congress, I’ve fought every day to address these challenges. They aren’t new, and I’m ready to keep confronting them head-on. But we won’t stop there. This is the state, more than any other, that guaranteed our freedom as we fought for our nation’s independence. Today, we can also be the state that sets the gold standard for protecting rights and freedoms we know will be under attack from Donald Trump’s Washington – beginning with abortion rights. Because in New Jersey, we love our country. We’re proud of our state. We value our freedoms. And we’ll defend them with everything we’ve got. In the Navy, I was on a mission to protect our country. Now, I’m announcing my candidacy for governor on a mission to get things done for New Jersey. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Mikie Sherrill and Jason Crow will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = This will be a campaign we build together. We all have a place and a say in New Jersey’s future. I have met so many people who believe as deeply as I do in the promise of our state. Let’s get to work! — Mikie Jason Crow for Congress 8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543 Greenwood Village, CO 80112 United States | mailto:info@jasoncrowforcongress.com | Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress Jason Crow was a Captain in the U.S. Army. subject: I’ll always fight to protect our environment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten for Congress
body:
We’re already making strides toward a greener, more sustainable future. But with so much at stake, we need to ensure we have the resources to keep fighting for clean water and green jobs that strengthen our community.

|

| It’s clear the incoming administration has plans to gut climate change mitigation policies, but no matter who occupies the Oval Office, I’ll always fight to protect our environment and create jobs right here in MI-03. West Michiganders know that our natural wonders are something special–and they deserve to be protected.

We’re already making strides toward a greener, more sustainable future. But with so much at stake, we need to ensure we have the resources to keep fighting for clean water and green jobs that strengthen our community.

[_**Anything you can give today will keep us moving forward. Let’s keep West Michigan a shining example of what we can achieve together.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97517685/513686580/664569763?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2024-11-22_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjAyMTRmNy0xNGE5LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GYdEQida6fsItm2ySmLZ7VGUSt-zpprZQUfO72bxo3k=)

body:
---
| | I need your eyes on this ASAP. → California Democrats Derek Tran and Adam Gray are deadlocked in the [**CLOSEST**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97517873/513687396/1648029124?amount=15&refcode=20241122_em_fr_b2_np4c_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2ZiMGI4My0xNWE5LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LjdOMgACES48ejeycr7KX8CZeQdxtPRf4ZvziLprkLU=) House races in the country. → Both campaigns have spent down nearly all of their funds to try to FLIP these Republican-held districts from Red to Blue – and they are now facing expensive [**RECOUNTS**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97517874/513687397/1648029124?amount=15&refcode=20241122_em_fr_b2_np4c_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2ZiMGI4My0xNWE5LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LjdOMgACES48ejeycr7KX8CZeQdxtPRf4ZvziLprkLU=). → Pushing them over the finish line is our [**FINAL**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97517875/513687398/1648029124?amount=15&refcode=20241122_em_fr_b2_np4c_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2ZiMGI4My0xNWE5LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LjdOMgACES48ejeycr7KX8CZeQdxtPRf4ZvziLprkLU=) chance to ensure some check on Trump’s power. [**So I’m leaping into action to ensure we count EVERY vote, WIN these races, and keep Trump’s Majority too small to pass his Project 2025 agenda.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97517876/513687399/1648029124?amount=15&refcode=20241122_em_fr_b2_np4c_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2ZiMGI4My0xNWE5LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LjdOMgACES48ejeycr7KX8CZeQdxtPRf4ZvziLprkLU=) [**_Please: We don’t have a moment to spare. That’s why I’m asking you to split a donation between my campaign and Derek and Adam’s Recount Accounts to ensure they have the resources they need to close this election out strong. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=119b7247953f4f049f446153988b5a38&_e=jC9glb3lDQpLIm-U6FGcXaF1l4mv9eFJeeOOiqlJmtMCDhyDav0q8cG4XVJbGvgf6PAzL9utQg-tzko5kT2nea6Dk4PLvE77_VIoXc6DlRb7Lt13ODbTLAltuaSdPdC1NcSlaPaM1mCL5U1-Z_1TCewgwfYnSlWxF8GRK5o1EpjhXjePiE7OUzZ7-jgtZ5phlsye817CkZlYXM6E9DKjRKuqK8qtsk5A3oVIcQ7jYRbfxQYSkZcBvUs3rhgNZje8xyjIC9KGBtsaZbLrE7WKnsLGilNDMviG-0IzoTH__sP9glyNgo0MRNIT7ci86oaCWQEoVGON8lmVVN36ZeL3GUAXptpOHAf9N-LZMsjivFYkdvfGCjZunlzs7_oSPZHV4mISVrbzhYV7McV8cjVIBA%3D%3D)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. name: Liz Walters, ODP Chair
subject: Moving forward
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97518233/513688539/-219784337?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_MovingForward_241122_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDliZmIxOC0xN2E5LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BOpwjLk7bRUz4uJns5Et6PuLP8XedH0OwSFX0EVLAas=) Team,

Like you, I have been trying to digest all the results of the election. Some were heartbreaking. Some were hope-bringing.

The reality is, Ohio could not defy the national political gravity. But Sherrod Brown ran nearly 3 _points ahead of the national ticket_. This loss hurts, but as Senator Brown says “It will never be wrong to fight for working people.”

There are some silver linings to take away from this election:

**Thanks to you, all five of our incumbent House representatives won reelection. Ohioans spoke loud and clear and reelected Reps Joyce Beatty, Greg Landsman, Emilia Sykes, Shontel Brown, and Marcy Kaptur.**

I am finding comfort in knowing that Ohio reelected true champions for our communities with unwavering dedication to fighting for equality, opportunity, and progress for all.

We also gained **four** seats in the state legislature, **five** seats on the state board of education, flipped **two** County Council Districts in Northeast Ohio, and **elected a Democratic Hamilton County Prosecutor for the first time in 92 years.** These are no small feats.

Plus, the activism of Ohioans this year reached levels we haven’t seen in over a decade. 38,931 volunteers knocked on 2.8 million doors and made 7.8 million phone calls. These numbers don’t even begin to include the many who sent postcards, put up yard signs, donated a few bucks, and helped our candidates in so many other ways.

Thank you for joining us in this fight for our country and for the state of Ohio.

There’s a lot of work to do in the months ahead and there are lessons to learn from this election, but we won’t stop fighting for the representation Ohioans deserve and we hope you’ll join us.

Thank you for everything,

Liz Walters, ODP Chair
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97518234/513688540/-219784337?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_MovingForward_241122_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDliZmIxOC0xN2E5LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BOpwjLk7bRUz4uJns5Et6PuLP8XedH0OwSFX0EVLAas=)**

name: Jenna Burns
subject: She’s trying to lock my husband away for the rest of his life
body:
For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.
Dear Peter,

If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.

She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars.

But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target.

She's also trying to lock my husband away for the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe.

**[Before I ask for your help, let me start at the beginning...](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=23051239a7164b9283269424143bb3b8&_e=cYSGGkNq3eA4nlYdl0n9LtQWpRKsDYP_y2trfgrlL3dHQZ3DIuIT0B4WpPQajtnMfEUyTXPgSOFg2s6di0RbIAZ-f1FkbVRyWgiESqjpXcBFmt0oQuJfC0G0MDChry6zAxO-CssuIu3y38Q6MUSrMoP0wp-s0IWQ4xNWc_mvZwMw2awQPED31o8oGTa0zSIpZQq-NLFL7HLClY57kEOR5Pow67bHoWQ78hr-t-PklCRTwZGrM34IlapSVBhVrFPcgSQSFKwl3IuiW6Se1ZL32adszodzdcTL7pKfWh64Anu71Qi_p3UsOf_BxoHJFI1xo_mnE01KXnYLW0p-17AZHprXfz0B7eZhD04uBswqFENpWcCFVKCz9hkWcw3DKsj6)**

My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent.
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=23051239a7164b9283269424143bb3b8&_e=cYSGGkNq3eA4nlYdl0n9LtQWpRKsDYP_y2trfgrlL3dHQZ3DIuIT0B4WpPQajtnMfEUyTXPgSOFg2s6di0RbIAZ-f1FkbVRyWgiESqjpXcBFmt0oQuJfC0G0MDChry6zAxO-CssuIu3y38Q6MUSrMoP0wp-s0IWQ4xNWc_mvZwMw2awQPED31o8oGTa0zSIpZQq-NLFL7HLClY57kEOR5Pow67bHoWQ78hr-t-PklCQAQujJyHD1dKd56DZ0jIRjZsZWOA3FcfMzfqeaS9oGMWz0mcjdF4UzmoSdH9cyIKlOpmbKOTmftMozgAkrPg0rfd0iQpRuziwj3w95bodP0ebl98tEH0y6udgMkK0utxfyum-E0X7BFpsb2DVp3UV7)
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... **_life in prison_** could be his reward.

Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex.

Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over.

My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate.

That's when it happened.

The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.

James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over.

With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly.

James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. **So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder!**

James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket!

We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer.

We couldn't have been more wrong.

You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband.

For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.

The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars!

Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with “MURDERER” scribbled across his face in red spray paint.

Now you understand why I'm so upset and why **[I'm turning to you for help.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=23051239a7164b9283269424143bb3b8&_e=cYSGGkNq3eA4nlYdl0n9LtQWpRKsDYP_y2trfgrlL3dHQZ3DIuIT0B4WpPQajtnMfEUyTXPgSOFg2s6di0RbIAZ-f1FkbVRyWgiESqjpXcBFmt0oQuJfC0G0MDChry6zAxO-CssuIu3y38Q6MUSrMoP0wp-s0IWQ4xNWc_mvZwMw2awQPED31o8oGTa0zSIpZQq-NLFL7HLClY57kEOR5Pow67bHoWQ78hr-t-PklCQfdX1aSnswAGNVw5an8LR4f5d27uGlWnqCljXh_kRRuK72IlzwBQRq3gwwSaQPmQlOgkNhUJrnJ-NVyXKEPwHyJHtL2f-jScoO57QP4uX8gy0TQU2qwJYxQIJNi_g3ya911czv5-vTlJEbkdHFaDws)**

James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people.

He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down.

When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class.

My husband is _exactly_ the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.

But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She _knows_ what happened that night. She _knows_ James was in a life-or-death situation. She _knows_ that the charge should have been dropped years ago.

But Fani Willis doesn't care.

She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo.

James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished.

We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.

It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him.

By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.

My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case.

And it still hasn't been enough.

I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family.

Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... **And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF.**

If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James.

LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment.

And we _were_ at our lowest moment!

Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name.

That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone...

**[Could you send a contribution today to help defend James?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=23051239a7164b9283269424143bb3b8&_e=cYSGGkNq3eA4nlYdl0n9LtQWpRKsDYP_y2trfgrlL3dHQZ3DIuIT0B4WpPQajtnMfEUyTXPgSOFg2s6di0RbIAZ-f1FkbVRyWgiESqjpXcBFmt0oQuJfC0G0MDChry6zAxO-CssuIu3y38Q6MUSrMoP0wp-s0IWQ4xNWc_mvZwMw2awQPED31o8oGTa0zSIpZQq-NLFL7HLClY57kEOR5Pow67bHoWQ78hr-t-PklCTMD21PLlqPTA4Ga0f1DVl1kdcV-0lak0mKFaxCaoYzv1ZGrQr4xT0HqFHZhnEywZulYcbpuZdnFFYgaxM1TDJ0lvFeDy3AwrYS9DwTRapGWBNuhT_Cqmoorvhqmhmlf-RG_7NZ4LWH0_QN6jM9PVsw)**

James' trial is scheduled for November. His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all.

I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger.

But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband.

You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence.

**[So, if you're at all able, would you consider making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or $1,000 to LELDF to help wrongfully-accused officers like James?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=23051239a7164b9283269424143bb3b8&_e=cYSGGkNq3eA4nlYdl0n9LtQWpRKsDYP_y2trfgrlL3dHQZ3DIuIT0B4WpPQajtnMfEUyTXPgSOFg2s6di0RbIAZ-f1FkbVRyWgiESqjpXcBFmt0oQuJfC0G0MDChry6zAxO-CssuIu3y38Q6MUSrMoP0wp-s0IWQ4xNWc_mvZwMw2awQPED31o8oGTa0zSIpZQq-NLFL7HLClY57kEOR5Pow67bHoWQ78hr-t-PklCSxU7DQaHPP3FozGJws5BXjrx3sukltczu5jiTkP-F1C3jxa-0KVxYTDANq13efy9WTRE48FRssEvO3YlO4AYO1DRmDNKIHCK0knrYjm_5X0oM5pDajPJZob3zyjAUkq7M5evW4CRq3dlYQ3888_hXx)**

LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible.

And it's your **[$35 gift](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=23051239a7164b9283269424143bb3b8&_e=cYSGGkNq3eA4nlYdl0n9LtQWpRKsDYP_y2trfgrlL3dHQZ3DIuIT0B4WpPQajtnMfEUyTXPgSOFg2s6di0RbIAZ-f1FkbVRyWgiESqjpXcBFmt0oQuJfC0G0MDChry6zAxO-CssuIu3y38Q6MUSrMoP0wp-s0IWQ4xNWc_mvZwMw2awQPED31o8oGTa0zSIpZQq-NLFL7HLClY57kEOR5Pow67bHoWQ78hr-t-PklCQB1tpoKSrQQ9MHX9cs2mmmTgBY9QR0KauKAUyNWqqlKxVsYAiwoDEI_uP5yYyhvJFvNfSo2kvsL7PfeGLsHClVjHCyaKRrUOB5vt8vtpxgyFg5-pWTZ6F9XMNrrZ4JyT3HJVHAaRSoGb_aic2_zWAJ)** that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ in prison.

I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James.

Sincerely,
Jenna Burns

P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! **[Follow this link right now to make your best tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to LELDF.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=23051239a7164b9283269424143bb3b8&_e=cYSGGkNq3eA4nlYdl0n9LtQWpRKsDYP_y2trfgrlL3dHQZ3DIuIT0B4WpPQajtnMfEUyTXPgSOFg2s6di0RbIAZ-f1FkbVRyWgiESqjpXcBFmt0oQuJfC0G0MDChry6zAxO-CssuIu3y38Q6MUSrMoP0wp-s0IWQ4xNWc_mvZwMw2awQPED31o8oGTa0zSIpZQq-NLFL7HLClY57kEOR5Pow67bHoWQ78hr-t-PklCQYyTeCdqXEbwcbHBtXRN02Z-0VR43Etjw_0ukiCqSerpj2lipmUSgxFr2H-KvkQQt7ymSwjRas-5kbx4ZfDvmRfK4X34Hcs1wOPMk0SR-0aMnnVriKcVBJfe4i0rgF7bTzkjmDKlso9wZsr7YTVVk2)** Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit**www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_

Dear Peter, If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason. She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars. But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target. She's also trying to lock my husband away for the rest of his life for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe. My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent. Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... life in prison could be his reward. Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex. Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over. My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate. That's when it happened. The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him. James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over. With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly. James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder! James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket! We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer. We couldn't have been more wrong. You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband. For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud. The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars! | | _**Start of the 124th General Assembly**_
---
Friends, This week, Republican lawmakers gathered at the Statehouse for Organization Day, marking the first legislative session for the 124th Indiana General Assembly. With our strong majorities, Republican leadership is prepared to deliver on the priorities that matter most to Hoosiers. Under the vision of Governor-Elect Mike Braun, Speaker Todd Huston, and President Pro Tem. Rod Bray, we are excited to see Indiana taken to places it’s never been before, driving unprecedented progress and continuing to push our state into a national model of conservative governance.

Additionally, we’re excited to announce that RSVPs are now open for Mike Braun’s Inaugural Celebration! Join us as we honor this exciting new chapter for Indiana. Details and RSVP information can be found [Here](http://links.email.in-gop.com/u/click?_t=9a0b7d408bc44ce9bb6828c91a267dbf&_m=8649f7d01c7b41079d21c642eda01e26&_e=gyPRy_3jr5TDOjlczNGMm5wcFMPhU5Zl3AWW0MdWoESKfFtIOLiGF2LrC1XtYzdAKZx_b_oF1LojxVA4V2JdyDU9CqcwZKx-SqpWKxdTS6V8bz7MYX53njjWwoGo9YIK9BtbE8xJGuzrykYk3qhCmFa3AervR9FljLPk4CS9ICNfgsahD-DvYJ1nCCbqE_dl4GsXXHDgPolrBkBVx2S9unB49_oBdmuyfsm3laKHSTI%3D). **_Governor-elect Mike Braun Announces Executive Branch Reorganization_**
---
Governor-elect Mike Braun has unveiled his bold plan to reorganize Indiana’s executive branch, delivering on his promise to create a more efficient, accountable government. Drawing on the principles that made him a successful entrepreneur, Braun’s plan consolidates state operations into eight focused policy areas, ensuring streamlined leadership and better service for Hoosiers.
---
Government operations will be consolidated into eight focused policy areas, each led by an entrepreneurial Secretary, ensuring accountability, improving coordination, and delivering better service to taxpayers:
* **Management and Budget:** Overseeing financial operations to eliminate wasteful spending.
* **Commerce** : Empowering job creation and economic growth by aligning economic development, workforce training, and housing.
* **Health and Family Services:** Unifying health and social services to reduce costs and improve care.
* **Public Safety:** Enhancing law enforcement coordination and emergency response for safer communities.
* **Energy and Natural Resources:** Conserving resources while advancing a comprehensive energy strategy.
* **Education:** Creating a seamless system from pre-K to college, ensuring more choice and opportunity.
* **Transportation and Infrastructure:** Building modern infrastructure, from roads to broadband connectivity.
* **Business Affairs:** Cutting red tape so businesses can grow and create jobs.

---
Governor-elect Mike Braun’s executive branch reorganization is a testament to his commitment to limited, efficient government that puts Hoosiers first. By streamlining operations, improving accountability, and fostering coordination across agencies, this plan ensures Indiana’s government is equipped to meet the challenges of today while building a stronger future.
---
|

_**District 7 State Rep. Jake Teshka's Op-Ed on K-12 Education**_
---
---
You can tell a lot about what a person values by examining what they spend their money on. In fact, right in the middle of the Sermon on the Mount, Jesus himself said, “For where your treasure is, there your heart will be also.” By extension, you can (or rather should be able to) tell a lot about what society values by examining government expenditures. As the 2025 budget session of the Indiana General Assembly approaches, I thought that it would be worthwhile to level set about what we value and, specifically, to look at the area which receives by far the largest share of our state’s biennial budget: K-12 education. There are many misconceptions and myths out there about how and at what levels the state funds education. A persistent myth propagated by our state’s minority party is that the legislature has somehow cut overall education funding in recent years. Nothing could be farther from the truth. In fact, we have delivered historic increases to education funding in each of the last two budget cycles. In the 2024-25 budget, we increased tuition support by a whopping $1.5 Billion. Since 2011, the legislature has increased tuition support by 42% while overall enrollment has only increased 5.7% during the same period. You may be thinking, “It’s great that overall funding has increased but aren’t private schools siphoning dollars away from traditional public schools through the state’s Choice Scholarship Program?” Unfortunately, that’s another misconception that I’ve seen spread over social media. The truth is that, while only 91% of Hoosier students attend traditional public schools, those schools receive 93% of state funding. And that is just state funding. When you combine state, local and federal dollars, the average traditional public school received $12,380 per student for the 2022-23 school year (not including the $2.8 billion in federal COVID-19 relief funds). In contrast, the average Choice Scholarship amount was $6,263.66 for the 2023-24 school year. Now, you may ask, “If funding for traditional public schools is increasing, then why aren’t teacher salaries?” The first point I would make is that the legislature doesn’t set teacher salaries and, quite frankly, I don’t think you’d want us to. What an educator might need to earn to live comfortably in Paoli or Rensselaer is going to be markedly different from what that same educator would need in Noblesville or Fort Wayne. And perhaps educators in a certain district prefer to negotiate for more robust fringe benefits and forgo some amount of salary. Lawmakers are not best suited to hash out these specifics. Rather, it is locally elected school boards and hired administrators that make these decisions. With that being said, it is certainly important to note that only 58.7% of state expenditures actually made it to the classroom during the 2020-21 school year and, assuming the average classroom is 20 students (a conservative estimate), teacher salary only accounts for roughly one quarter of the revenue generated by a traditional public-school classroom. However, between 2011-2021 the number of administrative staff increased 25.2% nationwide. Lastly, I would note that teacher salaries have indeed increased. During the 2022-23 school year, the average Hoosier teacher made $58,531 with total compensation including benefits at $76,608. That was up 3.4% from the year before and nearly 10% more than the average Hoosier worker. Article 8 of the Indiana Constitution mandates that the General Assembly “encourage, by all suitable means, moral, intellectual, scientific, and agricultural improvement” and my hope is that by dispelling some of these myths, we can have a more productive conversation about how those efforts are funded during the next legislative session. _Jake Teshka District 7 Republican state representative._

Transportation and Infrastructure: Building modern infrastructure, from roads to broadband connectivity. Business Affairs: Cutting red tape so businesses can grow and create jobs. Governor-elect Mike Braun’s executive branch reorganization is a testament to his commitment to limited, efficient government that puts Hoosiers first. By streamlining operations, improving accountability, and fostering coordination across agencies, this plan ensures Indiana’s government is equipped to meet the challenges of today while building a stronger future. | District 7 State Rep. Jake Teshka's Op-Ed on K-12 Education You can tell a lot about what a person values by examining what they spend their money on. In fact, right in the middle of the Sermon on the Mount, Jesus himself said, “For where your treasure is, there your heart will be also.” By extension, you can (or rather should be able to) tell a lot about what society values by examining government expenditures. As the 2025 budget session of the Indiana General Assembly approaches, I thought that it would be worthwhile to level set about what we value and, specifically, to look at the area which receives by far the largest share of our state’s biennial budget: K-12 education. There are many misconceptions and myths out there about how and at what levels the state funds education. A persistent myth propagated by our state’s minority party is that the legislature has somehow cut overall education funding in recent years. Nothing could be farther from the truth. In fact, we have delivered historic increases to education funding in each of the last two budget cycles. In the 2024-25 budget, we increased tuition support by a whopping $1.5 Billion. Since 2011, the legislature has increased tuition support by 42% while overall enrollment has only increased 5.7% during the same period. You may be thinking, “It’s great that overall funding has increased but aren’t private schools siphoning dollars away from traditional public schools through the state’s Choice Scholarship Program?” Unfortunately, that’s another misconception that I’ve seen spread over social media. The truth is that, while only 91% of Hoosier students attend traditional public schools, those schools receive 93% of state funding. And that is just state funding. When you combine state, local and federal dollars, the average traditional public school received $12,380 per student for the 2022-23 school year (not including the $2.8 billion in federal COVID-19 relief funds). In contrast, the average Choice Scholarship amount was $6,263.66 for the 2023-24 school year. Now, you may ask, “If funding for traditional public schools is increasing, then why aren’t teacher salaries?” The first point I would make is that the legislature doesn’t set teacher salaries and, quite frankly, I don’t think you’d want us to. What an educator might need to earn to live comfortably in Paoli or Rensselaer is going to be markedly different from what that same educator would need in Noblesville or Fort Wayne. And perhaps educators in a certain district prefer to negotiate for more robust fringe benefits and forgo some amount of salary. Lawmakers are not best suited to hash out these specifics. Rather, it is locally elected school boards and hired administrators that make these decisions. With that being said, it is certainly important to note that only 58.7% of state expenditures actually made it to the classroom during the 2020-21 school year and, assuming the average classroom is 20 students (a conservative estimate), teacher salary only accounts for roughly one quarter of the revenue generated by a traditional public-school classroom. However, between 2011-2021 the number of administrative staff increased 25.2% nationwide. Lastly, I would note that teacher salaries have indeed increased. During the 2022-23 school year, the average Hoosier teacher made $58,531 with total compensation including benefits at $76,608. That was up 3.4% from the year before and nearly 10% more than the average Hoosier worker. Article 8 of the Indiana Constitution mandates that the General Assembly “encourage, by all suitable means, moral, intellectual, scientific, and agricultural improvement” and my hope is that by dispelling some of these myths, we can have a more productive conversation about how those efforts are funded during the next legislative session. Jake Teshka District 7 Republican state representative. | 📱 News You Can Use Governor Eric Holcomb with Indiana National Guard troops in Kuwait. We hate to ask, but we need to call on you one more time before the new year. clean_body: President Trump made historic appointments, and we need to know what you think about his new cabinet, so please complete your Cabinet Approval Survey ASAP. President Trump, Senate Republicans, and House Republicans need your help to lead our country back to liberty, prosperity, and the American Dream, Patriot. President Trump is selecting his cabinet, and we need to know your thoughts on his choices to Make America Great Again. EMAIL: STATUS DEADLINE: ****************************************************************************************************** Since you are one of our most loyal patriots, we need to hear back from you and thousands more supporters of Senate Republicans. We wouldn’t be here without you; your voice makes the difference. Your thoughts, opinions, and counsel are the reason Republicans have a trifecta Government, and we need your help to maximize our impact on our shared agenda. We hate to ask, but we need to call on you one more time before the new year. We need your voice to ensure President Trump makes the right choices for these critical roles, which will play a vital part in his success as the American President. Thank you, Senate Republicans P.S. We know the requests for money can be bothersome, relentless, and exhausting. We aren’t asking for funds today–just a moment of your time. ****************************************************************************************************** If you want to help Republicans, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. Text "STOP" to opt-out. | | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. _**Goal: 5,000 Responses | Deadline: Midnight
Your response: MISSING**_

Peter, with Republicans in a position to strip us of our most fundamental rights and threaten all the progress we've made, Letitia James' fight has never been more important.
**As we head into 2025, Letitia's top priorities will be:**
* **Safeguarding abortion access,** ensuring that _anyone_ seeking reproductive care can get it in New York, no matter where they're coming from or what their situation is

* **Defending our democracy,** even in the face of bad actors who seek to undermine the rights, freedoms, and needs of the American people

* **Holding bad actors accountable** for their attempts to take advantage of the vulnerable and voiceless,** ** no matter how much money or power they have
* **Fighting for a fair economy** where consumers are protected from price gouging and corporations are held accountable for taking advantage of hardworking families.

_And that isn't even half of it, Peter._
Letitia has been – and always will be – committed to protecting our freedoms, putting big businesses in their place and holding powerful institutions accountable. **But with Republicans upping the ante on their attacks against her, we need to know what you think.**
**This poll will only stay live until 11:59 p.m. tonight, so please take just a moment now to tell us:**
| | **Do you approve of Attorney General Letitia James?**

name: Laura Friedman
subject: Here’s what I’m doing at new member orientation:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97519229/513692025/158001685?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTg1YmY2ZmYtMWNhOS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nrn-0cN29e_a_U2qiciRaN2ScXho4BVB_pNejqWukRs=) Hi there, friend. I wanted to send a quick update from Washington, where I’m excited to be attending New Congressmember Orientation. It's been humbling, and a bit surreal: stepping in the Capitol for the first time knowing that I'll be taking votes and advocating on behalf of our community. I’m already trying to find common ground that we can build on regardless of party affiliation. Because above all, I’m psyched to be getting ready to work for YOU! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97519231/513692027/158001685?refcode=em-11.22.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTg1YmY2ZmYtMWNhOS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nrn-0cN29e_a_U2qiciRaN2ScXho4BVB_pNejqWukRs=) I am proud to be stepping in on day one as a member of the Progressive Caucus, and I’m already making friends with incredible, inspirational freshmen legislators who are determined to improve our communities. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97519233/513692029/158001685?refcode=em-11.22.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTg1YmY2ZmYtMWNhOS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nrn-0cN29e_a_U2qiciRaN2ScXho4BVB_pNejqWukRs=) And even though I got a “terrible” draw at the freshmen room selection lottery, anything with my name on the door will be an honor. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97519235/513692032/158001685?refcode=em-11.22.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTg1YmY2ZmYtMWNhOS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nrn-0cN29e_a_U2qiciRaN2ScXho4BVB_pNejqWukRs=) But this isn’t about me – I'd like to stress again that I would not be here without your support. The time, energy, and resources you gave are why we now have this opportunity to make progress on the issues that matter to the 30th District, and protect against far-right overreach. I still can’t believe that I’m going to be part of the 119th Congress. Thank you all for this honor. More soon, Laura | ****[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97519237/513692033/158001685?refcode=em-11.22.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTg1YmY2ZmYtMWNhOS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nrn-0cN29e_a_U2qiciRaN2ScXho4BVB_pNejqWukRs=)****
---
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97519242/513692035/-2008262997?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTg1YmY2ZmYtMWNhOS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nrn-0cN29e_a_U2qiciRaN2ScXho4BVB_pNejqWukRs=&emci=ff7ea5d4-1ca9-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=a85bf6ff-1ca9-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=8447100) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97519243/513692041/-119824367?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTg1YmY2ZmYtMWNhOS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nrn-0cN29e_a_U2qiciRaN2ScXho4BVB_pNejqWukRs=&emci=ff7ea5d4-1ca9-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=a85bf6ff-1ca9-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=8447100) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97519244/513692042/-1124685828?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTg1YmY2ZmYtMWNhOS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nrn-0cN29e_a_U2qiciRaN2ScXho4BVB_pNejqWukRs=&emci=ff7ea5d4-1ca9-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=a85bf6ff-1ca9-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=8447100) | Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress

The time, energy, and resources you gave are why we now have this opportunity to make progress on the issues that matter to the 30th District, and protect against far-right overreach. I still can’t believe that I’m going to be part of the 119th Congress. Thank you all for this honor. More soon, Laura | **=** | | Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress Laura's campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs and completely relies on grassroots supporters like you! To chip in to Laura's campaign = To learn more about Laura's progressive record of supporting our working families, please visit: We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Laura Friedman for Congress PO Box 27296 Los Angeles, CA 90027 United States

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Direct
subject: How often do you think about the Roman Republic?
body:
The history of the Roman Republic is a captivating tale of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success.

| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=841e897d425242bab77fa020f7d7c9b7&_t=fscuxDgix9iFRteScyLy3O7NZj_fk1j8WkSUpAqblqegQ5-L0v5o8kXeQLlaFYF1ODl16NipX6NLSQZSdHLIMbQ9RmPCQ5UAPyUZ9DMA_YBTjhbTp4BiiDrYqZzxjePY)_
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=841e897d425242bab77fa020f7d7c9b7&_e=xZ_BZKia9JXA8ZhasL6GhSyvG89RkciN8F8zL728cw3nJhcQgvxRyJ3hASrdF_h_ThxWDAtWFLGpyc_dHVylFQ5rHqd6CWeGQl1G4y4W3Wh8ss5VDuC2MNX0kwGxmNwj5x2dFba6SQO-a_oL1NyJnKN7XCZar6O589Dmc6UTv_jVIXgew0pX2OdvIMoFPU7aqNny95CzQelcVoOoksTaP6t0OmkaePvvk1l3KU3J_YwvYulapAkQOpkuqyLku-nuvOPrm0XiwwtEtbCSOqS_EW0Bd1UfwOKFU6FJsn8DJlcf0WxglUoEEdAQ6Hu0oZotTHsjzNiIe9OgE5XUAl-mQnCCxHDnmXmzHsz18ZLpDzpow5-tDAwc7E04hPUJMcI1UzrLR9FRPDdd2S-QJHmQog%3D%3D)
| |
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=841e897d425242bab77fa020f7d7c9b7&_e=xZ_BZKia9JXA8ZhasL6GhSyvG89RkciN8F8zL728cw3nJhcQgvxRyJ3hASrdF_h_ThxWDAtWFLGpyc_dHVylFQ5rHqd6CWeGQl1G4y4W3Wh8ss5VDuC2MNX0kwGxmNwj5x2dFba6SQO-a_oL1NyJnKN7XCZar6O589Dmc6UTv_jVIXgew0pX2OdvIMoFPU7aqNny95CzQelcVoOoksTaP6t0OmkaePvvk1l3KU3J_YwvYulapAkQOpkuqyLku-nuWY4lVrTUqZ1M77SjLqMXlOQtG9eXhEjRhZYmqHviZGQOEYiJB43-RIMeoMtpbxYfc4uSFaXz4iFwFsapqoAilhSKKjMny14YmiyjFjsQ6RyFRZCIgZitzN6qNXxsknrqbUO3H_Tpdzuxcn1CHOJAUQ%3D%3D) Dear Friend,

The history of the Roman Republic is a captivating tale of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success. One that still impacts our world today.

To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we released our free online course, **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic."**

**You can now receive your own DVD box set of "The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic" when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**

And, for a limited time, we'll also send you a **free color map** of the Roman world at the end of the Republic. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures.
Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic," **along with the companion map today:

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/roman-republic-dvd**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=841e897d425242bab77fa020f7d7c9b7&_e=xZ_BZKia9JXA8ZhasL6GhSyvG89RkciN8F8zL728cw3nJhcQgvxRyJ3hASrdF_h_ThxWDAtWFLGpyc_dHVylFQ5rHqd6CWeGQl1G4y4W3Wh8ss5VDuC2MNX0kwGxmNwj5x2dFba6SQO-a_oL1NyJnKN7XCZar6O589Dmc6UTv_jVIXgew0pX2OdvIMoFPU7aqNny95CzQelcVoOoksTaP6t0OmkaePvvk1l3KU3J_YwvYulapAkQOpkuqyLku-nuSO5HfKtq_2yg97Dlb6ZkRkD3k_sErcHPpwYxyIBsoOoIpzH7eMRCJf8PlQQGzomZ5PklPz7bDE9iMTXljG_ii4srkYut_pwv_3xGTWYihlmy6dLuRKr8majg-2HKSRHIwTwMwLRUdYb4gtB9vqLtDw%3D%3D)

By studying ancient Rome, you'll discover the conditions necessary to preserve a republic, and, conversely, how a republic may lose its way.

That's why we produced **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic"** and why I hope you'll watch and share the course on DVD.

Thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Are you ready for your journey to heaven?
body:
I often hear the question, “What will we do in heaven?”
I often hear the question, "What will we do in heaven?"
| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_s=7cb0f99967f34a50938f8c863dacf0ba&_t=0a60HSg6164n4srb53_Zjqtu16ZDBGEskjjw9_ZyIMDIBii8OtmDX2O3IraCfSFl7R9jDlH9vRmbIWyzuY5PQTrrvqZOkcqdb2xg5da76TV11jbSRxNwhLnoKVC61aS_)_
---
[](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=7cb0f99967f34a50938f8c863dacf0ba&_e=xbV642RUi11lD0e3yCBpQEZx4hoz4-yYfs44FFGDPfTmWEFEhYnCrcgMsC9qrI_2wqIxHU3Ma-4zxplGuiLdt-CN_yvj8vMtrCyp8EpVgDgTWdzP_i5qbXoFC8fl4RuSrxY6HW7wQSvrhXkRr0rke5Hr_KvYZ-EnSrYUeYKreH6wAcsE9p_Yq1_Zp7UwSPPBDcX8qdlWzSNH42cJyaME0A42Lolep8_X2lrtCWqMlUrLyuK6499uSspgMZrxd9F6F1HFvVcDDwp5BkJWXJU-OD-T60Ff5feptGgCwPO-dOWe-P4BuyOzEJLlf2pomHgyJAw7XbqqHMHmNKUDionMQgZYf0rzBX_12FnrhDIqHW5BrSK92h9xzw2prrwGrdpFwINWAVv_mtymkZn3r-a-n01f2ON7IxM16Ap-0fFV-yM%3D)
Hello Friend,

I often hear the question, "What will we do in heaven?" Many imagine heaven as a place where we sit around on clouds, strumming harps. But nothing could be further from the truth.

The Bible gives us glimpses of a heaven filled with purpose and activity. Revelation 22:3 says, "His servants will serve Him." We will have meaningful work, free from the frustration we often face here on earth. There will be no more exhaustion or stress, only joy, as we serve the Lord.

Heaven will also be a place of joyful worship. Revelation 5:13 gives us a picture of all creation joining together to sing praises to the Lamb who was slain. Can you imagine what it will be like to be part of that heavenly choir?

In A Place Called Heaven, I explore 10 surprising truths about your eternal home, pointing to what the Bible tells us about our eternal home.
* What Difference Does a Future Heaven Make in My Life Today?
* Is Heaven a Real Place or Is It a State of Mind?
* Have Some People Already Visited Heaven?
* Do Christians Immediately Go to Heaven When They Die?
* What Will We Do in Heaven?
* Do People in Heaven Know What is Happening on Earth?
* Will We Know One Another in Heaven?
* Will Heaven Be the Same for Everyone?
* Who Will Be in Heaven?
* How Can I Prepare for My Journey to Heaven?

This book offers hope, direction, and clarity about what awaits those who follow Jesus Christ.

I'd love to send you a copy as a thank-you for your generous gift of $25 or more to Pathway to Victory. Your support helps us continue to pierce the darkness of this world by sharing the light of God's Word with many who desperately need hope.

Click here to donate and receive your copy: [https://secure.ptv.org/a-place-called-heaven-generous-gift-1](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=7cb0f99967f34a50938f8c863dacf0ba&_e=xbV642RUi11lD0e3yCBpQEZx4hoz4-yYfs44FFGDPfTmWEFEhYnCrcgMsC9qrI_2wqIxHU3Ma-4zxplGuiLdt-CN_yvj8vMtrCyp8EpVgDgTWdzP_i5qbXoFC8fl4RuSrxY6HW7wQSvrhXkRr0rke5Hr_KvYZ-EnSrYUeYKreH6wAcsE9p_Yq1_Zp7UwSPPBDcX8qdlWzSNH42cJyaME0A42Lolep8_X2lrtCWqMlUrLyuK6499uSspgMZrxd9F63Q8XCPWIL4zMm30jE1bNI613LRO81TX_r6Ue45acpoOYBqcRAwQ_RSWk5l9Rl6IIJSRKjcajxeTGBun3rpxJ69Pjsqi0JZauPJOcwSAXEkQlaw2-ITSmdsN_WYgdMu9upVt4iX2_1XOrRDuUwsoYDpvnfvVWyd1_q98ypIjm-0o%3D)

I hope this book creates in you excitement and anticipation for the eternal joy and purpose that awaits us in heaven.

God bless you,
Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Stop the indoctrination of our children
body:
As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: **_You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children._** Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a41e39cd23d24683aaac8bd0e27a93ba&_e=IE7jV4eK_vhHFuAPdM65dpsK5cPYaxzGnrx2mFrZH7_aW9lMsNqw7Or35Mo9ZHFs7lqBa46Gmq1TYGk8uYP14pIVYCKeAhjJvzSUboA5N_c6Xp6-ZgS0EgKGrV2YSJVByWmmlFVqw_X6bcYsTHu72J4lTTgEzio6H15FCHLeWegtNjIGhdG6O7aBueJjUIVQPLNpC_1FQCjgG-EOvRAmEkr3cODzTtcp-OmjEI0iXh4UQv1AkVQbITEd2Dq6uJ9iiJ4_6lkgqgWUGKbjYDO9F0EAC5uKjEQBykYJ0JdvYz9QibR5NPhAgw9lkQaT-TDPHD2oz9sgu04G1mE-5a9l_7L-gUB7MMCnhxazxzGRk7cl1LW69JiLI2dq5VtwYAa9piJUu38SjiphOHwIovvHFQ%3D%3D)
---
| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a41e39cd23d24683aaac8bd0e27a93ba&_e=IE7jV4eK_vhHFuAPdM65dpsK5cPYaxzGnrx2mFrZH7_aW9lMsNqw7Or35Mo9ZHFs7lqBa46Gmq1TYGk8uYP14pIVYCKeAhjJvzSUboA5N_c6Xp6-ZgS0EgKGrV2YSJVByWmmlFVqw_X6bcYsTHu72J4lTTgEzio6H15FCHLeWegtNjIGhdG6O7aBueJjUIVQPLNpC_1FQCjgG-EOvRAmEkr3cODzTtcp-OmjEI0iXh4UQv1AkVQbITEd2Dq6uJ9iAdxZ-v719_BHj6LyJr9lPJNas0Swk-W0V5FYJGHNsjSJwc3ayWfHzMrpuvezs1vF1-Qp9hHPq7btu_r-S-enhqhDcpX2nHQ3iZXwGvV_x-c92roou0jNIAXXzN0BexpSpFm5tJ3btbkilJ9UbxpPuQ%3D%3D)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[**Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a41e39cd23d24683aaac8bd0e27a93ba&_e=IE7jV4eK_vhHFuAPdM65dpsK5cPYaxzGnrx2mFrZH7_aW9lMsNqw7Or35Mo9ZHFs7lqBa46Gmq1TYGk8uYP14pIVYCKeAhjJvzSUboA5N_c6Xp6-ZgS0EgKGrV2YSJVByWmmlFVqw_X6bcYsTHu72J4lTTgEzio6H15FCHLeWegtNjIGhdG6O7aBueJjUIVQPLNpC_1FQCjgG-EOvRAmEkr3cODzTtcp-OmjEI0iXh4UQv1AkVQbITEd2Dq6uJ9iEsvwfnj6k9EdldjpWHRNWXLGLY6cv6eEV8IWoAqSbYjf2v6XyXi2TsUMF8sKiEIMfx7bMprY95YsJepovEBb9L0LPgIONZ0CfTjnZa5Ta3AkXqqsO8wlNzaVcNtwpG48OWxvJ9Vdam50jTapunuhbA%3D%3D)** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. name: Claire Low @ NDRC
subject: 🗓️ Here’s what’s on the docket for the next few months and beyond:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
Some of our first chances to fight back for our democracy:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97520216/513695241/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYyMjI1Y2QyLTFlYTktZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6WOkEUZBXtI-mp9LgMZx0LeY446n0MY9tNnl-NNUK00=&emci=9c3b4502-f7a8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=f2225cd2-1ea9-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, the truth is there is no “offseason” in our line of work. There is no time off in defending our freedoms. **So as we continue to analyze this year’s election results, we’re getting ready for some of our first opportunities to fight back for our democracy in 2025.** Here’s what’s on the docket: | **🗓️ JANUARY 🗓️**
---
* **Virginia** will hold a special election that will decide control of the state senate AND the house of delegates. Currently, Democrats hold 21 seats and Republicans have 19 seats. If the GOP flips this seat, the Republican lieutenant governor would be the tie-breaking vote, giving them the majority. If Democrats win both seats, we will be able to fend off a Republican trifecta.

* **Michigan** will hold a special election that will set the balance of power in the state senate, as Democrats currently hold 20 seats and Republicans with 18 seats. If the GOP is able to turn this seat red, it would leave Democratic Lt. Gov. Garlin Gilchrist as the tie-breaking vote.

**🗓️ APRIL 🗓️**
---
* **Wisconsin** will hold an election for a 10-year term on the state supreme court. While justices are elected as nonpartisan, the current breakdown of the court has four liberals and three conservatives. If conservatives are able to win this election, they will flip control of the court.

**🗓️ NOVEMBER 🗓️**
---
* **Virginia and New Jersey** will hold statewide elections for governor, lieutenant governor, and the house of delegates.

* **Pennsylvania** will hold an election for three state supreme court seats. Currently, Democrats have a 5-2 partisan advantage on the court. But because three Democrats are up for reelection, losing just two of these elections will flip the makeup of the court.

And sometime in 2025, **Ohio** will start the process of redrawing its congressional map. The new map will need to be completed by early 2026.
**Peter, I know that was a lot — but it’s critically important you understand what’s at stake over this next year, and why your support today matters so much. In 2025 and beyond, we’ll keep pushing to elect candidates who will defend our democracy, and that work has never been more critical.**
[**Please make a $30 donation today to power the fight for fair maps and fair elections.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97520217/513695242/1464966451?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_2025Election_email_20241122-NDRC-Tier1-2025Election_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20241122-NDRC-Tier1-2025Election_&utm_campaign=2025Election&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYyMjI1Y2QyLTFlYTktZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6WOkEUZBXtI-mp9LgMZx0LeY446n0MY9tNnl-NNUK00=)
